sections.heading: TL;DR
sections.body:
A US-based Shopify DTC brand at **$500k–$50M GMV** with at least **10 SKUs** and **Gen-Z / Millennial audience skew** (or aspirational creator-led brand voice) can launch a **TikTok Shop / live-commerce channel** through **TikTok-Shop-Seller-Center + Shopify-TikTok-Channel + Klaviyo-TikTok-channel + Triple-Whale-TikTok-attribution + 5-payout creator-affiliate-structures** with a **4-phase rollout** over **8–16 weeks** at a **total cost stack of $0/mo** (Path A creator-affiliate-only) / **$0–$2k/mo** (Path B DEFAULT creator-affiliate + shoppable-video-ads + LIVE-shopping 4-hour-week) / **$2k–$10k/mo** (Path C full TikTok-Shop-orchestration including daily LIVE-cadence + TikTok-Shop-affiliate-program + Klaviyo-TikTok-channel + Triple-Whale-TikTok-cohort-overlay) plus **one-time setup of $0–$5k** (TikTok-Shop-Seller-Center-onboarding + category-approval-application + first-50-creator-affiliate-onboarding + LIVE-shopping-studio-build [Ring-light + iPhone-15-Pro + tripod + lavalier-mic + backdrop $500-$2k] + Klaviyo-TikTok-channel-integration + Triple-Whale-TikTok-cohort-overlay-setup) and an expected **Year-1 incremental TikTok-Shop GMV of $250k–$2M** depending on the brand's creator-affiliate-pool size + LIVE-cadence-capacity + audience-Gen-Z-skew + Shop-Score-baseline.

**The 4-phase rhythm:**

- **Phase 1 (Weeks 1–2): TikTok-Shop-Seller-Center-onboarding + category-approval + first-50-creator-affiliate-onboarding** — Apply for TikTok-Shop-Seller-Center with category-approval for the brand's top SKU category (Beauty / Fashion / Home / Electronics / Food-and-Beverage / Pet / Baby / Health / Outdoor / Toys-and-Collectibles per TikTok for Business 2024 category-approval-list; each category has a separate approval-flow with documentation [brand-registration + product-safety-cert + insurance-coverage + category-specific-test-results like CPSIA for baby OR FDA-registration for beauty/food] + approval-timeline 1-4 weeks). Onboard 20-50 creator-affiliates via TikTok-Shop-Creator-Marketplace + Aspire + Collabstr + Instagram-hashtag-scrape per the canonical 4-channel creator-affiliate-pool build; canonical 5-payout-structures [CPM $10-$30/1000-views / CPS 10-25%-of-GMV / flat-fee $200-$2k/creator/post / hybrid 5%-of-GMV + $200-base-fee / product-seeding-only $0 + free-product]. Gate on Move #6 Triple-Whale-attribution so **TikTok-Shop-GMV-vs-DTC-GMV cohort-LTV is measurable** (a brand without TikTok-aware attribution undercounts TikTok-driven-DTC-attribution by 30-50% per Triple-Whale-TikTok-attribution-2024 benchmarks). Expected outcome: 4.5+ Shop-Score baseline + 20-50 active creator-affiliates + $25k-$100k first-quarter TikTok-Shop-GMV.
- **Phase 2 (Weeks 3–6): Shoppable-video-ads-launch + creator-affiliate-cohort-LTV-measurement** — Launch shoppable-video-ads via TikTok-Ads-Manager with Spark-Ads-boost (boost top-performing organic-creator-content as paid-Spark-Ads $50-$500/day per audience-segment) + In-Feed-Ads with Product-Module (TikTok-Shop-product-card in-feed) + Top-View-Ads (full-screen-takeover with TikTok-Shop-product-module). Wire Triple-Whale-TikTok-attribution for cohort-LTV overlay [TikTok-Shop-driven-cohort vs organic-DTC-cohort vs paid-Meta-cohort at 30/60/90-day windows]. Per eMarketer 2024 + TikTok-for-Business-2024 benchmarks: shoppable-video-ads achieve 2-4× ROAS vs in-feed-ads without product-module + 1.5-2× ROAS vs Spark-Ads-only.
- **Phase 3 (Weeks 7–12): LIVE-shopping-launch + TikTok-Shop-affiliate-program-launch** — Build the **LIVE-shopping-studio** ($500-$2k one-time [Ring-light + iPhone-15-Pro + tripod + lavalier-mic + 1080p-webcam + backdrop + teleprompter-app + LIVE-streaming-software Streamlabs-OBS-or-TikTok-LIVE-Studio $0/mo]) + the **4-hour-week LIVE-cadence** (1 LIVE-session-per-week 60-90-minutes per session per TikTok-LIVE-2024-benchmarks; optimal cadence is 1-2 sessions/week for brands with 4-8 hr/wk operator capacity) + the **5-segment LIVE-show-runner-script** (Segment 1 product-intro with hero-

sections.heading: Who this is for
sections.body:
- **Primary:** US-based DTC Shopify brand at **$500k–$50M GMV** with at least **10 SKUs** and **Gen-Z / Millennial audience skew ≥40%** OR **creator-led-brand-voice** (the canonical TikTok-Shop-fit profile per eMarketer 2024 + Jungle Scout 2024 benchmarks: 70%+ TikTok users 18-34; brands with 40%+ audience 18-34 see 3-5× higher TikTok-Shop-conversion vs brands with <20% audience 18-34). **Category-fit:** Beauty / Skincare / Haircare / Cosmetics (TikTok-Shop-top-category per 2024 data) / Fashion-Accessories (top-2) / Home-Decor (top-3) / Health-Supplements (top-4) / Pet (top-5) / Baby / Food-and-Beverage / Outdoor / Toys-and-Collectibles (TikTok-Shop-permitted-categories per TikTok-for-Business-2024 category-approval-list; restricted categories include Firearms / Alcohol / Tobacco / Cannabis / Pharmaceuticals / Adult-Content / Gambling / Financial-Products).
- **Secondary:** US-based DTC brand on BigCommerce / Magento / WooCommerce — most of this doc applies; the platform-specific forks are at "TikTok-Shop-integration-alternatives" (BigCommerce-TikTok-Channel via BigCommerce-Channel-Manager $0-$99/mo; Magento-TikTok-Channel via Magento-Marketplace-Connector $0-$299/mo; WooCommerce-TikTok-Channel via WooCommerce-TikTok-integration-plugin $0). International DTC brand with $500k+ GMV in home market (UK + EU + SE-Asia markets have TikTok-Shop live in [UK since 2021 / DE+FR+IT+ES+IE since 2023 / SE-Asia [Indonesia, Malaysia, Philippines, Singapore, Thailand, Vietnam, Japan] since 2022] — the cross-border-TikTok-Shop-orchestration is structurally different from US-TikTok-Shop; see "International TikTok-Shop" callout).
- **Not for:** Pure-DTC brands with **<10 SKUs** (TikTok-Shop-product-feed requires ≥10-SKUs for category-approval-baseline; brands with <10-SKUs need to bundle-Kits to reach the SKU threshold OR defer until SKU-broadness improves). **B2B-only brands** (TikTok-Shop is fundamentally B2C / consumer-facing; B2B-wholesale is Move #14.5). **Luxury-DTC brands protecting MAP-policy** (TikTok-Shop-creator-affiliate often discount-prominently with limited-time-offers that violate MAP-policy per Faire 2024 + Ankorstore 2024 cross-reference — luxury brands should use TikTok-Shop-affiliate-program-with-MAP-policy-guardrails instead of TikTok-Shop-creator-affiliate-direct-discounts). **Dropship-only brands** (TikTok-Shop-category-approval requires inventory-control-documents + product-safety-cert + brand-registration; dropship-only brands typically lack these). **B2B-voice brands** without separate B2C-SKU-strategy (B2B-voice emphasizes shelf-readiness + casepack-specs + NET-30-terms which don't translate to TikTok-Shop-impulse-buy-pattern). **Map-policy-violating SKU categories** (electronics / appliances / high-AOV jewelry over $500).

sections.heading: Prerequisites
sections.body:
Before Phase 1, you need:

- A live Shopify (or compatible) DTC store with at least **$500k GMV** + at least **10 SKUs** (5 hero-SKUs at $15-$45 impulse-price + 5 wholesale-eligible secondary SKUs at $50-$200 considered-price) + at least **25% TikTok-Shop-margin headroom** (TikTok-Shop-takes 8%-commission + creator-affiliate-commission 10-25%-of-GMV + shipping-subsidy 5-15%-of-AOV + LIVE-show-production-cost $50-$200/session = 30-50% of GMV; a brand with <25% gross margin should defer TikTok-Shop until margin improves OR offer exclusive TikTok-Shop-only SKUs at higher price-point).
- Admin access to: **TikTok-Shop-Seller-Center** (seller-center.tiktok.com — category-approval-application + product-listing-management + order-fulfillment + Shop-Score-tracking), **Shopify-TikTok-Channel** (Shopify admin → TikTok channel install → product-feed-sync $0), **Klaviyo** (TikTok-channel-integration for TikTok-Shop-cart-abandon + TikTok-Shop-welcome-flow + TikTok-Shop-post-purchase + TikTok-Shop-subscriber-cohort-LTV), **Triple-Whale** (TikTok-cohort-overlay for TikTok-Shop-driven-cohort-LTV vs organic-DTC-cohort-LTV vs paid-Meta-cohort-LTV), **TikTok-Ads-Manager** (shoppable-video-ads + Spark-Ads-boost + In-Feed-Ads with Product-Module + Top-View-Ads), **TikTok-Shop-Creator-Marketplace** (creator-affiliate-discovery + onboarding + payout-management).
- An established baseline of US contribution margin **≥40%** (TikTok-Shop-takes typically need 8%-commission + creator-affiliate 10-25%-of-GMV + shipping-subsidy 5-15%-of-AOV + LIVE-show-production $50-$200/session = 30-50% of GMV cost-stack; a brand with <40% US contribution margin should defer TikTok-Shop until DTC gross margin improves OR offer exclusive TikTok-Shop-only SKUs at higher price-point).
- A documented voice framework (Asset 02 brand-voice) with at least **Default + Luxury + Sustainable + Gen-Z + B2B voice profiles** — TikTok-Shop-creator-voice is the **5th canonical voice profile** (the **Gen-Z-voice + creator-led-brand-voice** is materially different from the other 4: it emphasizes **impulse-moment + UGC-style-demo + limited-time-offer + creator-personality-as-trust-signal + social-proof-stack [UGC-count + reviews-count + creator-endorsement-count]** vs DTC-voice which emphasizes self-expression + gift-worthiness + replenishment-cadence). The 5-voice profile structure is already in workspace (`assets/02-brand-voice.md`), but the **TikTok-Shop-voice fine-tuning for creator-affiliate-briefs + LIVE-show-runner-script + shoppable-video-ad-creative** is a Future-Tick Companions item.
- An established retention-stack (Move #1 cart-abandon + Move #4 welcome + Move #7 SMS + Move #8 loyalty + Move #11 subscription + Move #15 affiliate-program — these six flows are the **DTC-retention substrate**; a brand without them gets <50% of the DTC-LTV upside and must defer TikTok-Shop until DTC is steady-state).
- A fulfillment stack capable of **TikTok-Shop-2-day-fulfillment**: own warehouse OR 3PL (Move #12 / research/07 + playbook 14 / canonical 500+ orders/mo 3PL break-even threshold) with **TikTok-Shop-SLA-enforcement** (TikTok-Shop requires 95%+ ship-on-time-rate per Shop-Score-2024-metric; brands with 3PL need to verify 3PL can hit TikTok-Shop-SLA with same-day-or-next-day fulfillment + tracking-number-upload-within-24-hours-of-order).
- **8-prereq TikTok-Shop-onboarding pack**: (1) TikTok-Business-Account (free, requires business-email + business-registration-document), (2) **category-approval-application** per TikTok-for-Business-2024-category-approval-list (Beauty / Fashion-Accessories / Home / Electronics / Food / Pet / Baby / Health / Outdoor / Toys-and-Collectibles — each category has separate approval-flow with documentation [brand-registration + product-safety-cert + insurance-coverage + category-specific-test-results like CPSIA for baby OR FDA-registration for beauty/food OR FCC-certification for electronics] + approval-timeline 1-4 weeks), (3) **Shop-Score-baseline-audit** (c

sections.heading: The 5-pillar framework
sections.body: The TikTok-Shop / live-commerce stack is best understood as **5 distinct pillars**, each with its own tool stack, GMV-tier-decision-matrix, and operator-build-recipe. The pillars compound: a brand that nails Pillars 1-3 but skips Pillars 4-5 caps at 30-50% of TikTok-Shop's structural upside.

sections.heading: Pillar 1 — TikTok-Shop-Seller-Center + category-approval + product-feed-optimization
sections.body:
The **platform-foundation** pillar: TikTok-Shop-Seller-Center is the canonical seller-side-platform where brands list products, manage orders, track Shop-Score, manage creator-affiliate-relationships, and access TikTok-Shop-analytics. **Category-approval-application** is the regulatory-onboarding step: each of the 10 permitted TikTok-Shop-categories (Beauty / Fashion-Accessories / Home / Electronics / Food-and-Beverage / Pet / Baby / Health / Outdoor / Toys-and-Collectibles) requires a separate application with category-specific-documentation [brand-registration-certificate + product-safety-certification [CPSIA for baby OR FDA-registration for beauty/food/supplements OR FCC-certification for electronics OR CPSC-registration for general-merchandise] + product-insurance $1M-$2M general-liability + product-liability $1M + category-specific-test-results [safety-data-sheet + heavy-metal-test + flammability-test OR microbial-test OR pesticide-residue-test OR stability-test] + warehouse-safety-cert (FDA-registered for food/cosmetics/supplements OR CPSC-registered for general-merchandise) + brand-authorization-letter for distribution]; approval-timeline 1-4 weeks per TikTok-for-Business-2024; rejection-rate 30-50% for first-time-applicants per Jungle-Scout-2024-benchmarks. **Product-feed-optimization** is the listing-quality discipline: per-SKU TikTok-Shop-product-title ≤100-chars + product-image 1:1-square-≥800px + 3-5-additional-images showing product-in-use + product-description-with-keywords [SEO + benefit-led + ingredient-led + use-case-led] + price-tier-fits-TikTok-Shop-impulse-pattern $15-$45 hero-SKU + 5%-15%-shipping-subsidy + TikTok-Shop-product-card-preview. Per eMarketer-2024 + Jungle-Scout-2024 benchmarks: optimized-product-feeds achieve 2-4× higher conversion-rate vs unoptimized-feeds (Shop-Score's algorithmic-distribution-bonus rewards quality-listings).

**The 5-path TikTok-Shop-launch-mode decision matrix** (operator's first fork):

- **Path A — Creator-affiliate-only + Shoppable-video-ads** ($0/mo <$500k GMV) — TikTok-Shop-Seller-Center + Shopify-TikTok-Channel + Klaviyo-Standard + TikTok-Ads-Manager-Self-Serve. Best for brands at $100k-$500k GMV with strong-DTC + creator-affiliate-pool ≥20 + 4-8 hr/wk operator capacity. Returns: 3-5× ROAS on TikTok-Ads-Spend + $25k-$100k first-quarter TikTok-Shop-GMV.
- **Path B — Creator-affiliate + Shoppable-video-ads + LIVE-shopping 4-hour-week** ($0-$2k/mo $500k-$5M GMV DEFAULT) — Path A + LIVE-shopping-studio-build + 4-hour-week-LIVE-cadence + TikTok-LIVE-Production-Partner-or-in-house + Triple-Whale-TikTok-cohort-overlay. Best for brands at $500k-$5M GMV with strong-DTC + creator-affiliate-pool ≥50 + 4-8 hr/wk LIVE-cadence-capacity. Returns: 5-15% incremental GMV contribution + 8.5:1 default Year-1 ROI + $250k-$1M first-year TikTok-Shop-GMV.
- **Path C — Full TikTok-Shop-orchestration** ($2k-$10k/mo $5M+ GMV) — Path B + daily-LIVE-cadence + TikTok-Shop-affiliate-program-orchestration + Klaviyo-TikTok-channel-full-integration + Triple-Whale-Pro + TikTok-Shop-Analytics-Pro + dedicated-creator-affiliate-manager $4k-$6k/mo. Best for brands at $5M+ GMV with dedicated-TikTok-Shop-team. Returns: 15-30% incremental GMV contribution + 6:1 default Year-1 ROI muted by 6-12-month LIVE-cadence-build-cycle + creator-affiliate-churn-rate.
- **Path D — TikTok-Shop-affiliate-program-only** ($0-$500/mo) — TikTok-Shop-Affiliate-Program-without-creator-affiliate-direct-onboarding + minimal-LIVE-cadence. Best for brands at $500k-$5M GMV with limited-creator-affiliate-pool-capacity OR luxury-DTC-with-MAP-policy-guardrails.
- **Path E — Pre-revenue / pre-launch / defer** — Brands at <$100k GMV OR <10-SKUs OR no-creator-affiliate-pool OR <40%-gross-margin should defer TikTok-Shop until DTC-substrate-is-steady-state per the canonical DTC-retention-substrate requirement (Move #1 + #4 + #7 + #8 + #11 + #15).

sections.heading: Pillar 2 — Creator-affiliate-onboarding + 5-payout-structures + creator-brief-templates
sections.body:
The **creator-affiliate-pool-build** pillar: TikTok-Shop-Creator-Marketplace is the canonical creator-discovery-and-onboarding-platform; brands can also source from Aspire ($500-$2k/mo agency) + Collabstr ($0 + 10%-of-creator-payment) + Instagram-hashtag-scrape (free-but-manual) + Move #15-affiliate-program-existing-affiliate-pool per playbook-16. **5-payout-structures** are the canonical creator-compensation-models: **CPM** ($10-$30/1000-views; best for top-of-funnel brand-awareness + creator-with-100k+-followers) / **CPS** (10-25%-of-GMV; best for performance-driven + creator-with-10k-100k-followers) / **flat-fee** ($200-$2k/creator/post; best for premium-brand-narrative-control + creator-with-500k+-followers) / **hybrid** (5%-of-GMV + $200-base-fee; best for performance-driven-with-base-creator-commitment) / **product-seeding-only** ($0 + free-product; best for early-stage-brand-with-limited-budget + creator-with-1k-10k-followers). Per TikTok-for-Business-2024 + Awin-2024 + Impact-2024 benchmarks: CPS is the dominant-payout-structure for 60%+ of TikTok-Shop-creator-affiliate-relationships; CPM + flat-fee are the dominant-payout-structures for brand-awareness-led campaigns.

**Creator-brief-templates** are the canonical creator-content-specification: per-SKU per-voice (Default + Luxury + Sustainable + Gen-Z + B2B) creator-brief-template includes [product-name + hero-SKU-benefit + 3-key-talking-points + 1-call-to-action + 1-limited-time-offer-code + 1-TikTok-Shop-product-link + 1-required-disclosure "#ad" / "#sponsored" / "#partner" per FTC-2024-enforcement + 1-MAP-policy-guardrail-notice if luxury-SKU]. Per FTC-2024 + TikTok-for-Business-2024 benchmarks: missing-#ad-disclosure fines are $10k+/violation per FTC-2023-2024-enforcement; canonical 16-CFR-Part-255-compliance-SOP is required for every TikTok-Shop-creator-brief.

sections.heading: Pillar 3 — Shoppable-video-ads + Spark-Ads-boost + In-Feed-Ads with Product-Module + Top-View-Ads
sections.body: The **paid-acquisition** pillar: TikTok-Ads-Manager is the canonical paid-ads-platform with 4 ad-formats optimized for TikTok-Shop. **Spark-Ads** are boost-existing-organic-creator-content-as-paid-ads ($50-$500/day per audience-segment; best-performing-format per TikTok-for-Business-2024 with 2-4× ROAS vs in-feed-ads-without-Spark-Ads). **In-Feed-Ads with Product-Module** are native-feed-ads-with-TikTok-Shop-product-card (best-performing-feed-format per eMarketer-2024; CVR 2-4× higher than non-product-module-ads). **Top-View-Ads** are full-screen-takeover-ads-with-TikTok-Shop-product-module ($50k-$200k/day; best for major-product-launches-and-pr-events; typically reserved for $5M+ GMV brands per the canonical Top-View-Ads-cost-barrier). **LIVE-shopping-ad-placement** is the in-feed-promotion-of-upcoming-LIVE-session ($50-$500/session-promotion; best for building-LIVE-audience-anticipation). Per TikTok-for-Business-2024 + Triple-Whale-2024 benchmarks: blended-shoppable-video-ads + LIVE-shopping achieve 2-4× ROAS vs in-feed-ads-without-product-module + 1.5-2× ROAS vs Spark-Ads-only.

sections.heading: Pillar 4 — LIVE-shopping-launch + 4-hour-week-cadence + LIVE-show-runner-script-template
sections.body: The **LIVE-shopping-orchestration** pillar: LIVE-shopping is the canonical 60-90-minute TikTok-Shop-LIVE-session where the host demonstrates products, responds to chat-questions, runs limited-time-offers, and converts viewers to TikTok-Shop-purchases in real-time. **LIVE-shopping-studio-build** is the canonical $500-$2k-one-time-setup: Ring-light + iPhone-15-Pro + tripod + lavalier-mic + 1080p-webcam + backdrop + teleprompter-app + LIVE-streaming-software Streamlabs-OBS-or-TikTok-LIVE-Studio ($0/mo). **4-hour-week-LIVE-cadence** is the canonical weekly-time-commitment: 1 LIVE-session-per-week 60-90-minutes per session (optimal-cadence per TikTok-LIVE-2024-benchmarks; brands with 8-16 hr/wk operator capacity can run 2-3-sessions-per-week with 5-15% higher GMV-per-hour-LIVE). **LIVE-show-runner-script-template** is the canonical 5-segment-LIVE-script: Segment 1 (10-15 min) product-intro-with-hero-SKU + Segment 2 (15-20 min) demo + Segment 3 (15-20 min) Q&A-with-chat-responder + Segment 4 (10-15 min) creator-guest-takeover + Segment 5 (10-15 min) closing-limited-time-offer-with-TikTok-Shop-flash-sale. Per NRF-2024 + Modern-Retail-2024 + Insider-Intelligence-2024 + Jungle-Scout-2024 benchmarks: LIVE-shopping achieves 5-15% conversion-rate vs 1-3% for in-feed-shoppable-video-ads (3-5× higher CVR); LIVE-shopping GMV-per-hour ranges from $500-$2k for new-brands to $10k-$50k for established-TikTok-Shop-brands.

sections.heading: Pillar 5 — Triple-Whale-TikTok-attribution + cohort-LTV-iteration + Shop-Score-4.8+-audit
sections.body:
The **measurement + optimization** pillar: Triple-Whale-TikTok-attribution is the canonical TikTok-Shop-cohort-LTV-measurement-discipline; without TikTok-aware-attribution, brands undercount TikTok-Shop-driven-DTC-attribution by 30-50% per Triple-Whale-2024-benchmarks (a TikTok-Shop-customer who later buys from organic-DTC-search is mis-attributed to organic-DTC instead of TikTok-Shop-driven-discovery). **Cohort-LTV-iteration** is the canonical weekly-review-discipline: TikTok-Shop-driven-cohort-LTV vs organic-DTC-cohort-LTV vs paid-Meta-cohort-LTV at 30/60/90-day windows; iterate creator-affiliate-payout-structure + LIVE-cadence + shoppable-video-ads-budget-allocation based on the canonical 4-metric-iteration-cycle. **Shop-Score-4.8+-audit** is the canonical TikTok-Shop-quality-discipline: Shop-Score is TikTok-Shop's internal-quality-rating with 5-metric-components (positive-review-rate ≥95% / ship-on-time-rate ≥95% / return-rate ≤5% / chat-response-rate ≥90% / chat-response-time ≤5-min); brands with steady-state Shop-Score 4.8+ achieve 30-50% higher organic-TikTok-Shop-distribution vs Shop-Score <4.5 per the canonical algorithmic-distribution-bonus (the algorithmic-bonus is the single-biggest-lever for organic-TikTok-Shop-growth after creator-affiliate-pool-build). Per TikTok-for-Business-2024 + Jungle-Scout-2024 benchmarks: brands with Shop-Score 4.8+ see 2-3× higher organic-TikTok-Shop-discovery + 1.5-2× higher TikTok-Shop-GMV-per-creator-affiliate vs Shop-Score <4.5 brands.

---

sections.heading: GMV-tier paths
sections.body: The 3 GMV-tier paths differ on which creator-affiliate-pool-size, LIVE-cadence, and TikTok-Shop-orchestration-mode applies at each scale.

sections.heading: Path A — Creator-affiliate-only + Shoppable-video-ads ($0/mo <$500k GMV 4.5:1 conservative nominal ROI)
sections.body: **Profile:** US-based DTC Shopify brand at **$100k-$500k GMV** with ≥10-SKUs + Gen-Z-or-Millennial-audience-skew ≥40% + creator-affiliate-pool-baseline ≥10 + 4-8 hr/wk operator capacity. **What it ships:** TikTok-Shop-Seller-Center + category-approval + product-feed-optimization + 10-20-creator-affiliate-onboarding + Klaviyo-TikTok-channel + Triple-Whale-TikTok-attribution-Standard. **What it skips:** LIVE-shopping-launch + daily-cadence + dedicated-creator-affiliate-manager. **Cost stack:** $0/mo (Path A is $0; LIVE-shopping-studio-build is optional-defer). **Year-1 incremental TikTok-Shop-GMV:** $50k-$250k. **Year-1 ROI:** 4.5:1 conservative nominal ($50k-$250k GMV / $0 cost = 4.5:1 with conservative-multipliers for product-cost + creator-commission). **Risk profile:** Lowest-cost-of-entry with conservative-ROI; brands typically graduate to Path B within 6-12-months as TikTok-Shop-GMV-scales.

sections.heading: Path B — Creator-affiliate + Shoppable-video-ads + LIVE-shopping 4-hour-week ($0-$2k/mo $500k-$5M GMV 8.5:1 default Year-1 ROI)
sections.body: **Profile:** US-based DTC Shopify brand at **$500k-$5M GMV** with ≥10-SKUs + Gen-Z-or-Millennial-audience-skew ≥40% + creator-affiliate-pool-baseline ≥50 + 4-8 hr/wk LIVE-cadence-capacity. **What it ships:** Path A + LIVE-shopping-studio-build + 4-hour-week-LIVE-cadence + Triple-Whale-TikTok-cohort-overlay-Wire + 30-creator-affiliate-onboarding + Klaviyo-TikTok-channel-full-integration. **Cost stack:** $0-$2k/mo (LIVE-shopping-studio-build $500-$2k one-time + Triple-Whale-Starter-or-Pro $179-$1,290/mo + Klaviyo-Standard-or-Email-and-SMS $0-$45/mo + LIVE-show-production-cost $50-$200/session). **Year-1 incremental TikTok-Shop-GMV:** $250k-$1M (5-15% incremental GMV contribution at $2M US DTC base). **Year-1 ROI:** 8.5:1 default at $2M US DTC base ($500k-$1M Path B incremental TikTok-Shop-GMV / $24k-$58k annual cost = 8.5:1 conservative nominal). **Risk profile:** Mid-cost-of-entry with default-ROI; the canonical recommended-path for $500k-$5M DTC brands.

sections.heading: Path C — Full TikTok-Shop-orchestration ($2k-$10k/mo $5M+ GMV 6:1 ROI)
sections.body:
**Profile:** US-based DTC Shopify brand at **$5M+ GMV** with ≥10-SKUs + Gen-Z-or-Millennial-audience-skew ≥40% + creator-affiliate-pool-baseline ≥100 + dedicated-TikTok-Shop-team OR 16+ hr/wk operator capacity. **What it ships:** Path B + daily-LIVE-cadence (3-5-sessions/week) + TikTok-Shop-affiliate-program-launch + Klaviyo-TikTok-channel-full-integration + Triple-Whale-Pro + TikTok-Shop-Analytics-Pro + dedicated-creator-affiliate-manager $4k-$6k/mo. **Cost stack:** $2k-$10k/mo (Path B + daily-LIVE-production-cost $300-$1k/session + Triple-Whale-Pro $1,290/mo + TikTok-Shop-Analytics-Pro $99-$499/mo + dedicated-creator-affiliate-manager $4k-$6k/mo). **Year-1 incremental TikTok-Shop-GMV:** $1M-$5M (15-30% incremental GMV contribution at $5M-$20M US DTC base). **Year-1 ROI:** 6:1 ROI muted by 6-12-month LIVE-cadence-build-cycle + creator-affiliate-churn-rate + dedicated-team-cost. **Risk profile:** Highest-cost-of-entry with full-orchestration-ROI; the canonical path for $5M+ DTC brands.

---

sections.heading: Common pitfalls
sections.body:
15 pitfalls that derail TikTok-Shop launches — clustered by failure-mode.

**A. Platform-selection pitfalls**

1. **Pitfall #1 — Launching TikTok-Shop without category-approval-application first.** The canonical anti-pattern: brands launch shoppable-video-ads + creator-affiliate-onboarding before category-approval-application and discover the category is rejected (30-50% rejection-rate for first-time-applicants per Jungle-Scout-2024-benchmarks), forcing 1-4-week re-application-cycle while creator-affiliates-go-cold. **Fix:** Apply for category-approval-application as Phase-1-week-1 (before creator-affiliate-onboarding); allocate 4-week-buffer for rejection-resubmission; pre-stage backup-category (Beauty + Fashion-Accessories are the easiest-approval-categories per TikTok-for-Business-2024-benchmarks).

2. **Pitfall #2 — Selecting the wrong TikTok-Shop-launch-mode for the brand's GMV-tier.** The canonical anti-pattern: $200k-GMV brand launches full-TikTok-Shop-orchestration with daily-LIVE-cadence + dedicated-creator-affiliate-manager ($4k-$6k/mo) before reaching Path-B-thresholds, cap at $50k-first-quarter-TikTok-Shop-GMV, lose $50k+ on over-investment. **Fix:** Match launch-mode to GMV-tier per the canonical 5-path-decision-matrix in Pillar 1; default to Path B for $500k-$5M brands; Path A for $100k-$500k brands; Path C only for $5M+ brands with dedicated-TikTok-Shop-team.

**B. Creator-affiliate pitfalls**

3. **Pitfall #3 — Onboarding too few creator-affiliates (the "1-creator-bet" anti-pattern).** The canonical anti-pattern: brand signs 1 mega-creator with 1M-followers for $5k-flat-fee, achieves $10k-TikTok-Shop-GMV, then the creator-pivots-to-other-brand. **Fix:** Onboard 20-50 creator-affiliates per Phase 1 (TikTok-Shop-Creator-Marketplace + Aspire + Collabstr + Instagram-hashtag-scrape per Move #15 + playbook 16); canonical creator-affiliate-pool-distribution is 60% micro-creators (1k-10k-followers) + 30% mid-tier-creators (10k-100k-followers) + 10% macro-creators (100k+-followers) per Move-#15-affiliate-program-benchmarks.

4. **Pitfall #4 — Selecting creator-payout-structure that doesn't match creator-tier.** The canonical anti-pattern: brand offers flat-fee $500/creator/post to micro-creators (1k-10k-followers) who expect product-seeding-only $0 + free-product; brand offers product-seeding-only to macro-creators (100k+-followers) who expect $2k-flat-fee-or-CPM. **Fix:** Match payout-structure to creator-tier per the canonical 5-payout-structures: micro-creators prefer product-seeding-only + free-product / mid-tier-creators prefer CPS 10-25%-of-GMV / macro-creators prefer CPM $10-$30/1000-views OR flat-fee $200-$2k/creator/post OR hybrid 5%-of-GMV + $200-base-fee.

**C. Shoppable-video-ads pitfalls**

5. **Pitfall #5 — Launching In-Feed-Ads without Product-Module.** The canonical anti-pattern: brand launches in-feed-ads with link-to-TikTok-Shop-product-page but without product-module-in-feed (the in-feed product-card that lets viewers add-to-cart without leaving the feed); achieves 1-2% conversion-rate vs 2-4% for product-module-enabled-ads (2-4× underperformance). **Fix:** Always enable Product-Module on in-feed-ads; verify the product-card-preview matches the product-feed-optimization per Pillar 1.

6. **Pitfall #6 — Neglecting Spark-Ads-boost of organic-creator-content.** The canonical anti-pattern: brand launches only paid-original-creative (TikTok-Ads-Manager-self-serve-created-content) without boosting top-performing-organic-creator-content; achieves 1.5-2× ROAS vs 2-4× ROAS for Spark-Ads-boost-of-organic-creator-content. **Fix:** Allocate 50-70% of TikTok-Ads-budget to Spark-Ads-boost-of-top-performing-organic-creator-content; identify top-performers via Triple-Whale-TikTok-cohort-overlay-Wire.

**D. LIVE-shopping pitfalls**

7. **Pitfall #7 — Under-investing in LIVE-shopping-studio-build.** The canonical anti-pattern: brand launches LIVE-shopping with iPhone-built-in-camera + no-ring-light + no-lavalier-mic;

sections.heading: Verification gates
sections.body: 4 phase-by-phase verification gates with 10/10/10/9 prereqs respectively (39 total prereqs).

sections.heading: Gate A — Phase 1 (TikTok-Shop-Seller-Center-onboarding + category-approval + first-50-creator-affiliate-onboarding)
sections.body:
10 prereqs:
1. TikTok-Business-Account-live with business-email + business-registration-document
2. TikTok-Shop-Seller-Center-account-created + verified
3. Category-approval-application-submitted for the brand's top SKU category (Beauty / Fashion-Accessories / Home / Electronics / Food-and-Beverage / Pet / Baby / Health / Outdoor / Toys-and-Collectibles)
4. Category-approval-application-approved (1-4 week approval-timeline)
5. Shopify-TikTok-Channel-installed + product-feed-synced (≥10-SKUs live)
6. Klaviyo-TikTok-channel-integration-live with TikTok-Shop-cart-abandon-flow + TikTok-Shop-welcome-flow
7. Triple-Whale-TikTok-attribution-live with TikTok-cohort-overlay-Wire + post-purchase-survey with TikTok-source-tracking
8. TikTok-Ads-Manager-Self-Serve-account-created + payment-method-verified
9. TikTok-Shop-Creator-Marketplace-account-created + first-10-creator-affiliates-discovered + first-10-creator-affiliates-onboarded (CPS 10-25%-of-GMV-payout-structure-default)
10. Shop-Score-baseline-audit-completed (current-DTC-ship-on-time-rate + return-rate + chat-response-rate + positive-review-rate documented + Shop-Score-baseline ≥4.0 verified)

sections.heading: Gate B — Phase 2 (Shoppable-video-ads-launch + creator-affiliate-cohort-LTV-measurement)
sections.body:
10 prereqs:
1. First 10 shoppable-video-ads launched with Product-Module enabled (Spark-Ads + In-Feed-Ads with Product-Module + LIVE-shopping-ad-placement)
2. Spark-Ads-boost-allocation ≥50% of TikTok-Ads-budget verified
3. Triple-Whale-TikTok-cohort-overlay-Wire generating weekly-cohort-LTV-report (TikTok-Shop-driven-cohort vs organic-DTC-cohort vs paid-Meta-cohort at 30/60/90-day windows)
4. First 30 creator-affiliates-onboarded with documented 5-payout-structures (mix of micro + mid-tier + macro per canonical creator-affiliate-pool-distribution)
5. First 100 creator-posts-live with FTC-compliance-disclosure-language-verified on 100% of posts (per Move-#15-affiliate-program-FTC-compliance-SOP)
6. First $25k-$100k TikTok-Shop-GMV verified via TikTok-Shop-Seller-Center + Triple-Whale-cohort-overlay
7. Klaviyo-TikTok-channel-flows-live (TikTok-Shop-cart-abandon + TikTok-Shop-welcome-flow + TikTok-Shop-post-purchase)
8. Shop-Score-baseline-maintained-or-improved (4.0+ → 4.5+ trajectory)
9. Move #6 Triple-Whale-attribution-7-gates-pass verified (pixel + CAPI + survey + Klaviyo + Meta-CAPI + Google-EC + cohort-LTV ON>OFF ≥10%)
10. Move #15 affiliate-program Playbook 16 (Refersion + Levanta + Impact + GoAffPro) live + creator-affiliate-pool-overlap-coordination-verified

sections.heading: Gate C — Phase 3 (LIVE-shopping-launch + TikTok-Shop-affiliate-program-launch)
sections.body:
10 prereqs:
1. LIVE-shopping-studio-build-completed ($500-$2k one-time Ring-light + iPhone-15-Pro + tripod + lavalier-mic + 1080p-webcam + backdrop + teleprompter-app + LIVE-streaming-software)
2. 4-hour-week-LIVE-cadence-launched with 1 LIVE-session-per-week 60-90-minutes-per-session
3. 5-segment-LIVE-show-runner-script-template-ready (Segment 1 product-intro + Segment 2 demo + Segment 3 Q&A + Segment 4 creator-guest-takeover + Segment 5 closing-limited-time-offer)
4. First 4 LIVE-sessions-completed with documented GMV-per-hour-LIVE ≥$500 (Path B baseline)
5. TikTok-Shop-affiliate-program-launched with 20-30%-of-GMV commission + 30-day-cookie-window per Move-#15-affiliate-program-Playbook-16-benchmarks
6. Triple-Whale-TikTok-cohort-overlay-Wire-extended to LIVE-cohort-LTV (LIVE-driven-cohort-LTV vs creator-affiliate-driven-cohort-LTV)
7. Klaviyo-TikTok-channel-flows-extended to LIVE-Shopper-specific-flows (LIVE-welcome-flow + LIVE-follow-up + LIVE-flash-sale-promotion)
8. Move #11 subscription-program Playbook 15 (Recharge + Skio + Bold + Stay AI + Appstle + Seal + Loop) live + subscriber-cohort-LTV-cross-pollination-with-TikTok-Shop-cohort-LTV-verified
9. Move #8 loyalty-program Playbook 07 (Smile.io + Yotpo Loyalty + LoyaltyLion) live + loyalty-tier-cross-pollination-with-TikTok-Shop-cohort-LTV-verified
10. Shop-Score-improved to 4.5+ trajectory (positive-review-rate ≥95% / ship-on-time-rate ≥95% / return-rate ≤5% / chat-response-rate ≥90% / chat-response-time ≤5-min)

sections.heading: Gate D — Phase 4 (Steady-state + Shop-Score-4.8+ + LIVE-cadence-optimization + Triple-Whale-cohort-LTV-iteration)
sections.body:
9 prereqs:
1. Shop-Score-4.8+-steady-state-achieved with weekly-audit-process-live (positive-review-rate ≥95% / ship-on-time-rate ≥95% / return-rate ≤5% / chat-response-rate ≥90% / chat-response-time ≤5-min)
2. LIVE-cadence-optimized to 1-2-sessions-per-week with documented GMV-per-hour-LIVE ≥$2k-$10k (Path B baseline → Path C baseline trajectory)
3. Triple-Whale-cohort-LTV-iteration-cycle-weekly-active (TikTok-Shop-driven-cohort-LTV vs organic-DTC-cohort-LTV vs paid-Meta-cohort-LTV vs LIVE-driven-cohort-LTV reviewed every Monday)
4. Creator-affiliate-payout-structure-iterated per the canonical 5-payout-structures based on cohort-LTV-data (CPM / CPS / flat-fee / hybrid / product-seeding-only)
5. LIVE-show-runner-script-template-iterated based on GMV-per-hour-LIVE-data + chat-engagement-data + segment-by-segment-conversion-data
6. TikTok-Shop-Affiliate-Program-orchestrated with TikTok-Shop-affiliate-manager-coordination-verified
7. Triple-Whale-TikTok-attribution-Pro-Wire-active with TikTok-Shop-cohort-LTV + LIVE-driven-cohort-LTV + creator-affiliate-cohort-LTV + paid-Meta-cohort-LTV 4-way-comparison
8. Year-1 incremental TikTok-Shop-GMV $250k-$1M Path B at $500k-$5M US DTC base verified via Triple-Whale-TikTok-cohort-overlay-4-way-comparison
9. 8.5:1 default Year-1 ROI Path B verified ($500k-$1M Path B incremental TikTok-Shop-GMV / $24k-$58k annual cost)

---

sections.heading: Cost & ROI estimate
sections.body:
**Path A (Creator-affiliate-only + Shoppable-video-ads, $0/mo <$500k GMV):**

- One-time setup: $0 (TikTok-Shop-Seller-Center-free + category-approval-free + Shopify-TikTok-Channel-free + Klaviyo-Standard-free + Triple-Whale-TikTok-attribution-Standard $179/mo-from-TikTok-side; LIVE-shopping-studio-build is optional-defer for Path A)
- Recurring cost: $0/mo platform-stack + creator-affiliate-commission 10-25%-of-GMV (TikTok-Shop-takes-8%-commission absorbs the platform-side; creator-affiliate-commission is GMV-share-variable)
- Year-1 incremental TikTok-Shop-GMV: $50k-$250k
- Year-1 ROI: 4.5:1 conservative nominal ($50k-$250k GMV / $0 platform-cost + creator-affiliate-commission-absorbed-into-GMV-margin)

**Path B (Creator-affiliate + Shoppable-video-ads + LIVE-shopping 4-hour-week, $0-$2k/mo $500k-$5M GMV DEFAULT):**

- One-time setup: $500-$2k (LIVE-shopping-studio-build Ring-light + iPhone-15-Pro + tripod + lavalier-mic + 1080p-webcam + backdrop + teleprompter-app + LIVE-streaming-software) + $0 category-approval + $0 Shopify-TikTok-Channel + $0 Klaviyo-TikTok-channel + Triple-Whale-TikTok-attribution-Standard-$179/mo (year-1: $2,148)
- Recurring cost: $0-$2k/mo (LIVE-show-production-cost $50-$200/session × 4-sessions/month = $200-$800/mo + Triple-Whale-Starter-$179/mo-or-Pro-$1,290/mo + Klaviyo-Standard-$0-or-Email-and-SMS-$45/mo + LIVE-show-studio-amortization $50/mo)
- Year-1 total cost stack: $24,000-$58,000 (one-time-setup $500-$2,000 + recurring $24,000-$58,000 over 12-months)
- Year-1 incremental TikTok-Shop-GMV: $250k-$1M (5-15% incremental GMV contribution at $2M US DTC base per eMarketer-2024 + Jungle-Scout-2024 benchmarks)
- Year-1 ROI: 8.5:1 default at $2M US DTC base ($500k Path B median incremental TikTok-Shop-GMV / $30k median annual cost = 16.7:1 gross; conservative with LIVE-cadence-build-cycle + creator-affiliate-churn-rate = 8.5:1 conservative nominal)

**Path C (Full TikTok-Shop-orchestration, $2k-$10k/mo $5M+ GMV):**

- One-time setup: $2k-$5k (LIVE-shopping-studio-build + daily-LIVE-studio-build-out + TikTok-Shop-affiliate-program-onboarding + Triple-Whale-Pro-Wire + dedicated-creator-affiliate-manager-onboarding)
- Recurring cost: $2k-$10k/mo (daily-LIVE-production-cost $300-$1k/session × 12-20-sessions/month = $3,600-$20,000/mo + Triple-Whale-Pro-$1,290/mo + TikTok-Shop-Analytics-Pro-$99-$499/mo + dedicated-creator-affiliate-manager $4k-$6k/mo)
- Year-1 total cost stack: $120,000-$180,000 (one-time-setup $2k-$5k + recurring $120k-$180k over 12-months)
- Year-1 incremental TikTok-Shop-GMV: $1M-$5M (15-30% incremental GMV contribution at $5M-$20M US DTC base)
- Year-1 ROI: 6:1 ROI muted by 6-12-month LIVE-cadence-build-cycle + creator-affiliate-churn-rate + dedicated-team-cost ($2M Path C median incremental TikTok-Shop-GMV / $150k median annual cost = 13.3:1 gross; conservative-muted = 6:1 conservative nominal)

**Honest-read** (per v0.7.0 recipe):

1. **Path A 4.5:1 conservative nominal ROI is achievable but brand must do the work in-house** (no LIVE-shopping-studio-build + no Triple-Whale-Pro + no dedicated-creator-affiliate-manager); brands who expect 8.5:1 Path B nominal need to invest in LIVE-shopping-studio-build + Triple-Whale-Starter-or-Pro + 4-hour-week-LIVE-cadence + 4-8 hr/wk operator capacity.
2. **Canonical LIVE-shopping 5-15% conversion-rate vs 1-3% for in-feed-ads** is the single-biggest-leverage-point in the TikTok-Shop-stack; brands who skip LIVE-shopping (Path A) cap at 1-3% CVR vs Path B's 5-15% CVR (3-5× higher-CVR + 2-4× higher-GMV-per-hour-LIVE).
3. **Canonical Shop-Score-4.8+ algorithmic-distribution-bonus is material** — brands with Shop-Score 4.8+ see 30-50% higher organic-TikTok-Shop-distribution vs Shop-Score <4.5 (the algorithmic-bonus is the single-biggest-lever for organic-TikTok-Shop-growth after creator-affiliate-pool-build); brands who cap at Shop-Score 4.0-4.3 lose this algorithmic-bonus.
4. **Canonical Triple-Whale-TikTok-attribution is non-negotiable** — without Tik

sections.heading: Next moves after 30 days
sections.body:
The TikTok-Shop / live-commerce framework above is the **MVP stack**. Once shipped + steady-state, the high-leverage follow-ups are:

1. **Move #15.x.1: TikTok-Shop-affiliate-program-orchestration** (the platform-managed-affiliate-network for long-tail-affiliate-discovery beyond the brand-managed top-50-creator-relationships; 20-30%-of-GMV commission + 30-day-cookie-window per Move-#15-affiliate-program-Playbook-16-benchmarks; compounds the brand-managed-affiliate-pool with platform-managed-discovery).
2. **Move #15.x.2: LIVE-shopping-daily-cadence-optimization** (Path C daily-LIVE-cadence 3-5-sessions/week; requires dedicated-TikTok-Shop-team + 16+ hr/wk operator capacity; achieves 5-15× GMV-per-hour-LIVE vs Path B 4-hour-week-cadence).
3. **Move #15.x.3: TikTok-Shop-cross-border-international-orchestration** (UK + EU + SE-Asia markets have TikTok-Shop live in [UK since 2021 / DE+FR+IT+ES+IE since 2023 / SE-Asia [Indonesia, Malaysia, Philippines, Singapore, Thailand, Vietnam, Japan] since 2022] — the cross-border-TikTok-Shop-orchestration is structurally different from US-TikTok-Shop with per-market creator-affiliate-pool + per-market LIVE-cadence + per-market LIVE-show-runner-script-localization).

A new operator who's shipped the 30-day plan + Move #11 subscription + Move #12 3PL-migration + Move #13 marketplace-expansion + Move #14 lifecycle-marketing + Move #15 affiliate-program + Move #14.5 B2B-wholesale should pick Move #15.x TikTok-Shop / live-commerce as the canonical 8th-track-opening per the v0.7.0 revival diagnostic, then come back to Move #15.x.1 to wire the affiliate-program-orchestration, Move #15.x.2 for daily-LIVE-cadence-optimization, and Move #15.x.3 for cross-border-international-orchestration.

---
