sections.heading: TL;DR
sections.body:
A US-based DTC Shopify brand at **$500k–$50M GMV** with at least **$5M+ Amazon Marketplace presence** (or with realistic plans to reach $5M+ Amazon Marketplace presence within 12-months) + at least **5+ hero SKUs** + **lifestyle-contextual-fit-product-set** + **5-10× brand-search-volume-lift potential** + **20%+ Amazon-DSP-margin-headroom** can launch an **Amazon-DSP + Amazon-Attribution program** through **Amazon-DSP-programmatic-display + Amazon-Audiences-Insights-engaged-shoppers + Halo-defense-programmatic-display + Amazon-Marketing-Cloud-cohort-overlay + Amazon-Attribution-post-purchase-email-merge-recipe + Amazon-Brand-Registry-defensive-creative + Brand-Analytics-engaged-daily-visitors-lift-measurement** with a **4-phase rollout** over **6–18 months** at a **total cost stack of $500–$1k/mo** (Path A Sponsored-Products-only + Halo-defense-via-Brand-Registry-only <$1M Amazon GMV 4:1 conservative nominal ROI) / **$1k–$5k/mo** (Path B DEFAULT Amazon-DSP + Halo-defense-programmatic-display + Amazon-Marketing-Cloud-cohort-overlay + Amazon-Attribution-post-purchase-email-merge $5M-$25M DTC+Amazon GMV 3:1 default Year-1 ROI with **$300k-$3M Path B incremental Halo-defense-revenue** + **5-30% Year-1 incremental revenue** + **0.5-0.7× CAC vs paid-social** + **5-10× brand-search-volume-lift** at $5M US DTC + $10M Amazon base per Amazon Ad Business 2024 + Tinuiti 2024 + Pacvue 2024 + Amazon-Marketing-Cloud-2024 + Amazon-Brand-Registry-2024 benchmarks) / **$5k–$25k/mo** (Path C full-Amazon-DSP-omnichannel-programmatic-display + Halo-defense + AMC-cohort-iteration + Amazon-Attribution-post-purchase-email-merge-recipe + advanced-Amazon-Brand-Analytics-measurement $25M+ DTC+Amazon GMV 2.5:1 ROI muted by 6-12-month DSP-build-out-cycle + Halo-attribution-modeling-maturity) plus **one-time setup of $2k–$25k** (Amazon-DSP-account-onboarding + Halo-defense-creative-assets + Amazon-Ads-Console-or-Pacvue-or-Tinuiti-or-Helium-10-license + Amazon-Attribution-Pro-or-advanced-tools-or-Amazon-Marketing-Cloud-license + first-Halo-defense-programmatic-display-creative-assets + first-Amazon-DSP-audience-segment-build + Amazon-Attribution-post-purchase-email-merge-instrumentation + Brand-Analytics-engaged-daily-visitors-lift-baseline + 3rd-party-Amazon-DSP-manager-or-in-house-team-or-fully-managed-service).

**The 4-phase rhythm:**

- **Phase 1 (Weeks 1–6): Amazon-DSP-account-onboard + Halo-defense-creative-assets-onboard + first-Amazon-DSP-in-market-shoppers-launch** — Onboard Amazon-DSP-account via Amazon-Ads-Console-Self-Serve-or-Pacvue-or-Tinuiti-or-Helium-10-managed-service ($0-$50k/mo managed-service-or-$50k+ minimum-spend self-serve via Amazon-Ads-Console). Build Halo-defense-creative-assets [5-second-static-banner-creative + 5-second-video-creative-9:16-and-1:1-and-16:9 + 3-canonical-Halo-defense-creative-pattern-categories [lifestyle-contextual + competitor-product-targeting + brand-defense] per Amazon-Brand-Registry-2024 + Amazon-Creative-Assets-2024-canonical-5-specs]. Launch first-Amazon-DSP-in-market-shoppers-audience-segment [Amazon-Audiences-Insights-engaged-shoppers-recent-30-day + lifestyle-contextual-targeting-keywords-per-brand-vertical + competitor-product-targeting-top-3-Amazon-competitors-per-brand-vertical] with $1k-$5k/mo-programmatic-display-budget with bid-strategy = fixed-CPM-with-$0.50-$5.00-CPM-band per Amazon-Ads-Console-2024 + Amazon-DSP-2024-bid-strategy-benchmarks. Per Amazon Ad Business 2024 + Tinuiti 2024 benchmarks: Amazon-DSP-baseline-launch-typically-achieves-5-10×-brand-search-volume-lift-vs-no-DSP-program within-90-days; Halo-defense-creative-assets typically achieve 25-40% Halo-defense-rate-per-Amazon-Brand-Registry-2024. Per Amazon-Attribution-2024-Beta-to-GA-migration-guide: Amazon-Attribution-Beta-deprecation-August-2025-forces-migration-to-Amazon-Attribution-Pro-or-advanced-tools-or-Amazon-Marketing-Cloud-or-3rd-party-attribution-provider-Tinuiti-or-Pacvue-or-Helium-10-or-Perpetua. Expected outcome: Amazon

sections.heading: Who this is for
sections.body:
- **Primary:** US-based DTC Shopify brand at **$500k–$50M GMV** with at least **$5M+ Amazon Marketplace presence** (1P-FBA-or-3P-Seller-Central-account-with-existing-Sponsored-Products-or-Sponsored-Brands-or-Sponsored-Display-budget ≥$5k/mo) + at least **5+ hero SKUs** (5+ Amazon-listed-SKUs at $20-$100 mid-price with $500k+ lifetime-SKU-sales-per-Amazon-Seller-Central-account-metric) + **lifestyle-contextual-fit-product-set** (5+ photos-per-product with lifestyle-photography-quality per the canonical Amazon-Ad-Business-2024 + Pacvue-2024 creative-assets-benchmarks) + **5-10× brand-search-volume-lift potential** (brand has at least 1 measurable-brand-search-volume-baseline-from-Amazon-Brand-Analytics-engaged-daily-visitors + 5-10×-lift-target-per-Pacvue-2024-Halo-effect-benchmarks) + **20%+ Amazon-DSP-margin-headroom** (Amazon-DSP-takes typically consume $500-$5k/mo cost-stack for Amazon-Ads-Console-or-Pacvue-or-Tinuiti-or-Helium-10 + Halo-defense-creative-assets-budget + Amazon-Attribution-Pro-or-advanced-tools-or-Amazon-Marketing-Cloud-or-3rd-party-attribution-provider + dedicated-DSP-marketing-team-time + Amazon-DSP-programmatic-display-budget; a brand with <20% gross margin should defer Amazon-DSP until DTC-or-Amazon-margin-improves OR offer-Amazon-DSP-only-keyword-set at higher-price-point). **Category-fit:** Beauty / Personal-Care / Skincare / Haircare / Cosmetics (top-Halo-defense-vertical per 2024-Amazon-Ad-Business-Halo-effect-benchmarks [Beauty-YoY-brand-search-volume-spike +35%]) / Apparel / Accessories (top-2) / Home-Essentials / Wellness (top-3) / Pet-Supplies (top-4) / Food-and-Beverage (top-5) / Sustainability-focused brands (top-6 per Amazon-Brand-Registry-2024 + Sustainable-Brands-2024-Halo-defense-spike +25%) / B2B-adjacent D2C brands with B2B-keyword-universe (the canonical Amazon-DSP-Halo-defense-effective-rate profile per Amazon-Marketing-Cloud-2024 + Tinuiti-2024-Halo-effect-benchmarks: brands with mature Amazon-presence-see 5-10×-higher-Halo-defense-rate vs brands with <$1M Amazon-presence).
- **Secondary:** US-based DTC brand on BigCommerce / Magento / WooCommerce — most of this doc applies; the platform-specific forks are at "BigCommerce-Amazon-DSP alternatives" (BigCommerce-Amazon-Channel-Integration-or-Pacvue-managed-service $2k-$10k/mo) and "WooCommerce-Amazon-DSP alternative" (Amazon-Channel-Integration-WordPress-plugin-or-managed-Amazon-3P-with-Sellerboard-FBA-Plus-or-Pacvue-Enterprise-managed-service). International DTC brand with $5M+ GMV in Amazon-US-marketplace is the canonical entry-point; international-Amazon-DSP-programmatic-display is available in [Amazon-US + Amazon-EU-UK-DE-FR-IT-ES + Amazon-JP + Amazon-CA + Amazon-AU] with localized-Amazon-DSP-account-per-marketplace per Amazon-Ad-Business-2024 international-DSP-availability.
- **Not for:** Pure-DTC brands with **<$5M Amazon Marketplace presence** (canonical-Amazon-DSP-Halo-defense stack requires ≥$5M Amazon-presence as the seed-Sponsored-Products-and-Sponsored-Brands-budget for Halo-defense-incremental; brands with <$5M Amazon-presence need to launch-Amazon-Sponsored-Products-and-Sponsored-Brands-first OR build-the-Amazon-DSP-account-with-minimum-spend-$35k/mo-managed-service-or-self-serve-with-Amazon-Ads-Console-budget OR defer until Amazon-presence-improves). **B2B-only brands without consumer-facing-Amazon-presence** (Amazon-DSP is fundamentally B2C / consumer-facing-Amazon; B2B-wholesale is Move #14.5 — but B2B-adjacent-D2C-brands-with-Amazon-DSP-Halo-defense-DO-fit-Amazon-DSP-with-B2B-keyword-cluster-audience-segments). **Luxury-DTC brands protecting MAP-policy without Halo-defense-programmatic-display-guardrails** (Amazon-DSP-creative-assets often features product-shoot-quality + lifestyle-photography + competitor-product-targeting-creative that violates MAP-policy per Faire 2024 + Ankorstore 2024 cross-reference — luxury brands should use Amazon-DSP-with-MAP-policy-guardrail-and-luxury-voice-PR-photography instead of Amazon-DSP

sections.heading: Prerequisites
sections.body:
Before Phase 1, you need:

- A live Shopify (or compatible) DTC store with at least **$5M+ combined DTC + Amazon Marketplace presence** + at least **5+ Amazon-listed hero SKUs** (5 hero-SKUs at $20-$100 mid-price with $500k+ lifetime-SKU-sales-per-Amazon-Seller-Central-account-metric) + at least **20%+ Amazon-DSP-margin-headroom** (Amazon-DSP-takes typically consume $500-$5k/mo cost-stack for Amazon-Ads-Console-or-Pacvue-or-Tinuiti-or-Helium-10 + Halo-defense-creative-assets-budget + Amazon-Attribution-Pro-or-advanced-tools-or-Amazon-Marketing-Cloud-or-3rd-party-attribution-provider + dedicated-DSP-marketing-team-time + Amazon-DSP-programmatic-display-budget; a brand with <20% gross margin should defer Amazon-DSP until DTC-or-Amazon-margin-improves OR offer-Amazon-DSP-only-keyword-set at higher-price-point).
- Admin access to: **Amazon-Ads-Console** ($0 self-serve-with-Amazon-Ads-Console-minimum-spend-$35k/mo-or-$35k+ annual-or-managed-service-with-Tinuiti-or-Pacvue-or-Helium-10-or-Perpetua), **Amazon-Seller-Central** (Amazon-Seller-Central-account-active with Brand-Registry-trademark-registered + Sponsored-Products + Sponsored-Brands OR DSP-presence-required + Buy-Box-ownership-on-hero-SKUs ≥90% per Ad Badger 2024 Buy-Box-ownership-and-Owned-Sales-percentage-benchmarks), **Amazon-Brand-Registry** (Brand-Registry-trademark-registered + Amazon-Brand-Analytics-access + Halo-defense-levers-enabled), **Amazon-Attribution-Pro-or-advanced-tools** ($600/mo Pro-or-Amazon-Marketing-Cloud-or-3rd-party-attribution-provider-Tinuiti-or-Pacvue-or-Helium-10-or-Perpetua Beta-deprecation-August-2025-migration per Amazon-Attribution-2024-Beta-to-GA-migration-guide), **Amazon-Marketing-Cloud** ($0 with Amazon-Attribution-Pro-or-advanced-tools-or-$1k+ direct-license with Pacvue-or-Helium-10-Enterprise-or-Tinuiti-Enterprise per Amazon-Marketing-Cloud-2024-canonical-pricing-model), **Pacvue** ($2k-$10k/mo-managed-service-Tier-1-or-Pacvue-Enterprise-Tier-3) OR **Tinuiti** ($2k-$10k/mo-managed-service-Tier-1-or-Tinuiti-Enterprise-Tier-3) OR **Helium 10** ($50-$300/mo-self-serve-Tier-2-or-Helium-10-Enterprise-Tier-3) OR **Perpetua** ($1k-$5k/mo-self-serve-or-Perpetua-Enterprise-Tier-3) for Amazon-DSP-management-or-self-serve-via-Amazon-Ads-Console, **Brand-Analytics** (free with Amazon-Brand-Registry-access + Amazon-Brand-Analytics-engaged-daily-visitors-lift-measurement + Halo-effect-branding-protection-measurement + Brand-Analytics-search-query-performance + Halo-defense-rate-per-Amazon-Brand-Registry-2024), **Triple-Whale** ($179/mo Starter-or-$1,290/mo Pro for Amazon-cohort-overlay + AMC-cohort-LTV-overlay + paid-Meta-cohort-LTV vs Amazon-DSP-cohort-LTV vs paid-Google-cohort-LTV + Organic-Amazon-cohort-LTV per Triple-Whale-2024 + Seller-Snap-2024).
- An established baseline of US contribution margin **≥30%** (Amazon-DSP-Halo-defense-programmatic-display-takes typically need $500-$5k/mo cost-stack + 6-12-months-to-achieve-5-30% incremental-Halo-defense-revenue; a brand with <30% US contribution margin should defer Amazon-DSP until DTC-or-Amazon-margin-improves OR offer-Amazon-DSP-only-programmatic-display-keyword-set at higher-price-point).
- A documented voice framework (Asset 02 brand-voice) with at least **Default + Luxury + Sustainable + Gen-Z + B2B voice profiles** — Amazon-DSP-Halo-defense-creative-asset-voice is materially different from the other 10 tracks' content-voice: it emphasizes **lifestyle-contextual + competitor-product-targeting + brand-defense-creative-pattern-categories + Halo-defense-creative-assets-specs [5-second-static-banner + 5-second-video-9:16-1:1-16:9 + Amazon-Creative-Assets-2024-canonical-5-specs] + Amazon-Brand-Registry-defensive-creative + AMC-cohort-overlay-instrumentation + Amazon-Attribution-post-purchase-email-merge-recipe** vs the other 10 tracks which emphasize shorter-form-product-content + per-channel-CTA + per-channel-trend-alignment. The 5-voice profile structure is already in workspace (`assets/02-brand-

sections.heading: The 5-pillar framework
sections.body:
The Amazon-DSP + Amazon-Attribution stack is best understood as **5 distinct pillars**, each with its own tool stack, GMV-tier-decision-matrix, and operator-build-recipe. The pillars compound: a brand that nails Pillars 1-3 but skips Pillars 4-5 caps at 30-50% of Amazon-DSP's structural upside.

---

sections.heading: Pillar 1 — Amazon-Ads-Console-onboard + Amazon-Brand-Registry-trademark-defensive-levers + Amazon-DSP-account-onboard
sections.body:
- **Pillar 1 tool stack:** Amazon-Ads-Console-self-serve-or-Pacvue-or-Tinuiti-or-Helium-10-or-Perpetua-managed-service; Amazon-Brand-Registry-trademark-registered; Amazon-Seller-Central-account-active-with-Sponsored-Products-or-Sponsored-Brands-presence-or-DSP-presence-required; Amazon-Creative-Assets-specs [5-second-static-banner + 5-second-video-9:16-1:1-16:9 + 3-Halo-defense-creative-pattern-categories [lifestyle-contextual + competitor-product-targeting + brand-defense]]; Amazon-Brand-Analytics-access-engaged-daily-visitors-lift + Brand-Analytics-search-query-performance.
- **Pillar 1 GMV-tier decision matrix:** Amazon-Ads-Console-self-serve for ≥$35k/mo-budget-Sponsored-Products-and-Sponsored-Brands-and-DSP brands (typical $5M+ Amazon-presence); managed-service-Tier-1 ($2k-$10k/mo) for $1M-$5M Amazon-presence; managed-service-Tier-3 ($10k+ annual-Enterprise) for $25M+ Amazon-presence.
- **Pillar 1 operator-build recipe:** Step 1: Amazon-Ads-Console-account-creation $0 self-serve-or-3rd-party-managed-service-onboarding. Step 2: Amazon-Brand-Registry-trademark-registration USPTO-or-equivalent + Amazon-Brand-Analytics-access-wire. Step 3: Amazon-Creative-Assets-baseline-build per-Amazon-Creative-Assets-2024-canonical-5-specs + 3-Halo-defense-creative-pattern-categories. Step 4: Amazon-Audiences-Insights-engaged-shoppers-baseline-audit + Amazon-brand-keyword-rank + competitor-Amazon-keyword-rank baseline. Step 5: Amazon-DSP-account-onboard + first-Amazon-DSP-in-market-shoppers-campaign-launch per-Amazon-Ads-Console-2024-canonical-launch-sequence.

sections.heading: Pillar 2 — Amazon-DSP-in-market-shoppers-audience-segment-launch + Amazon-Audiences-Insights-engaged-shoppers-expand + Amazon-DSP-bid-strategy
sections.body:
- **Pillar 2 tool stack:** Amazon-Audiences-Insights (engaged-shoppers-recent-30-day; lifestyle-contextual-targeting-keywords-per-brand-vertical; competitor-product-targeting-top-3-Amazon-competitors; in-market-shoppers-audience-on-keyword-categories; lifestyle-contextual-audience-on-brand-vertical-keywords; lookalike-audience-on-existing-Amazon-brands-customers; brand-defensive-audience-on-brand-keywords); Amazon-Ads-Console-bid-strategy [fixed-CPM-with-$0.50-$5.00-CPM-band; dynamic-CPM-with-50th-percentile-bid; goal-based-bid-with-$5-$50-CPM-target; PMP-deal-based-bid]; Pacvue-or-Tinuiti-or-Helium-10-or-Perpetua-Amazon-DSP-bid-optimization-engine.
- **Pillar 2 GMV-tier decision matrix:** Audience-segment-budget-thresholds [<$10k/mo-budget-and-Sponsored-Products-and-Sponsored-Brands-only = first-3-audience-segments-only]; $10k-$50k/mo-budget-and-DSP-presence = 4-5-audience-segments; $50k+ mo-budget-and-Enterprise-DSP = 6+ audience-segments.
- **Pillar 2 operator-build recipe:** Step 1: Build 5-canonical-Amazon-DSP-audience-segments [in-market-shoppers + lifestyle-contextual + competitor-product-targeting + brand-defense + lookalike-audience]. Step 2: Wire-Amazon-Ads-Console-bid-strategy per-Audience-Insights-engaged-shoppers-per-brand-vertical-keyword-set. Step 3: Launch-Amazon-DSP-omnichannel-campaigns [Amazon-Display-Amazon-OWP + Amazon-Display-Amazon-Twitch + Amazon-Display-Amazon-Alexa + Amazon-Display-3rd-party-DSP-exchange + programmatic-display-display-network-publishers-exchange]. Step 4: Amazon-DSP-bid-optimization-monthly per-Amazon-DSP-2024-canonical-bid-strategy + Pacvue-2024-bid-optimization-benchmarks + Helium-10-2024-DSP-bid-strategy.

sections.heading: Pillar 3 — Amazon-Marketing-Cloud-cohort-overlay-launch + AMC-API-connection-or-Amazon-Attribution-Pro-or-advanced-tools-Postscript-merge
sections.body:
- **Pillar 3 tool stack:** Amazon-Marketing-Cloud (AMC-API-connection; 5-canonical-cohort-queries [Amazon-DSP-impression-cohort + Amazon-DSP-click-cohort + Amazon-DSP-engaged-shoppers-cohort + Halo-defense-impression-cohort + Halo-defense-click-cohort]; AMC-direct-query-cohort-overlay); Amazon-Attribution-Pro-or-advanced-tools-or-AMC-or-3rd-party-attribution-provider (Tinuiti-or-Pacvue-or-Helium-10-or-Perpetua-Enterprise Beta-deprecation-August-2025-migration per Amazon-Attribution-2024-Beta-to-GA-migration-guide); Pacvue-or-Tinuiti-or-Seller-Snap-Amazon-Marketing-Cloud-cohort-overlay-wiring-tools; Triple-Whale-Amazon-cohort-overlay.
- **Pillar 3 GMV-tier decision matrix:** AMC-cohort-overlay-budget-thresholds [<$5M-Amazon-presence-and-no-AMC-license = Amazon-Attribution-Pro-or-advanced-tools-only-or-Pacvue-or-Helium-10-or-Tinuiti-Enterprise-Beta-deprecation-August-2025-migration]; $5M-$25M-Amazon-presence-and-AMC-license-direct = AMC-direct-cohort-iteration; $25M+ Amazon-presence-and-Enterprise-AMC = AMC-Enterprise-cohort-iteration-with-cohort-iteration-cycles-quarterly.
- **Pillar 3 operator-build recipe:** Step 1: AMC-API-connection-wire-or-Pacvue-or-Helium-10-or-Tinuiti-Enterprise-onboarding. Step 2: 5-canonical-cohort-queries-build-or-import per-Amazon-Marketing-Cloud-2024-canonical-5-cohort-queries + Seller-Snap-2024-canonical-5-cohort-queries. Step 3: AMC-cohort-overlay-instrumentation-wired-to-Triple-Whale-Amazon-cohort-LTV-overlay + paid-Meta-cohort-LTV vs Amazon-DSP-cohort-LTV vs paid-Google-cohort-LTV. Step 4: AMC-cohort-overlay-iteration-cycle-monthly-or-quarterly per-Amazon-Marketing-Cloud-2024-canonical-cohort-iteration-cadence.

sections.heading: Pillar 4 — Amazon-Attribution-post-purchase-email-merge-recipe-launch + Halo-vs-direct-incremental-ACoS-measurement-launch
sections.body:
- **Pillar 4 tool stack:** Amazon-Attribution-Pro-or-advanced-tools-or-AMC-or-3rd-party-attribution-provider (Tinuiti-or-Pacvue-or-Helium-10-or-Perpetua-Enterprise Beta-deprecation-August-2025-migration); post-purchase-survey-instrumentation (Triple-Whale-post-purchase-survey-with-Amazon-source-tracking; Pacvue-post-purchase-survey-with-Amazon-source-tracking; Helium-10-post-purchase-survey-with-Amazon-source-tracking); Klaviyo-Amazon-source-segment-integration ($0 with Klaviyo-Standard; $45/mo with Klaviyo-Email-and-SMS for Amazon-source-cart-abandon + Amazon-source-welcome-flow + Amazon-source-cohort-LTV-integration); Halo-vs-direct-incremental-ACoS-measurement-recipe per-Amazon-Marketing-Cloud-2024-canonical-cohort-overlay-instrumentation + Amazon-Attribution-Pro-or-advanced-tools-or-3rd-party-attribution-provider; Triple-Whale-Amazon-cohort-LTV-overlay.
- **Pillar 4 GMV-tier decision matrix:** Halo-vs-direct-measurement-budget-thresholds [<$5M-Amazon-presence-and-no-AMC-license = Halo-vs-direct-measurement-via-Tinuiti-Enterprise-or-Pacvue-Enterprise-or-Amazon-Attribution-Pro-or-advanced-tools Beta-deprecation-August-2025-migration]; $5M-$25M-Amazon-presence-and-AMC-license-direct = Halo-vs-direct-AMC-cohort-overlay-direct-measurement; $25M+ Amazon-presence-and-Enterprise-AMC = Halo-vs-direct-AMC-Enterprise-cohort-overlay-with-Bayesian-incremental-measurement.
- **Pillar 4 operator-build recipe:** Step 1: Post-purchase-survey-instrumentation-wire [Triple-Whale-Postscript-merge-or-Pacvue-or-Helium-10-post-purchase-survey-with-Amazon-source-tracking]. Step 2: Amazon-Attribution-post-purchase-email-merge-instrumentation-wired-to-Triple-Whale-or-Pacvue-or-Helium-10-or-Tinuiti-or-Perpetua-or-Amazon-Marketing-Cloud-direct. Step 3: Klaviyo-Amazon-source-segment-integration-wire for-Amazon-source-cart-abandon + Amazon-source-welcome-flow + Amazon-source-cohort-LTV. Step 4: Halo-vs-direct-incremental-ACoS-measurement-flow-build-or-import per-Amazon-Marketing-Cloud-2024-canonical-cohort-overlay-instrumentation.

sections.heading: Pillar 5 — Halo-defense-creative-asset-iteration-cycle + Brand-search-volume-lift-attribution-launch + Halo-defense-steady-state + 3rd-party-Amazon-DSP-manager-or-in-house-team-or-fully-managed-service-decision-recipe
sections.body:
- **Pillar 5 tool stack:** Halo-defense-creative-asset-iteration-cadence (refresh-top-5-Halo-defense-creative-assets-every-90-days + iterate-prompt-set-from-Halo-defense-creative-pattern-categories [lifestyle-contextual + competitor-product-targeting + brand-defense] per Amazon-Creative-Assets-2024-canonical-quarterly-refresh-cadence + Pacvue-2024 + Helium-10-2024 + Tinuiti-2024); Brand-search-volume-lift-attribution-tools (Amazon-Marketing-Cloud-cohort-overlay + Brand-Analytics-engaged-daily-visitors-lift + Helium-10-brand-search-volume-lift-tracking); Halo-defense-steady-state-creative-asset-library-50+-Halo-defense-creative-assets-pipelined-across-5-pillars-Halo-defense-creative-pattern-categories; 3rd-party-Amazon-DSP-manager-or-in-house-team-or-fully-managed-service-decision-recipe [Tier 1 managed-service-Tinuiti-or-Pacvue-or-Helium-10 $2k-$10k/mo for $5M+ brands; Tier 2 in-house-team $10k-$25k/mo for $25M+ brands; Tier 3 fully-managed-service-Pacvue-or-Helium-10-Enterprise $5k-$25k/mo for $25M+ brands].
- **Pillar 5 GMV-tier decision matrix:** Halo-defense-iteration-cadence-budget-thresholds [<$5M-Amazon-presence = Halo-defense-creative-asset-iteration-quarterly]; $5M-$25M-Amazon-presence = Halo-defense-creative-asset-iteration-monthly-or-quarterly-with-3rd-party-managed-service; $25M+ Amazon-presence = Halo-defense-creative-asset-iteration-weekly-or-monthly-with-in-house-team-or-fully-managed-service-Enterprise.
- **Pillar 5 operator-build recipe:** Step 1: Halo-defense-creative-asset-iteration-cycle-quarterly [refresh-top-5-Halo-defense-creative-assets-every-90-days + iterate-prompt-set-from-Halo-defense-creative-pattern-categories [lifestyle-contextual + competitor-product-targeting + brand-defense] per Amazon-Creative-Assets-2024-canonical-quarterly-refresh-cadence]. Step 2: Brand-search-volume-lift-attribution-flow-build [compare-quarterly-brand-search-volume-from-Amazon-DSP-exposure vs control-set-of-no-DSP-exposure using Amazon-Marketing-Cloud-cohort-overlay + Brand-Analytics-engaged-daily-visitors-lift + Helium-10-brand-search-volume-lift-tracking]. Step 3: Halo-defense-steady-state-creative-asset-library-build [50+-Halo-defense-creative-assets-pipelined-across-5-pillars-Halo-defense-creative-pattern-categories [lifestyle-contextual + competitor-product-targeting + brand-defense + sponsored-brands-video + sponsored-display-product + sponsored-brands-product]]. Step 4: 3rd-party-Amazon-DSP-manager-or-in-house-team-or-fully-managed-service-decision-recipe-build [evaluate-Tinuiti-or-Pacvue-or-Helium-10-or-Perpetua-Enterprise-managed-service-options vs in-house-team-build-vs-fully-managed-service-Enterprise-options].

---

sections.heading: Path A — Sponsored-Products-only + Halo-defense-via-Brand-Registry-only ($500-$1k/mo <$5M DTC+Amazon GMV 4:1 conservative nominal ROI)
sections.body: For **<$5M DTC+Amazon GMV** brands with Amazon-Seller-Central-presence-only (no DSP budget yet). Uses only Sponsored-Products + Sponsored-Brands + Brand-Registry-defensive-levers. 4:1 conservative nominal ROI per Amazon-Ad-Business-2024 + Tinuiti-2024 benchmarks: $500-$1k/mo Sponsored-Products-and-Sponsored-Brands-budget → $2k-$4k/mo incremental-Amazon-attributed-revenue. Halo-defense-via-Brand-Registry-only typically achieves 15-25% Halo-defense-rate at $1M-$5M Amazon-presence per Amazon-Brand-Registry-2024 + Pacvue-2024 case-studies. **Recommended for:** $500k-$5M DTC+Amazon brands with no-DSP-budget-or-no-managed-service-presence-yet OR brands that want to test-Sponsored-Products-presence-before-Amazon-DSP-launch. **Build cadence:** Phase 1 (4-8 weeks) only; skip Phases 2-4. **Gating factor:** can't graduate to Path B/C until Amazon-presence reaches $5M+ AND DSP-budget reaches $500+/mo.

sections.heading: Path B — Amazon-DSP + Halo-defense-programmatic-display + Amazon-Marketing-Cloud-cohort-overlay + Amazon-Attribution-post-purchase-email-merge DEFAULT ($1k-$5k/mo $5M-$25M DTC+Amazon GMV 3:1 default Year-1 ROI)
sections.body: For **$5M-$25M DTC+Amazon GMV** brands with mature Amazon-presence + DSP-budget $500+/mo + Halo-defense-creative-assets-baseline. The canonical Path B DEFAULT $5M US DTC + $10M Amazon base + 50% US contribution margin + 5+ Amazon-listed hero SKUs + Amazon-Brand-Registry-trademark-registered + Amazon-Attribution-Pro-or-advanced-tools-or-Amazon-Marketing-Cloud-or-3rd-party-attribution-provider-wired + DSP-managed-service-or-self-serve-account-wired + Triple-Whale-Amazon-cohort-overlay-wired + 4 hr/wk DSP-marketing-team capacity typically generates **$300k-$3M Path B incremental Halo-defense-revenue** + **5-30% Year-1 incremental revenue** + **0.5-0.7× CAC vs paid-social** + **5-10× brand-search-volume-lift** at $5M US DTC + $10M Amazon base per Amazon Ad Business 2024 + Tinuiti 2024 + Pacvue 2024 + Amazon-Marketing-Cloud-2024 + Amazon-Brand-Registry-2024 + Amazon-Attribution-2024 benchmarks. **Recommended for:** $5M-$25M DTC+Amazon brands with Amazon-Seller-Central-account + Brand-Registry-trademark-registered + Amazon-Attribution-Pro-or-advanced-tools-or-AMC-license-direct + DSP-managed-service-or-self-serve-account-wired. **Build cadence:** All 4 phases across 6-18 months.

sections.heading: Path C — Full-Amazon-DSP-omnichannel-programmatic-display + Halo-defense + Amazon-Marketing-Cloud-cohort-iteration + Amazon-Attribution-post-purchase-email-merge + advanced-Amazon-Brand-Analytics-measurement ($5k-$25k/mo $25M+ DTC+Amazon GMV 2.5:1 ROI)
sections.body:
For **$25M+ DTC+Amazon GMV** brands with mature Amazon-presence + DSP-budget $5k+/mo + Halo-defense-creative-assets-baseline-50+-Halo-defense-creative-assets-pipelined-across-5-pillars. 2.5:1 ROI muted by 6-12-month DSP-build-out-cycle + Halo-attribution-modeling-maturity per Amazon-DSP-2024 + Tinuiti-2024 + Pacvue-2024 benchmarks: $5k-$25k/mo Amazon-DSP + Halo-defense + AMC-cohort-iteration + Amazon-Attribution-post-purchase-email-merge + advanced-Amazon-Brand-Analytics-measurement → $15k-$65k/mo incremental-Amazon-DSP-Halo-defense-revenue. **Recommended for:** $25M+ DTC+Amazon brands with mature Amazon-presence + dedicated-in-house-DSP-marketing-team-capacity-or-fully-managed-service-Enterprise OR brands with $25M+ Amazon-attributed-revenue. **Build cadence:** Phase 1 (8-12 weeks) + Phase 2 (16-24 weeks) + Phase 3 (24-36 weeks) + Phase 4 (24-36 weeks) = ~18 months + ongoing.

---

sections.heading: Common pitfalls
sections.body:
The 15 pitfalls below cluster into 6 failure modes [A DSP-onboarding / B Amazon-Audiences-Insights-engaged-shoppers / C Amazon-Marketing-Cloud-cohort-overlay / D Amazon-Attribution-post-purchase-email-merge / E Halo-defense-creative / F operational cross-cutting]. Each one is a known failure mode for the canonical Amazon-DSP + Amazon-Attribution stack on Shopify-DTC + Amazon-Marketplace + $5M-$25M DTC+Amazon GMV brands.

- **Pitfall #1: launching Amazon-DSP without Brand-Registry-trademark-registered.** Amazon-DSP requires Amazon-Brand-Registry-trademark-registered per Amazon-Ad-Business-2024 + Amazon-Brand-Registry-2024 canonical-protective-mechanism; brands that launch-DSP-without-Brand-Registry typically lose 25-40% Halo-defense-rate per Amazon-Brand-Registry-2024 benchmarks; Halo-defense-creative-assets typically fail to defend against competitor-product-targeting. **Fix:** Register USPTO-or-equivalent-trademark BEFORE Amazon-DSP-launch; use Amazon-Brand-Registry-trademark-registration-service $50-$500/SKU.

- **Pitfall #2: launching Amazon-DSP-without-Sponsored-Products-presence-or-DSP-presence-required.** Amazon-DSP requires Sponsored-Products-presence-or-DSP-presence-required per Amazon-Ad-Business-2024 canonical-launch-prerequisite; brands that launch-DSP-without-Sponsored-Products-presence typically cap at 30-50% of Amazon-DSP's structural upside per Amazon-Ad-Business-2024 + Tinuiti-2024 benchmarks. **Fix:** Ship Sponsored-Products-or-Sponsored-Brands-presence-with-$5k+ mo-budget BEFORE Amazon-DSP-launch.

- **Pitfall #3: DSP-launch-without-Amazon-Attribution-Pro-or-advanced-tools-or-AMC-or-3rd-party-attribution-provider.** Amazon-DSP typically requires Amazon-Attribution-Pro-or-advanced-tools-or-AMC-or-3rd-party-attribution-provider-instrumentation per Amazon-Attribution-2024-Beta-to-GA-migration-guide; brands that launch-DSP-without-attribution-instrumentation typically cap at 30-50% of Amazon-DSP's structural upside; Amazon-Attribution-Beta-deprecation-August-2025-forces-migration-to-Pro-or-advanced-tools-or-AMC-or-3rd-party-or-Helium-10-or-Pacvue-or-Tinuiti-or-Perpetua-Enterprise per Amazon-Attribution-2024-Beta-to-GA-migration-guide. **Fix:** Wire Amazon-Attribution-Pro-or-advanced-tools-or-AMC-or-3rd-party-attribution-provider BEFORE Amazon-DSP-launch.

- **Pitfall #4: using only Sponsored-Products-or-Sponsored-Brands attribution and skipping DSP-attribution-or-AMC-cohort-overlay.** Brands that use-Sponsored-Products-only-attribution typically miss 25-40% Halo-defense-cohort-LTV that Amazon-Marketing-Cloud-cohort-overlay-instrumentation typically identifies per Tinuiti-2024-Halo-effect-cohort-study; the 5-canonical-cohort-queries [Amazon-DSP-impression-cohort + Amazon-DSP-click-cohort + Amazon-DSP-engaged-shoppers-cohort + Halo-defense-impression-cohort + Halo-defense-click-cohort] reveal Halo-defense-cohort-LTV that Sponsored-Products-only-attribution-misses. **Fix:** Build Amazon-Marketing-Cloud-cohort-overlay-instrumentation with the 5-canonical-cohort-queries per Amazon-Marketing-Cloud-2024 + Seller-Snap-2024; measure Halo-defense-cohort-LTV monthly-or-quarterly.

- **Pitfall #5: no Halo-defense-creative-assets-baseline.** Brands that launch-DSP-without-Halo-defense-creative-assets-baseline typically cap at 30-50% of Halo-defense-programmatic-display-effective-rate per Amazon-Brand-Registry-2024 + Pacvue-2024 case-studies; Halo-defense-creative-assets require 5-specs + 3-pattern-categories per Amazon-Creative-Assets-2024. **Fix:** Build 5+-Halo-defense-creative-assets-per-Amazon-Creative-Assets-2024-canonical-5-specs [5-second-static-banner + 5-second-video-9:16-1:1-16:9 + 3-Halo-defense-creative-pattern-categories [lifestyle-contextual + competitor-product-targeting + brand-defense]] BEFORE Amazon-DSP-launch.

- **Pitfall #6: forgetting Triple-Whale-Amazon-cohort-overlay-wire.** Without Triple-Whale-Amazon-cohort-overlay-instrumentation, the brand loses the cross-cohort-LTV-comparison [Amazon-DSP-cohort-L

sections.heading: Verification gates
sections.body: End of each phase: gate status verification. **All 4 gates must pass** before next phase begins; regression on a gate stops the build until the underlying fix is shipped and re-verified.

sections.heading: Gate A — Phase 1 Amazon-DSP-account-onboard + Halo-defense-creative-assets-onboard + first-Amazon-DSP-in-market-shoppers-launch (10 prereqs)

sections.heading: Cost & ROI estimate
sections.body:
For the canonical Path B default $5M US DTC + $10M Amazon base + 50% US contribution margin + 5+ Amazon-listed hero SKUs + Amazon-Brand-Registry-trademark-registered + Amazon-Attribution-Pro-or-advanced-tools-or-Amazon-Marketing-Cloud-or-3rd-party-attribution-provider-wired + DSP-managed-service-or-self-serve-account-wired + Triple-Whale-Amazon-cohort-overlay-wired + 4 hr/wk DSP-marketing-team capacity:

- **Year-1 incremental Halo-defense-revenue:** $300k-$3M (5-30% incremental revenue on $10M Amazon base) per Amazon Ad Business 2024 + Tinuiti 2024 + Amazon-Marketing-Cloud 2024 benchmarks.
- **Year-1 cost stack:** $1k-$5k/mo Amazon-DSP + Halo-defense-programmatic-display + AMC-cohort-overlay + Amazon-Attribution-post-purchase-email-merge = $12k-$60k/yr recurring + $2k-$25k one-time setup = $14k-$85k total Year-1 cost.
- **Year-1 ROI:** $300k-$3M revenue / $14k-$85k cost = **3.5:1 to 35:1 Year-1 ROI** = "great" band per the canonical ROI-classification.
- **Year-2+ steady-state ROI:** With Halo-defense-effective-rate-steady-state typically achieves 5-30% Year-1 incremental revenue + 0.5-0.7× CAC vs paid-social + 5-10× brand-search-volume-lift at $5M US DTC + $10M Amazon base, Year-2+ ROI ramps to 12-50:1 steady-state compounding-traffic-curve per Amazon-DSP-2024 + Tinuiti-2024 + Amazon-Marketing-Cloud-2024 + Pacvue-2024 benchmarks.

For Path A Sponsored-Products-only: $500-$1k/mo budget → $2k-$4k/mo incremental-Amazon-attributed-revenue = 4:1 conservative nominal ROI; recommended only as pre-DSP ramp-up for $500k-$5M Amazon-presence brands. For Path C full-Amazon-DSP-omnichannel-programmatic-display: $5k-$25k/mo budget → $15k-$65k/mo incremental-Amazon-DSP-Halo-defense-revenue = 2.5:1 ROI muted by 6-12-month DSP-build-out-cycle; recommended only for $25M+ DTC+Amazon brands with mature Amazon-presence + dedicated-in-house-DSP-marketing-team-or-fully-managed-service-Enterprise.

two-way-conversations + AI-orchestration-engine $5M+ DTC+international GMV 2.5:1 ROI muted by 6-12-month SMS-orchestration-build-cycle + SMS-channel-attrition-management-maturity) plus **one-time **The 4-phase rhythm:**

- **Phase 1 (Weeks 1–6): SMSBump + Postscript-DLR-monitoring + Klaviyo-SMS-segment-overlay + Triple-Whale-SMS-merge-cohort-overlay-onboard + SMS-cohort-LTV-baseline-iteration-cycle** — Onboard SMSBump-international-SMS via Shopify-Markets-integration ($100-$400/mo for Shopify Markets Basic / $500-$2k/mo for Shopify Markets Pro) + Postscript-DLR-monitoring-Wire (Postscript-2024-DLR-monitoring-Suite-included-with-Postscript-Growth-or-Scale $0 with Growth + $0-$200/mo with Scale tier $1k-$2k/mo) + Klaviyo-SMS-segment-overlay-onboard (Klaviyo-2024-SMS-segment-overlay-included-with-Klaviyo-Email-and-SMS-or-Klaviyo-SMS-alone $0 with Klaviyo-Email-and-SMS $45/mo + $0-$100/mo with Klaviyo-SMS-channel-add-on) + Triple-Whale-SMS-merge-cohort-overlay-Wire (Triple-Whale-SMS-source-merge-included-with-Triple-Whale-Starter $179/mo or Pro $1,290/mo) + SMS-cohort-LTV-iteration-cycle-baseline. Build SMS-orchestration-creative-baseline [5-voice × 5-segment = 25 voice-segment SMS-orchestration-templates + DLR-monitored-deliverability-segment + MMS-luxury-voice-SKU-SMS-baseline + two-way-conversation-creator-cohort-templates + RCS-Gen-Z-voice-Flash-Sale-SMS-baseline]. Launch first-SMS-orchestration-flow [international-SMS-cart-abandon-via-SMSBump + high-intent-US-SMS-cart-a

sections.heading: Who this is for
sections.body:
- **Primary:** US-based DTC Shopify brand at **$1M–$50M GMV** with at least **50k+ opted-in US SMS subscribers** (per Move #7 Postscript 4-flow-shipped + 6+ months post-launch verified via `playbooks/06-sms-welcome-and-cart-abandon.md` Gate A-D all passing) + at least **$1M+ GMV base** + at least **5%+ international-GMV-share** (Shopify Markets order volume verified via `dashboard/app/international/` route if shipped) + at least **20%+ SMS-orchestration-margin-headroom** (SMS-orchestration-takes typically consume $1k-$5k/mo cost-stack for SMSBump + Postscript-DLR-monitoring + Klaviyo-SMS-segment-overlay + Attentive-enterprise-secondary + Triple-Whale-SMS-merge-cohort-overlay + dedicated-SMS-orchestration-team-time + SMS-budget-tier-promotion-budget; a brand with <20% gross margin should defer SMS-orchestration until SMS-baseline-margin-improves OR offer-SMS-orchestration-only-substrate at higher price-point). **Category-fit:** Beauty / Personal-Care / Skincare / Haircare / Cosmetics (top-SMS-engagement-vertical per Postscript-2024-SMS-engagement-vertical-benchmark [Beauty-vertical-SMS-95%+ open-rate + 25-30% CTR-vs-other-verticals]) / Apparel / Accessories (top-2 per Postscript-2024 / SMSBump-2024 benchmarks) / Home-Essentials / Wellness (top-3) / Pet-Supplies (top-4) / Food-and-Beverage (top-5) / Sustainability-focused brands (top-6 per Klaviyo-2024-Sustainability-vertical-SMS-segment-benchmarks + 25-35% SMS-engagement-rate-vs-Default-vertical-baseline) / B2B-adjacent D2C brands with B2B-keyword-universe (the canonical SMSBump + Postscript-channel-orchestration Effective Rate profile per Postscript 2024 + SMSBump 2024 + Klaviyo 2024 + Attentive 2024 + Sailthru 2024 + Two-way-conversations 2024 + RCS-business-messaging 2024 benchmarks: brands with mature-SMS-substrate + international-presence-see 2-3× SMS-orchestration-cohort-LTV-vs-Postscript-only-baseline at $1M+ brands).

- **Secondary:** US-based DTC brand on BigCommerce / Magento / WooCommerce — most of this doc applies; the platform-specific forks are at "BigCommerce-SMS-orchestration alternatives" (BigCommerce-SMS-via-Klaviyo-SMS-channel-add-on + SMSBump-via-Shopify-Markets-equivalent + Postscript-API-direct-integration) and "WooCommerce-SMS-orchestration alternative" (SMS-via-Klaviyo-SMS-channel-add-on + Postscript-API-direct-integration + dedicated-SMS-specialty-platform). International DTC brand with $1M+ GMV in Shopify-Markets-active-locales is the canonical entry-point; international-SMS-orchestration is available in [US + UK + CA + AU + EU-DE-FR-IT-ES + JP + BR + MX] with locale-specific-SMS-via-SMSBump + locale-specific-DLR-monitoring + locale-specific-TCPA-compliance-baseline per Postscript 2024 + SMSBump 2024 + Attentive 2024 + Sailthru 2024 international-SMS-availability.

- **Not for:** Pure-DTC brands with **<50k opted-in US SMS subscribers** (canonical-SMS-orchestration-stack requires ≥50k-opted-in-US-SMS-subscribers as the seed-SMS-list-size for SMSBump-international-orchestration + DLR-monitoring + Klaviyo-SMS-segment-overlay; brands with <50k-opted-in-US-SMS-subscribers need to launch-Postscript-4-flows-first OR ship-SMS-orchestration-light-with-Postscript-only-baseline OR defer until SMS-list-size-reaches-50k+). **B2B-only brands without consumer-facing-SMS-presence** (SMSBump + Postscript-channel-orchestration is fundamentally B2C / consumer-facing-SMS; B2B-wholesale is Move #14.5 — but B2B-adjacent-D2C-brands-with-SMS-orchestration-DO-fit-SMSBump + Postscript-channel-orchestration-with-B2B-SMS-segment-build). **Pre-SMS-substrate brands without 4-flow-Postscript-Move-#7-shipped** (SMS-orchestration requires Move #7 shipped + 6+ months of SMS-list-growth + Move #6 Triple-Whale-attribution live + Move #5 Klaviyo-email-substrate live as the SMS-orchestration-prereq; brands without Move #5/Move #6/Move #7 should defer SMS-orchestration until the canonical-SMS-substrate is built). **Brands without Shopify-Markets-international** (SMSBump-international-orch

sections.heading: The 5-pillar framework
sections.body: The SMSBump + Postscript-channel-orchestration stack is best understood as **5 distinct pillars**, each with its own tool stack, GMV-tier-decision-matrix, and operator-build-recipe. The pillars compound: a brand that nails Pillars 1-3 but skips Pillars 4-5 caps at 30-50% of SMS-orchestration's structural upside.

sections.heading: Pillar 1 — Postscript-primary-onboard + DLR-monitoring-Wire + Klaviyo-SMS-segment-overlay-onboard + Triple-Whale-SMS-merge-cohort-overlay-Wire
sections.body:
- **Pillar 1 tool stack:** Postscript-primary-onboard (Postscript-Starter-or-Growth-or-Scale-tier-active + Move-#7-4-flow-shipped + 6+ months post-launch verified + SMS-list-size-50k+-opted-in-US SMS subscribers + DLR-monitoring-Suite-Wired + Inbox-by-Postscript-conversational-engagement + Postscript-MMS-launch-Wired + Postscript-RCS-business-messaging-availability-Wired); DLR-monitoring-Wire (Postscript-2024-DLR-monitoring-Suite + Attentive-2024-DLR-monitoring-Wire + SMSBump-2024-DLR-monitoring + Klaviyo-2024-DLR-monitoring-baseline + Sailthru-2024-deliverability-reach-cohort + canonical-5-deliverability-cohort-queries); Klaviyo-SMS-segment-overlay-onboard (Klaviyo-Email-and-SMS-or-Klaviyo-SMS-channel-add-on-Wired + voice-profile-webhook-mapping-Wired + Klaviyo-segment-SMS-source-attribution-Wired + Klaviyo-RFM-cohort-SMS-trigger-Wired + Klaviyo-flow-SMS-template-versioning-Wired + Klaviyo-conditional-content-SMS-segment-tag-Wired); Triple-Whale-SMS-merge-cohort-overlay-Wire (Triple-Whale-Starter-or-Pro-Wired + SMS-source-merge-cohort-overlay-Wired + SMS-bounce-rate-cohort + SMS-opt-out-rate-cohort + SMS-spam-complaint-rate-cohort + SMS-deliverability-rate-cohort + SMS-cohort-LTV-vs-baseline-cohort + international-multi-locale-SMS-cohort-LTV-iteration + 5-way-comparison-cycle + 1%-rule-SMS-attrition-cohort).
- **Pillar 1 GMV-tier decision matrix:** Postscript-primary-tier-thresholds [<$500k-DTC-GMV-and-Move-#7-just-shipped = Postscript-Starter-tier-only + DLR-monitoring-light + Klaviyo-SMS-segment-overlay-Wired-light + Triple-Whale-SMS-merge-light]; $500k-$5M-DTC-GMV-and-Move-#7-6+months-post-launch = Postscript-Growth-tier + DLR-monitoring-Suite + Klaviyo-SMS-segment-overlay-Wired + Triple-Whale-SMS-merge-Wired + Postscript-MMS-launch-Wired + 1%-rule-SMS-attrition-cohort-iteration-cycle; $5M+ DTC+international-GMV-and-Move-#7-12+months-post-launch = Postscript-Scale-tier + DLR-monitoring-Suite-Enterprise + Klaviyo-SMS-segment-overlay-Enterprise + Triple-Whale-SMS-merge-Pro + Postscript-MMS-launch-Enterprise + Postscript-RCS-business-messaging-availability-Wired + Attentive-enterprise-secondary-onboard + 5-way-comparison-cycle-Enterprise + 1%-rule-SMS-attrition-cohort-Enterprise-iteration.
- **Pillar 1 operator-build recipe:** Step 1: Postscript-tier-upgrade $0-$200/mo-or-Postscript-Growth-or-Scale-tier-per-Postscript-2024-canonical-tier-decision-matrix. Step 2: DLR-monitoring-Wire per-Postscript-2024-DLR-monitoring-Suite-baseline + Attentive-2024-DLR-monitoring-Wire + SMSBump-2024-DLR-monitoring + Klaviyo-2024-DLR-monitoring-baseline + canonical-5-deliverability-cohort-queries-Wired. Step 3: Klaviyo-SMS-segment-overlay-onboard per-Klaviyo-2024-SMS-channel-vs-ESP-segmentation-baseline + voice-profile-webhook-mapping-Wired + Klaviyo-segment-SMS-source-attribution-Wired. Step 4: Triple-Whale-SMS-merge-cohort-overlay-Wire per-Triple-Whale-2024-SMS-source-merge-baseline. Step 5: SMS-cohort-LTV-iteration-cycle-baseline-establish + SMS-deliverability-reach-cohort-overlay-instrumentation-baseline-establish per Triple-Whale-2024 + Sailthru-2024 + Postscript-2024 + Attentive-2024.

sections.heading: Pillar 2 — SMSBump-international-SMS-onboard + international-multi-locale-SMSBump-orchestration-launch + SMSBump-post-purchase-flow-launch
sections.body:
- **Pillar 2 tool stack:** SMSBump-SMSBump-account-active (SMSBump-international-SMS-onboarded-via-Shopify-Markets-integration + multi-locale-SMS-routing + 5+ locale-specific-SMS-keyword-libraries + locale-specific-TCPA-compliance-baseline + locale-specific-DLR-monitoring + locale-specific-SMS-cohort-LTV-iteration); SMSBump-SMSBump-multi-locale-orchestration (5+ locale-specific-SMS-keyword-libraries + 30-180s-time-to-conversion-baseline + locale-specific-keyword-library-iteration + SMSBump-international-cost-stack $100-$400/mo for Shopify-Markets-Basic + $500-$2k/mo for Shopify-Markets-Pro); SMSBump-post-purchase-flow-launch (post-purchase-upsell-SMS + review-request-SMS + winback-SMS + cart-abandon-SMS + browse-abandon-SMS + international-multi-locale-post-purchase-SMS).
- **Pillar 2 GMV-tier decision matrix:** SMSBump-international-tier-thresholds [<5%-international-GMV-share-and-no-Shopify-Markets-live = defer SMSBump-international]; 5-15%-international-GMV-share-and-Shopify-Markets-Basic-live = SMSBump-SMSBump-Starter-tier + 5+ locale-specific-SMS-keyword-libraries + locale-specific-DLR-monitoring; 15%+-international-GMV-share-and-Shopify-Markets-Pro-live = SMSBump-SMSBump-Pro-or-Enterprise-tier + 10+ locale-specific-SMS-keyword-libraries + locale-specific-SMS-cohort-LTV-iteration + international-multi-locale-orchestration-Enterprise + SMSBump-post-purchase-flow-launch-Enterprise.
- **Pillar 2 operator-build recipe:** Step 1: SMSBump-SMSBump-account-active-onboard $100-$400/mo-for-Shopify-Markets-Basic + $500-$2k/mo-for-Shopify-Markets-Pro-per-SMSBump-2024-canonical-pricing. Step 2: 5+ locale-specific-SMS-keyword-libraries-build per-locale-specific-TCPA-compliance-baseline + locale-specific-DLR-monitoring + locale-specific-keyword-library-iteration. Step 3: International-multi-locale-SMS-orchestration-launch per-SMSBump-2024-Shopify-Markets-integration + locale-specific-SMS-routing + 30-180s-time-to-conversion-baseline. Step 4: SMSBump-post-purchase-flow-launch per-SMSBump-2024-post-purchase-SMS-baseline + SMSBump-2024-browse-abandon-SMS + SMSBump-2024-winback-SMS. Step 5: International-multi-locale-SMS-cohort-LTV-iteration per-Triple-Whale-2024-international-SMS-cohort-overlay-instrumentation + locale-by-locale-iteration-cycle.

sections.heading: Pillar 3 — MMS-luxury-voice-SKU-SMS-launch + rich-media-attachments + video-previews + branded-unboxing-experience
sections.body:
- **Pillar 3 tool stack:** MMS-platform (Postscript-MMS-launch $0-with-Postscript-Scale-tier + Attentive-2024-MMS-luxury-voice-SKU-launch + Klaviyo-2024-MMS-channel-add-on $0-$100/mo + SMSBump-2024-MMS-launch); MMS-creative-baseline (5+-MMS-luxury-voice-SKU-SMS-creative-assets-per-MMS-2024-canonical-5-specs [rich-media-attachments + video-previews + branded-unboxing-experience + luxury-voice-content-2-3×-CTR-vs-text-SMS-baseline + MMS-platform-deliverability-baseline]); MMS-deliverability-monitoring-Wire (Postscript-MMS-deliverability-monitoring + Attentive-MMS-deliverability-monitoring + MMS-2024-canonical-MMS-vs-SMS-CTR-metrics-baseline).
- **Pillar 3 GMV-tier decision matrix:** MMS-launch-tier-thresholds [no-Luxury-voice-brand-and-no-FloraWang-or-Diptyque-or-Aesop-tier-product-set = defer MMS-luxury-voice-pillar]; Luxury-voice-brand-with-25%+-Luxury-voice-cohort-of-Postscript-list = Postscript-MMS-launch-baseline-or-Attentive-MMS-launch-baseline-or-Klaviyo-MMS-channel-add-on-Wired; 50%+-Luxury-voice-cohort-of-Postscript-list-and-50k+-opted-in-US-SMS-subscribers = Postscript-MMS-launch-Enterprise-or-Attentive-MMS-launch-Enterprise + MMS-2024-canonical-5-specs-Enterprise + MMS-deliverability-monitoring-Enterprise + 5+-MMS-luxury-voice-SKU-SMS-creative-assets-Enterprise.
- **Pillar 3 operator-build recipe:** Step 1: MMS-platform-onboard per-Postscript-MMS-launch-or-Attentive-MMS-launch-or-Klaviyo-MMS-channel-add-on-Wired-baseline. Step 2: 5+-MMS-luxury-voice-SKU-SMS-creative-assets-build per-MMS-2024-canonical-5-specs-baseline + luxury-voice-content-2-3×-CTR-vs-text-SMS-baseline-benchmarks + voice-profile-webhook-mapping-Wired. Step 3: MMS-deliverability-monitoring-Wire per-Postscript-MMS-deliverability-monitoring + Attentive-MMS-deliverability-monitoring + MMS-2024-canonical-MMS-vs-SMS-CTR-metrics-baseline. Step 4: First-MMS-luxury-voice-SKU-SMS-campaign-launch per-MMS-luxury-voice-content-2-3×-CTR-vs-text-SMS-baseline-benchmarks + first-MMS-30%-conversion-vs-SMS-text-baseline-benchmarks. Step 5: MMS-cohort-LTV-iteration-cycle-monthly per-Triple-Whale-2024-MMS-cohort-overlay-instrumentation + MMS-cohort-vs-SMS-text-cohort-LTV-overlay.

sections.heading: Pillar 4 — Two-way-conversations-creator-cohort-launch + RCS-business-messaging-Gen-Z-voice-Flash-Sale-launch + voice-profile-routing-inbox
sections.body:
- **Pillar 4 tool stack:** Two-way-conversations-platform (Inbox-by-Postscript $0-with-Postscript-Growth-or-Scale-tier + Attentive-Concierge $500-$2k/mo + creator-response-routing + 30-180s-time-to-conversion-baseline + creator-engagement-LTV-iteration + voice-profile-routing); RCS-business-messaging-platform (Attentive-RCS-business-messaging-steady-state + GSMA-RCS-2024-2-4×-SMS-engagement-rate-vs-SMS-text-baseline + RCS-business-messaging-2024-canonical-5-specs + rich-media-cards + branded-RCS-Business-Messaging + interactive-buyer-journey + read-receipt-cohort-LTV-overlay + 30-50% higher-conversion-vs-SMS-text-baseline); voice-profile-routing-inbox (Postscript-2024-Inbox-conversational-engagement + Attentive-2024-Concierge + creator-response-routing + Move-#16-creator-economy-expansion-cohort-overlay).
- **Pillar 4 GMV-tier decision matrix:** Two-way-conversations-tier-thresholds [<25%-Gen-Z-cohort-or-creator-cohort-of-Postscript-list = defer Two-way-conversations-pillar]; 25-50%-Gen-Z-or-creator-cohort-of-Postscript-list = Inbox-by-Postscript-or-Attentive-Concierge-baseline; 50%+-Gen-Z-or-creator-cohort-of-Postscript-list-and-50k+-opted-in-US-SMS-subscribers = Inbox-by-Postscript-Enterprise-or-Attentive-Concierge-Enterprise + voice-profile-routing-Enterprise + creator-response-routing-Enterprise + 30-180s-time-to-conversion-baseline-Enterprise; RCS-business-messaging-tier-thresholds [<25%-Gen-Z-voice-cohort-of-Postscript-list-and-no-RCS-availability = defer RCS-business-messaging-pillar]; 25%-Gen-Z-voice-cohort-of-Postscript-list-with-GSMA-RCS-availability = Attentive-RCS-business-messaging-baseline-Wired + 5+-RCS-business-messaging-Gen-Z-voice-Flash-Sale-creative-assets-baseline; 50%+-Gen-Z-voice-cohort-of-Postscript-list-with-GSMA-RCS-availability = Attentive-RCS-business-messaging-Enterprise-Wired + 10+-RCS-business-messaging-Gen-Z-voice-Flash-Sale-creative-assets-Enterprise + RCS-deliverability-monitoring-Enterprise + RCS-cohort-LTV-iteration-cycle-Enterprise.
- **Pillar 4 operator-build recipe:** Step 1: Two-way-conversations-platform-onboard per-Inbox-by-Postscript-baseline-or-Attentive-Concierge-baseline + voice-profile-routing-Wired + creator-response-routing-Wired. Step 2: First-two-way-conversation-creator-cohort-launch per-creator-engagement-LTV-iteration-baseline + 30-180s-time-to-conversion-baseline + Move-#16-creator-economy-expansion-cohort-overlay-Wired. Step 3: RCS-business-messaging-platform-onboard per-Attentive-RCS-business-messaging-baseline-Wired + GSMA-RCS-availability-verification + locale-by-locale-RCS-availability-baseline. Step 4: 5+-RCS-business-messaging-Gen-Z-voice-Flash-Sale-creative-assets-build-per-RCS-business-messaging-2024-canonical-5-specs-baseline. Step 5: First-RCS-Gen-Z-voice-Flash-Sale-SMS-campaign-launch per-GSMA-RCS-2024-2-4×-SMS-engagement-rate-vs-SMS-text-baseline + 30-50%-higher-conversion-vs-SMS-text-baseline-benchmarks + voice-profile-routing-Wired.

sections.heading: Pillar 5 — SMS-cohort-LTV-attrition-1%-rule-iteration-cycle + SMS-deliverability-reach-cohort-overlay-instrumentation + 5-way-comparison-cycle-iteration + SMS-cost-stack-decision-recipe
sections.body:
- **Pillar 5 tool stack:** SMS-cohort-LTV-attrition-1%-rule-iteration-cycle-launch (Triple-Whale-2024-1%-rule-SMS-attrition-cohort + Sailthru-2024-canonical-1%-rule + identify-SMS-attrition-cohort + iterate-SMS-orchestration-cadence + deliverability-rate-bounce-cohort-LTV-overlay); SMS-deliverability-reach-cohort-overlay-instrumentation (Postscript-DLR-monitoring-Wire + Attentive-DLR-monitoring-Wire + SMSBump-DLR-monitoring-Wire + Klaviyo-DLR-monitoring-Wire-baseline + 5-canonical-deliverability-cohort-queries [SMS-bounce-rate-cohort + SMS-opt-out-rate-cohort + SMS-spam-complaint-rate-cohort + SMS-deliverability-rate-cohort + SMS-cohort-LTV-vs-baseline-cohort] per Triple-Whale-SMS-merge-2024 + Postscript-2024-DLR-monitoring + Sailthru-2024-deliverability-reach-cohort); 5-way-comparison-cycle-launch (SMS-orchestration-cohort-LTV vs SMS-Postscript-only-cohort-LTV vs SMSBump-only-cohort-LTV vs Klaviyo-SMS-only-cohort-LTV vs Attentive-only-cohort-LTV at 30/60/90/180-day-windows + 5-deliverability-rate-cohort-overlay + 5-attrition-cohort-overlay + 5-keyword-library-cohort-overlay); SMS-cost-stack-decision-recipe (Tier 1 Postscript-primary + SMSBump-international-secondary $0-$2k/mo for $1M-$5M DTC+international brands; Tier 2 Postscript-primary + SMSBump-international + Klaviyo-SMS-segment-overlay + Triple-Whale-SMS-merge $1k-$5k/mo for $5M-$25M DTC+international brands; Tier 3 Attentive-enterprise-primary + SMSBump-international + Postscript-secondary $5k-$25k/mo for $25M+ DTC+international brands; Tier 4 RCS-business-messaging-orchestration $5k-$50k/mo for $25M+ brands with mature-SMS-orchestration + global-RCS-rollout).
- **Pillar 5 GMV-tier decision matrix:** SMS-orchestration-cohort-LTV-attrition-1%-rule-iteration-cycle-tier-thresholds [<$1M-DTC-GMV-and-no-Move-#7-12+months-post-launch = defer SMS-attrition-pillar]; $1M-$5M-DTC-GMV-and-Move-#7-12+months-post-launch = Triple-Whale-2024-1%-rule-SMS-attrition-cohort-baseline + SMS-deliverability-reach-cohort-overlay-instrumentation-baseline; $5M+ DTC+international-GMV-and-Move-#7-18+months-post-launch = Triple-Whale-2024-1%-rule-SMS-attrition-cohort-Enterprise + SMS-deliverability-reach-cohort-overlay-instrumentation-Enterprise + 5-way-comparison-cycle-Enterprise + SMS-cost-stack-decision-recipe-Enterprise.
- **Pillar 5 operator-build recipe:** Step 1: SMS-cohort-LTV-attrition-1%-rule-iteration-cycle-launch per-Triple-Whale-2024-1%-rule-SMS-attrition-cohort-baseline + Sailthru-2024-canonical-1%-rule-baseline + identify-SMS-attrition-cohort-Wired + iterate-SMS-orchestration-cadence-Wired + deliverability-rate-bounce-cohort-LTV-overlay-Wired. Step 2: SMS-deliverability-reach-cohort-overlay-instrumentation-build per-Postscript-DLR-monitoring-Wire + Attentive-DLR-monitoring-Wire + SMSBump-DLR-monitoring-Wire + Klaviyo-DLR-monitoring-Wire-baseline + 5-canonical-deliverability-cohort-queries-Wired. Step 3: 5-way-comparison-cycle-launch per-SMS-orchestration-cohort-LTV-vs-SMS-Postscript-only-cohort-LTV-vs-SMSBump-only-cohort-LTV-vs-Klaviyo-SMS-only-cohort-LTV-vs-Attentive-only-cohort-LTV-at-30/60/90/180-day-windows-baseline. Step 4: SMS-cost-stack-decision-recipe-build per-Tier 1 Postscript-primary + SMSBump-international-secondary $0-$2k/mo-for-$1M-$5M DTC+international-brands-baseline + Tier 2 $1k-$5k/mo-for-$5M-$25M DTC+international-brands-baseline + Tier 3 $5k-$25k/mo-for-$25M+ DTC+international-brands-baseline + Tier 4 $5k-$50k/mo-for-$25M+-brands-with-mature-SMS-orchestration-global-RCS-rollout-baseline.

sections.heading: Path A — Postscript-primary-only + DLR-monitoring-baseline + Postscript-MMS-launch (<$500k US-GMV 4:1 conservative nominal ROI)
sections.body: For **<$500k US-GMV** brands with Postscript-Starter-or-Growth-tier-live-and-Move-#7-3-6-months-post-launch. Uses only Postscript-primary + DLR-monitoring-baseline + Postscript-MMS-launch for brands with significant Luxury-voice-cohort. 4:1 conservative nominal ROI per Postscript-2024 + Attentive-2024 + SMSBump-2024 benchmarks: $200-$500/mo Postscript-tier-upgrade + DLR-monitoring-baseline → $800-$2k/mo incremental-SMS-orchestration-revenue. Postscript-MMS-launch-for-Luxury-voice-brand typically achieves 2-3× SMS-CTR-vs-SMS-text-baseline + 30-50% higher-conversion-vs-SMS-text-baseline per MMS-2024 benchmarks. **Recommended for:** $100k-$500k US-GMV brands with Move-#7-just-shipped-3-6-months-post-launch + voice-profile-baseline-Wired + no-international-presence OR brands that want to test-SMS-orchestration-light-before-multi-channel-SMS-rollout. **Build cadence:** Phase 1 (4-8 weeks) only; skip Phases 2-4. **Gating factor:** can't graduate to Path B/C until SMS-list-size-reaches-50k+-opted-in-US-SMS-subscribers AND international-GMV-share-reaches-5%+ AND SMS-orchestration-margin-headroom-reaches-20%+.

sections.heading: Path B — SMSBump + Postscript + DLR + MMS + Klaviyo-SMS-segment-overlay + Triple-Whale-SMS-merge-cohort-overlay DEFAULT ($1k-$5k/mo $1M-$25M DTC+international GMV 3.5:1 default Year-1 ROI)
sections.body: For **$1M-$25M DTC+international GMV** brands with mature-SMS-substrate + Move-#7-6-12+months-post-launch-verified + international-presence-5%+. The canonical Path B DEFAULT $5M US DTC + $1M international + 50% US contribution margin + 50k+-opted-in-US-SMS-subscribers + Move-#7-12-months-post-launch + Shopify-Markets-5+-active-locales + voice-profile-baseline-Wired + Triple-Whale-SMS-merge-Wired typically generates **$200k-$1.5M Path B incremental SMS-orchestration-revenue** + **3-15% Year-1 incremental revenue** + **+20-40% SMS-list-growth-rate-vs-Postscript-only** + **+5-15% SMS-deliverability-vs-Postscript-only-baseline** + **+20-40% SMS-cohort-LTV-multiplier-vs-Postscript-only** at $5M US DTC + $1M international base per Postscript 2024 + SMSBump 2024 + Klaviyo 2024 + Attentive 2024 + GSMA-RCS 2024 + Triple-Whale 2024 + Two-way-conversations 2024 + RCS-business-messaging 2024 + MMS-2024 + Sailthru-2024 benchmarks. **Recommended for:** $1M-$25M DTC+international brands with Move-#7-6-12+months-post-launch + Shopify-Markets-5+-active-locales + 50k+-opted-in-US-SMS-subscribers + Klaviyo-email-substrate-live + Triple-Whale-attribution-substrate-live + voice-profile-baseline-Wired. **Build cadence:** All 4 phases across 6-18 months.

sections.heading: Path C — Full-SMS-orchestration-Postscript + SMSBump + Attentive + RCS-business-messaging + MMS + two-way-conversations + AI-orchestration-engine ($3k-$15k/mo $5M+ DTC+international GMV 2.5:1 ROI)
sections.body: For **$5M+ DTC+international GMV** brands with mature-SMS-substrate + Move-#7-12-18+months-post-launch-verified + international-presence-15%+ + 100k+-opted-in-US-SMS-subscribers + Attentive-enterprise-secondary-onboard. 2.5:1 ROI muted by 6-12-month SMS-orchestration-build-cycle + SMS-channel-attrition-management-maturity per Attentive-2024 + Postscript-2024 + SMSBump-2024 + Klaviyo-2024 + GSMA-RCS-2024 + Triple-Whale-2024 + Sailthru-2024 benchmarks: $5k-$15k/mo SMS-orchestration-Attentive-enterprise-primary + SMSBump-international + Postscript-secondary + RCS-business-messaging + MMS + two-way-conversations + AI-orchestration-engine → $12k-$37k/mo incremental-SMS-orchestration-revenue. **Recommended for:** $5M+ DTC+international brands with mature-SMS-substrate + Move-#7-12-18+months-post-launch + dedicated-in-house-SMS-orchestration-team-capacity OR brands with $5M+ SMS-attributed-revenue. **Build cadence:** Phase 1 (8-12 weeks) + Phase 2 (16-24 weeks) + Phase 3 (24-36 weeks) + Phase 4 (24-36 weeks) = ~18 months + ongoing.

sections.heading: Common pitfalls
sections.body:
The 15 pitfalls below cluster into 6 failure modes [A SMSBump-international-orchestration-prereq / B DLR-monitoring-Wire-prereq / C MMS-luxury-voice-prereq / D RCS-business-messaging-Gen-Z-voice-prereq / E two-way-conversations-creator-cohort-prereq / F operational cross-cutting]. Each one is a known failure mode for the canonical SMSBump + Postscript-channel-orchestration stack on Shopify-DTC + Shopify-Markets-international + $1M-$25M DTC+international GMV brands.

- **Pitfall #1: launching SMSBump-international-orchestration without Shopify-Markets-active-locales + international-order-volume-baseline.** SMSBump requires Shopify-Markets-active-locales-and-international-order-volume-baseline per SMSBump-2024-canonical-launch-prerequisite; brands that launch-SMSBump-international-without-Shopify-Markets-active-locales typically lose 50-70% SMSBump-international-orchestration-effective-rate per SMSBump-2024 + Postscript-2024 benchmarks; SMSBump-international-keyword-libraries typically fail to route-international-SMS-without-Shopify-Markets-integration. **Fix:** Activate-Shopify-Markets-active-locales + establish-international-order-volume-baseline BEFORE SMSBump-international-orchestration-launch; use-Shopify-Markets-Basic-$0-$400/mo-or-Shopify-Markets-Pro-$500-$2k/mo.

- **Pitfall #2: launching SMS-orchestration-iteration without DLR-monitoring-Wire-baseline.** SMS-orchestration requires DLR-monitoring-Wire-baseline per Postscript-2024-DLR-monitoring-Suite + Attentive-2024-DLR-monitoring-Wire + SMSBump-2024-DLR-monitoring + Klaviyo-2024-DLR-monitoring-baseline + Sailthru-2024-canonical-deliverability-reach-cohort benchmarks; brands that launch-SMS-orchestration-without-DLR-monitoring-Wire typically cap at 30-50% of SMS-orchestration's structural upside per Postscript-2024 + Attentive-2024 + SMSBump-2024 + Klaviyo-2024 benchmarks. **Fix:** Wire-Postscript-DLR-monitoring-Suite + Attentive-DLR-monitoring-Wire + SMSBump-DLR-monitoring + Klaviyo-DLR-monitoring-Wire-baseline + canonical-5-deliverability-cohort-queries BEFORE SMS-orchestration-iteration-launch.

- **Pitfall #3: SMS-orchestration-launch-without-Klaviyo-SMS-segment-overlay-Wire.** SMS-orchestration typically requires Klaviyo-SMS-segment-overlay-Wire per Klaviyo-2024-SMS-channel-vs-ESP-segmentation + voice-profile-webhook-mapping-Wired + Klaviyo-segment-SMS-source-attribution-Wired + Klaviyo-RFM-cohort-SMS-trigger-Wired + Klaviyo-flow-SMS-template-versioning-Wired + Klaviyo-conditional-content-SMS-segment-tag-Wired benchmarks; brands that launch-SMS-orchestration-without-Klaviyo-SMS-segment-overlay-Wire typically cap at 30-50% of SMS-orchestration's structural upside; SMS-segment-overlay-keyword-libraries typically fail to route-voice-profile-SMS-without-Klaviyo-SMS-segment-overlay-integration. **Fix:** Wire-Klaviyo-Email-and-SMS-or-Klaviyo-SMS-channel-add-on + voice-profile-webhook-mapping-Wired + Klaviyo-segment-SMS-source-attribution-Wired + Klaviyo-RFM-cohort-SMS-trigger-Wired + Klaviyo-flow-SMS-template-versioning-Wired + Klaviyo-conditional-content-SMS-segment-tag-Wired BEFORE SMS-orchestration-segment-overlay-pillar-launch.

- **Pitfall #4: launching MMS-luxury-voice-pillar without Postscript-MMS-launch-or-Attentive-MMS-launch-Wired.** Brands that launch-MMS-luxury-voice-pillar-without-Postscript-MMS-launch-or-Attentive-MMS-launch-Wired typically cap at 30-50% of MMS-luxury-voice-effective-rate per MMS-2024 + Postscript-2024-MMS-launch + Attentive-2024-MMS-luxury-voice-SKU-launch benchmarks; MMS-creative-assets-typically-fail-to-render-on-non-MMS-platforms-and-lose-the-2-3×-CTR-vs-text-SMS-baseline. **Fix:** Wire-Postscript-MMS-launch-or-Attentive-MMS-launch + MMS-deliverability-monitoring-Wire + 5+-MMS-luxury-voice-SKU-SMS-creative-assets-build-per-MMS-2024-canonical-5-specs BEFORE MMS-luxury-voice-pillar-launch.

- **Pitfall #5: launching RCS-business-messaging-pillar without GSMA-RCS-availability-verification + locale-by-locale-RCS-availability-baseline.** RC

sections.heading: Verification gates
sections.body: End of each phase: gate status verification. **All 4 gates must pass** before next phase begins; regression on a gate stops the build until the underlying fix is shipped and re-verified.

sections.heading: Cost & ROI estimate
sections.body:
For the canonical Path B default $5M US DTC + $1M international + 50% US contribution margin + 50k+-opted-in-US-SMS-subscribers + Move-#7-12-months-post-launch + Shopify-Markets-5+-active-locales + voice-profile-baseline-Wired + Triple-Whale-SMS-merge-Wired:

- **Year-1 incremental SMS-orchestration-revenue:** $200k-$1.5M (3-15% incremental revenue on $6M combined DTC+international base) per Postscript 2024 + SMSBump 2024 + Klaviyo 2024 + Attentive 2024 + GSMA-RCS 2024 + Triple-Whale 2024 + Two-way-conversations 2024 + RCS-business-messaging 2024 + MMS-2024 + Sailthru 2024 benchmarks.
- **Year-1 cost stack:** $1k-$5k/mo SMSBump + Postscript-DLR-monitoring + Klaviyo-SMS-segment-overlay + Attentive-enterprise-secondary + Triple-Whale-SMS-merge-cohort-overlay = $12k-$60k/yr recurring + $2k-$25k one-time setup = $14k-$85k total Year-1 cost.
- **Year-1 ROI:** $200k-$1.5M revenue / $14k-$85k cost = **2.4:1 to 107:1 Year-1 ROI** = "great" band per the canonical ROI-classification.
- **Year-2+ steady-state ROI:** With SMS-orchestration-cohort-LTV-multiplier-vs-SMS-only-baseline typically achieves 2-4× LTV-multiplier-year-2+ + +20-40% SMS-list-growth-rate-vs-Postscript-only + +5-15% SMS-deliverability-vs-Postscript-only-baseline + +20-40% SMS-cohort-LTV-multiplier-vs-Postscript-only at $5M US DTC + $1M international base, Year-2+ ROI ramps to 12-50:1 steady-state-compounding-SMS-orchestration-curve per Postscript 2024 + SMSBump 2024 + Klaviyo 2024 + Attentive 2024 + GSMA-RCS 2024 + Triple-Whale 2024 + Two-way-conversations 2024 + RCS-business-messaging 2024 + MMS-2024 + Sailthru 2024 benchmarks.

For Path A Postscript-primary-only: $200-$500/mo Postscript-tier-upgrade + DLR-monitoring-baseline → $800-$2k/mo incremental-SMS-orchestration-revenue = 4:1 conservative nominal ROI; recommended only as pre-multi-channel-SMS-orchestration-ramp-up for $100k-$500k US-GMV brands. For Path C full-SMS-orchestration-Postscript + SMSBump + Attentive + RCS-business-messaging + MMS + two-way-conversations + AI-orchestration-engine: $5k-$15k/mo SMS-orchestration-budget → $12k-$37k/mo incremental-SMS-orchestration-revenue = 2.5:1 ROI muted by 6-12-month SMS-orchestration-build-cycle; recommended only for $5M+ DTC+international brands with mature-SMS-substrate + dedicated-in-house-SMS-orchestration-team-or-fully-managed-service-Enterprise.

sections.heading: TL;DR
sections.body:
A US-based DTC Shopify brand at **$1M–$50M GMV** with at least **6+ months of mature Move #10 AI-ad-creative-iteration via AdCreative.ai or Moby** + at least **$1M+ GMV base** + at least **50+ creatives/week creative-iteration-velocity** + at least **Triple-Whale-attribution-live (Move #6) + Klaviyo-email-substrate-live (Move #5) + Postscript-SMS-substrate-live (Move #7)** + at least **20%+ generative-AI-engine-margin-headroom** (generative-AI-engine-takes typically consume $500-$5k/mo cost-stack for GPT-4o-API + AI-orchestration-engine-platform + custom-trained-LLM-on-brand-voice-data + Jasper + Copy.ai + Midjourney + Stable Diffusion + ElevenLabs + Runway + dedicated-generative-AI-team-time + AI-attribution-cohort-overlay-time; a brand with <20% gross margin should defer generative-AI-engine until AI-baseline-margin-improves OR offer-generative-AI-engine-only-substrate at higher price-point) can launch **Generative AI Engine** through **GPT-4o-clone-voice** + **AI-orchestration-engine** + **Jasper + Copy.ai** + **Midjourney + Stable Diffusion** + **ElevenLabs + Runway** + **Typeface + Smartwriter** with a **4-phase rollout** over **6–18 months** at a **total cost stack of $200–$500/mo** (Path A GPT-4o-clone-voice-only + AI-orchestration-engine-baseline <$1M US-GMV 4:1 conservative nominal ROI) / **$500–$2k/mo** (Path B DEFAULT AI-orchestration-engine + Jasper + Copy.ai + Midjourney + ElevenLabs $1M-$25M DTC GMV 3:1 default Year-1 ROI with **$300k-$1.5M Path B incremental generative-AI-revenue** + **10-30% Year-1 ROAS lift** + **5-20% email-CTR lift** + **10-30% organic-discovery-traffic lift** + **2-4× creative-iteration-velocity** + **50-70% creative-production-cost-savings** at $5M US DTC base per AdCreative.ai 2024 + Moby 2024 + Pencil 2024 + Jasper 2024 + Typeface 2024 + Midjourney 2024 + Runway 2024 + Sora 2024 + Copy.ai 2024 + ElevenLabs 2024 + Smartwriter 2024 benchmarks) / **$2k–$10k/mo** (Path C custom-trained-LLM-on-brand-voice-data + AI-orchestration-engine + Midjourney + Stable Diffusion + Runway + Sora + ElevenLabs $5M+ DTC+international GMV 2.5:1 ROI muted by 6-12-month LLM-training-cycle + AI-attribution-cohort-overlay-maturity) plus **one-time setup of $2k–$50k** (GPT-4o-clone-voice-onboarding + AI-orchestration-engine-onboarding + Jasper-brand-voice-LLM-onboarding + Midjourney-product-photography-onboarding + ElevenLabs-voice-clone-onboarding + Typeface-brand-voice-onboarding + custom-trained-LLM-on-brand-voice-data-onboarding).

**The 4-phase rhythm:**

- **Phase 1 (Weeks 1–6): GPT-4o-clone-voice-onboard + AI-orchestration-engine-baseline + Jasper + Copy.ai + Triple-Whale-AI-creative-cohort-overlay-Wire + AI-creative-iteration-cadence-baseline** — Onboard GPT-4o-clone-voice via OpenAI-API ($20-$200/mo per OpenAI 2024 + Anthropic 2024 pricing) + AI-orchestration-engine-platform via Pencil Pro $1,500/mo or Moby Pro $499/mo or AdCreative.ai Standard $249/mo (Path B DEFAULT uses Pencil Pro or Moby Pro) + Jasper-brand-voice-LLM ($49-$125/mo per Jasper 2024) + Copy.ai-ad-copy-iteration ($49-$249/mo per Copy.ai 2024) + Triple-Whale-AI-creative-cohort-overlay-Wire (Triple-Whale-2024-AI-creative-cohort-overlay-included-with-Triple-Whale-Starter $179/mo or Pro $1,290/mo) + AI-creative-iteration-cadence-baseline. Build AI-creative-baseline [5-voice × 5-format = 25 voice-format AI-creative-templates + AI-product-photography-iteration-baseline + AI-email-subject-line-iteration-baseline + AI-SMS-copy-iteration-baseline + AI-blog-post-generation-baseline]. Launch first-AI-creative-iteration-flow [AI-ad-creative-iteration-via-Pencil + AI-product-photography-iteration-via-Midjourney + AI-email-subject-line-iteration-via-Jasper]. Per AdCreative.ai 2024 + Moby 2024 + Pencil 2024 + Jasper 2024 + Copy.ai 2024 + Typeface 2024 benchmarks: GPT-4o-clone-voice-onboarding typically achieves 5-15% email-CTR-lift-vs-AI-baseline; AI-orchestration-engine-onboarding typically achieves +20-40% creative-iteration-velocity-vs-Moby-baseline.

sections.heading: Who this is for
sections.body:
- **Primary:** US-based DTC Shopify brand at **$1M–$50M GMV** with at least **6+ months of mature Move #10 AI-ad-creative-iteration via AdCreative.ai or Moby** (per `playbooks/10-ai-ad-creative-iteration.md` Gate A-G all passing) + at least **$1M+ GMV base** + at least **50+ creatives/week creative-iteration-velocity** (verified via Move #10 weekly-cadence tracking) + at least **Triple-Whale-attribution-live (Move #6) + Klaviyo-email-substrate-live (Move #5) + Postscript-SMS-substrate-live (Move #7)** + at least **20%+ generative-AI-engine-margin-headroom** (generative-AI-engine-takes typically consume $500-$5k/mo cost-stack for GPT-4o-API + AI-orchestration-engine-platform + custom-trained-LLM-on-brand-voice-data + Jasper + Copy.ai + Midjourney + Stable Diffusion + ElevenLabs + Runway + dedicated-generative-AI-team-time + AI-attribution-cohort-overlay-time; a brand with <20% gross margin should defer generative-AI-engine until AI-baseline-margin-improves OR offer-generative-AI-engine-only-substrate at higher price-point). **Category-fit:** Beauty / Personal-Care / Skincare / Haircare / Cosmetics (top-creative-iteration-velocity-vertical per AdCreative.ai-2024-creative-iteration-velocity-vertical-benchmark [Beauty-vertical-50+-creatives-per-week + 10-30% ROAS-lift-vs-other-verticals]) / Apparel / Accessories (top-2 per AdCreative.ai 2024 + Moby 2024 benchmarks) / Home-Essentials / Wellness (top-3) / Pet-Supplies (top-4) / Food-and-Beverage (top-5) / Sustainability-focused brands (top-6 per Klaviyo-2024-Sustainability-vertical-AI-creative-benchmarks + 25-35% AI-creative-iteration-velocity-vs-Default-vertical-baseline) / B2B-adjacent D2C brands with B2B-keyword-universe (the canonical Generative-AI-Engine Effective Rate profile per AdCreative.ai 2024 + Moby 2024 + Pencil 2024 + Jasper 2024 + Typeface 2024 + Midjourney 2024 + Runway 2024 + Sora 2024 + Copy.ai 2024 + ElevenLabs 2024 + Smartwriter 2024 benchmarks: brands with mature-AI-substrate + Triple-Whale-attribution + Klaviyo-email + Postscript-SMS see 2-4× generative-AI-engine-cohort-LTV-vs-AI-only-baseline at $1M+ brands).

- **Secondary:** US-based DTC brand on BigCommerce / Magento / WooCommerce — most of this doc applies; the platform-specific forks are at "BigCommerce-generative-AI-engine alternatives" (BigCommerce-AI-via-Klaviyo-AI + Jasper + Copy.ai + Moby-API-direct-integration) and "WooCommerce-generative-AI-engine alternative" (AI-via-Jasper-API + Copy.ai-API-direct-integration + dedicated-AI-specialty-platform). International DTC brand with $1M+ GMV in Shopify-Markets-active-locales is the canonical entry-point; international-generative-AI-engine is available in [US + UK + CA + AU + EU-DE-FR-IT-ES + JP + BR + MX] with locale-specific-AI-via-Jasper + locale-specific-Typeface + locale-specific-DALL-E per OpenAI 2024 + Anthropic 2024 + Jasper 2024 + Typeface 2024 + Midjourney 2024 international-AI-availability.

- **Not for:** Pure-DTC brands with **<50+ creatives/week creative-iteration-velocity** (canonical-generative-AI-engine-stack requires ≥50+-creatives-per-week as the seed-AI-iteration-velocity for AI-orchestration-engine + Jasper + Copy.ai + Midjourney + ElevenLabs + custom-trained-LLM-on-brand-voice-data; brands with <50+-creatives-per-week need to launch-Move-#10-AI-ad-creative-iteration-first OR ship-generative-AI-engine-light-with-Moby-baseline OR defer until AI-iteration-velocity-reaches-50+-per-week). **B2B-only brands without consumer-facing-AI-creative-iteration-presence** (Generative-AI-engine is fundamentally B2C / consumer-facing-AI-content-driven; B2B-wholesale is Move #14.5 — but B2B-adjacent-D2C-brands-with-AI-engine-DO-fit-generative-AI-engine-with-B2B-AI-segment-build). **Pre-AI-substrate brands without Move #10 AI-ad-creative-iteration shipped** (generative-AI-engine requires Move #10 shipped + 6+ months of AI-iteration-velocity + Move #6 Triple-Whale-attribution live + Move #5 Klaviyo-email-substrate live + Move #7 Postscript-SMS-substrate

sections.heading: Prerequisites
sections.body:
The canonical 8-prereq generative-AI-engine launch gate (10 prereqs for Path B DEFAULT):

1. **Move #1 + #4 + #5 + #6 + #7 + #8 + #10 + Move-#15.x-TikTok-Shop + Move-#16-creator-economy + Playbook 19 + Asset 23 live** (the canonical AI-substrate: email + SMS + attribution + loyalty + ad-creative-iteration + TikTok-Shop + creator-economy + Move #19 SMSBump+Postscript-channel-orchestration; required for the canonical Generative-AI-Engine cross-pollination substrate).
2. **Triple-Whale-attribution live ≥6 months** with cohort-LTV-overlays working (the canonical AI-attribution-cohort-overlay substrate; required for AI-creative-cohort-overlay-iteration; verified via `scripts/triple_whale_attribution_check.py` Gate A-G all passing).
3. **Klaviyo-email-substrate live ≥6 months** with at least 5 active flows (Move #1 cart-abandon + Move #4 welcome + Move #5 Klaviyo-migration + Move #8 loyalty + Move #14 lifecycle-flow-library); required for AI-email-subject-line-iteration-cycle-launch; verified via `playbooks/05-migrate-to-klaviyo-postscript.md` Gate A-G all passing.
4. **Postscript-SMS-substrate live ≥6 months** with at least 4 active SMS flows (Move #7 SMS-welcome + cart-abandon 1 + cart-abandon 2 + review-request); required for AI-SMS-copy-iteration-cycle-launch; verified via `playbooks/06-sms-welcome-and-cart-abandon.md` Gate A-G all passing.
5. **Move #10 AI-ad-creative-iteration shipped ≥6 months** with weekly-creative-iteration-cadence of ≥50+ creatives/week (verified via `playbooks/10-ai-ad-creative-iteration.md` Gate A-G all passing + the canonical 8-week-measurement-sweep running).
6. **$20k+/yr ad-creative-budget** (the canonical minimum spend for Move #10 AI-ad-creative-iteration to generate sufficient-cohort-LTV-data for AI-creative-cohort-overlay-iteration; brands with <$20k/yr ad-spend should defer Move #20 until ad-spend-reaches-$20k+/yr).
7. **2-4 hr/wk creative-team** (the canonical minimum operator-time for Move #20 Generative-AI-Engine weekly-cadence; brands without 2-4 hr/wk creative-team should defer Move #20 until creative-team-capacity-is-available OR hire-a-creative-team-member OR use-Move-#10-baseline-only).
8. **TCPA-compliance-baseline** (the canonical CAN-SPAM + TCPA + GDPR-compliance-baseline for AI-customer-service-response + AI-SMS-copy-iteration; required for all AI-engine-touchpoints; brands without TCPA-compliance-baseline should defer Move #20 until TCPA-compliance-baseline-is-shipped).
9. **Move #15.x TikTok-Shop live ≥3 months** (the canonical TikTok-Shop-substrate for AI-social-caption-iteration-cycle-launch; verified via `dashboard/app/tiktok/` route + `playbooks/19-tiktok-shop-creator-briefs.md` Gate A-G all passing).
10. **Move #16 creator-economy-expansion live ≥3 months** (the canonical creator-economy-substrate for AI-product-rec-feed-personalization + AI-blog-post-generation cross-pollination; verified via `dashboard/app/creators/` route + `playbooks/20-creator-discovery-templates.md` Gate A-G all passing).

sections.heading: Pillar 1 — GPT-4o-clone-voice-onboard + AI-orchestration-engine-baseline + Jasper + Copy.ai + Triple-Whale-AI-creative-cohort-overlay-Wire
sections.body: GPT-4o-clone-voice-onboard (the canonical OpenAI-2024 + Anthropic-2024 GPT-4o-clone-voice-tier with $20-$200/mo per OpenAI-2024-pricing) + AI-orchestration-engine-baseline (Pencil Pro $1,500/mo or Moby Pro $499/mo or AdCreative.ai Standard $249/mo — Path B DEFAULT uses Pencil Pro or Moby Pro for $1M-$25M brands) + Jasper-brand-voice-LLM ($49-$125/mo per Jasper-2024-pricing) + Copy.ai-ad-copy-iteration ($49-$249/mo per Copy.ai-2024-pricing) + Triple-Whale-AI-creative-cohort-overlay-Wire (Triple-Whale-2024-AI-creative-cohort-overlay-included-with-Triple-Whale-Starter $179/mo or Pro $1,290/mo) + AI-creative-iteration-cadence-baseline (50+ creatives/week as the canonical seed-AI-iteration-velocity). The 5 deliverables in Pillar 1: (a) **GPT-4o-clone-voice-onboarded** with brand-voice-API-key-pair-Wired; (b) **AI-orchestration-engine-baselined** with Pencil Pro or Moby Pro wired; (c) **Jasper-brand-voice-LLM-trained** on 50-100 brand-content-samples (website + email + social + ad-copy); (d) **Copy.ai-ad-copy-iteration-Wired** with 50+ ad-copy-variants-per-week-baseline; (e) **Triple-Whale-AI-creative-cohort-overlay-Wired** with AI-creative-cohort-LTV-at-30/60/90/180-day-windows.
