Body: 3-proposed-time-slots + Zoom-link + corporate-gifting-mix-mention-if-applicable

numberedSections.heading: 2.4 Corporate-gifting-catalog with 10-30 hero-SKUs + custom-ribbon + handwritten-card + bulk-pricing-tiers
numberedSections.body:
Per research/10 §Verification gates Gate B prerequisite 5 + Faire 2024 + Klaviyo B2B 2024 corporate-gifting benchmarks; 15-25% Year-2 incremental-B2B-revenue from corporate-gifting-mix.

```
CORPORATE-GIFTING-CATALOG STRUCTURE

| Tier | Order size | Discount | Examples |
|------|-----------|----------|----------|
| Welcome-gift | $50-$200 | 50% off MSRP | Single hero SKU + custom-ribbon + handwritten-card |
| Client-thank-you | $200-$1,000 | 55% off MSRP | 3-5 hero SKUs + custom-ribbon + handwritten-card + branded-mailer |
| Holiday-gift | $1,000-$5,000 | 60% off MSRP | 5-10 hero SKUs + custom-ribbon + handwritten-card + branded-mailer + gift-receipt |
| Bulk-onboarding | $5,000-$25,000 | 60% off MSRP + free-shipping | 10-30 hero SKUs + custom-branded-packaging + dedicated-account-manager |

Custom-branding-options: custom-ribbon (Pantone-matched, 14-day lead-time) + handwritten-card (hand-addressed, 7-day lead-time) + branded-mailer (custom-printed, 21-day lead-time).
```

**Klaviyo B2B-tier flow:** Trigger on corporate-gift-order-placed → send dedicated-account-manager follow-up → upsell to recurring-quarterly-corporate-gifting cadence → cross-sell to standard-wholesale-account.

numberedSections.heading: 3.1 8-prereq RFQ-template ready for distributor-pitch
numberedSections.body:
Per research/10 §Verification gates Gate C prerequisite 2 + RSP 2024 + KeHE 2024 + UNFI 2024 distributor-onboarding-funnel.

```
8-PREREQ RFQ-TEMPLATE (paste-ready)

REQUEST FOR QUOTATION — [BRAND] × [DISTRIBUTOR]

To: [DISTRIBUTOR NAME] (RSP / KeHE / UNFI / dot Foods / Boar's Head)
From: [BRAND LEGAL ENTITY] + EIN [EIN NUMBER]
Date: [DATE]
Valid Until: [60 DAYS FROM DATE]

PRODUCT LINE:
- 12-30 hero-SKUs (highlights: [TOP 5 SKUS])
- 30+ wholesale-eligible secondary SKUs (full line-sheet attached)
- 5-10 wholesale-only SKUs (B2B-exclusive, not sold on DTC)

PRICING:
- Wholesale: 50% off MSRP per Schedule A
- Volume-pricing-tiers: 1-5 cases no discount / 6-23 cases 5%-off / 24+ cases 10%-off
- 60% off MSRP for distributor-tier (gated on $5k+ first-PO minimum)
- Payment terms: NET-30 default with 2.5% pre-pay-discount

MINIMUM ORDER QUANTITIES (MOQ):
- First order: $5,000 minimum (12-30 SKU mix)
- Reorder: $2,500 minimum
- Case-pack multiples only (1 case = 6-24 units per SKU)

8-PREREQ ONBOARDING-PACK (attached):
1. [✓] Business registration certificate
2. [✓] EIN letter
3. [✓] Resale certificate (multi-state SST-form)
4. [✓] Product insurance: $1M+ GL + $1M PL
5. [✓] Warehouse safety cert: FDA-registered (food/cosmetic) OR CPSC-registered
6. [✓] UPC barcode: GS1 Company Prefix + GTIN-12 + GTIN-14 case-pack
7. [✓] Case-pack spec sheet (per-retailer-form attached)
8. [✓] HazMat cert: N/A (or attached if applicable)

LEAD-TIME:
- First PO acknowledgement: 7 days from RFQ acceptance
- First PO fulfillment: 14-21 days from PO acceptance
- Reorder fulfillment: 7-14 days from PO acceptance

TARGET ONBOARDING DATE: [DATE 60 DAYS FROM RFQ]

[BRAND CEO SIGNATURE] [DATE]
```

numberedSections.heading: 3.3 Dedicated sales-rep-capacity ≥0.5 FTE Path B / ≥1.0 FTE Path C
numberedSections.body:
Per research/10 Pitfall #13 + research/10 §Verification gates Gate C prerequisite 4; canonical dedicated sales-rep-capacity for distributor-onboarding sales-cycle.

**Path B (Year-2+):** Hire 0.5 FTE dedicated sales-rep at $35k-$50k/yr OR contract with commissioned-sales-rep at 8% of net-revenue (per Faire 2024 + RSP 2024 benchmarks). Job-description: outbound-RFQ-sending + inbound-retailer-onboarding + 4-email-cadence-execution + sample-pack-fulfillment-coordination + AR-management.

**Path C (Year-1+):** Hire 1.0 FTE dedicated full-FTE sales-rep at $70k-$100k/yr OR contract with 2 commissioned-sales-reps. Job-description: above + distributor-pitch-execution + Amazon Business management + trade-show-presence (1-2 shows/yr).

numberedSections.heading: 1.1 TikTok-Business-Account created + category-approval-application submitted
numberedSections.body:
Per research/11 Pillar 1 + Pitfall #1 platform-selection.

```
TIKTOK-BUSINESS-ACCOUNT-SETUP

[ ] 1. Create TikTok-Business-Account at business.tiktok.com (free; requires business-email + business-registration-document)
[ ] 2. Brand-info: legal-entity-name + DBA + EIN + brand-website + brand-registration-certificate + product-insurance $1M+ general-liability + $1M product-liability
[ ] 3. Apply for TikTok-Shop-Seller-Center at seller-center.tiktok.com (free for Path A; $0-$99/mo for Path B Path C)
[ ] 4. Submit category-approval-application for top SKU category (Beauty / Fashion-Accessories / Home / Electronics / Food-and-Beverage / Pet / Baby / Health / Outdoor / Toys-and-Collectibles — restricted categories include Firearms / Alcohol / Tobacco / Cannabis / Pharmaceuticals / Adult-Content / Gambling / Financial-Products)
[ ] 5. Upload category-specific-documentation:
    - Brand-registration-certificate
    - Product-safety-certification (CPSIA for baby OR FDA-registration for beauty/food/supplements OR FCC-certification for electronics OR CPSC-registration for general-merchandise)
    - Product-insurance $1M+ general-liability + $1M product-liability
    - Warehouse-safety-cert (FDA-registered for food/cosmetic OR CPSC-registered for general-merchandise)
    - Brand-authorization-letter for distribution
[ ] 6. Approval-timeline 1-4 weeks per TikTok-for-Business-2024
[ ] 7. Rejection-rate 30-50% for first-time-applicants per Jungle-Scout-2024-benchmarks — prepare 2-3 backup-category-applications
```

**Decision criterion:** All 10 permitted TikTok-Shop-categories have specific documentation requirements. Brands with missing documentation should defer Phase 1 by 4-8 weeks while assembling.

numberedSections.heading: 1.2 Shop-Score-baseline-audit run
numberedSections.body:
Per research/11 Pillar 5 + Pitfall #12 attribution-measurement.

```
SHOP-SCORE-BASELINE-AUDIT (paste-ready checklist)

Run on existing-DTC-store 30 days before Phase 1:

[ ] 1. Positive-review-rate ≥95% (count positive-reviews / total-reviews for last-30-days)
[ ] 2. Ship-on-time-rate ≥95% (count orders-shipped-within-promised-window / total-orders for last-30-days)
[ ] 3. Return-rate ≤5% (count returns / total-orders for last-30-days)
[ ] 4. Chat-response-rate ≥90% (count chats-responded / total-chats for last-30-days)
[ ] 5. Chat-response-time ≤5-min (median chat-response-time for last-30-days)

Computed-baseline Shop-Score projection:
- All 5 metrics in band → projected Shop-Score 4.5-5.0 → proceed to Phase 1
- 4 of 5 metrics in band → projected Shop-Score 4.0-4.5 → fix the failing metric first
- 3 or fewer metrics in band → projected Shop-Score <4.0 → defer Phase 1 by 30-60 days

Brands with <4.0 baseline Shop-Score need to fix DTC-operations before TikTok-Shop-launch.
```

numberedSections.heading: 1.3 8-prereq TikTok-Shop-onboarding-pack compiled
numberedSections.body:
Per research/11 §Verification gates Gate A prerequisite 7; canonical 8-prereq onboarding-pack.

```
8-PREREQ TIKTOK-SHOP-ONBOARDING-PACK (paste-ready checklist)

[ ] 1. TikTok-Business-Account + TikTok-Shop-Seller-Center-account (free)
[ ] 2. Category-approval-application approved for top SKU category
[ ] 3. Shop-Score-baseline-audit passing (≥4.0 baseline)
[ ] 4. Creator-affiliate-pool-baseline ≥20 ready-to-onboard creators (TikTok-Shop-Creator-Marketplace + Aspire + Collabstr + Instagram-hashtag-scrape)
[ ] 5. LIVE-shopping-studio-build planned ($500-$2k one-time [Ring-light + iPhone-15-Pro + tripod + lavalier-mic + 1080p-webcam + backdrop + teleprompter-app + LIVE-streaming-software Streamlabs-OBS-or-TikTok-LIVE-Studio $0/mo])
[ ] 6. TikTok-Shop-product-feed-optimization plan (per-SKU: TikTok-Shop-product-title ≤100-chars + product-image 1:1-square-≥800px + product-description-with-keywords + price-tier-fits-TikTok-Shop-impulse-pattern $15-$45 hero-SKU + 5%-15%-shipping-subsidy)
[ ] 7. Klaviyo-TikTok-channel-integration planned ($0 with Klaviyo-Standard; $45/mo with Klaviyo-Email-and-SMS for TikTok-Shop-cart-abandon + TikTok-Shop-welcome-flow)
[ ] 8. Triple-Whale-TikTok-attribution-setup planned (Triple-Whale-app-install $179/mo Starter-or-$1,290/mo-Pro + TikTok-cohort-overlay-wire + post-purchase-survey with TikTok-source-tracking)

Compiled PDFs / certs in /shared-drive/TikTok-Shop-onboarding-pack/ with 14-day-onboarding-lead-time before first-TikTok-Shop-launch.
```

numberedSections.heading: 1.4 First 20-50 creator-affiliates onboarded via TikTok-Shop-Creator-Marketplace + Aspire + Collabstr + Instagram-hashtag-scrape
numberedSections.body:
Per Move #15-affiliate-program playbook-16 §Phase 1 Step 1.4 first-100-affiliates-build + research/11 Pillar 2 creator-affiliate-onboarding.

**TikTok-Shop-Creator-Marketplace setup (~2 hours):**
1. TikTok-Shop-Seller-Center → Affiliate → Creator-Marketplace → set brand-info + 5-payout-structures [CPM $10-$30/1000-views / CPS 10-25%-of-GMV / flat-fee $200-$2k/creator/post / hybrid 5%-of-GMV + $200-base-fee / product-seeding-only $0 + free-product]
2. Apply to 50-100 creators in top-10 categories matching brand-SKU-archetype
3. Per-creator-onboarding message: 1-line brand-pitch + creator-brief-template (asset 19) + 1-hero-SKU product-seeding offer + 4-week-trial-payout-structure

**Aspire setup (~1.5 hours):**
1. Apply at aspire.io → brand-onboarding (~3-day review)
2. Use Aspire's creator-discovery-database for 20-50 mid-tier creators (10k-500k followers) in brand-vertical
3. Same onboarding-message shape as TikTok-Shop-Creator-Marketplace

**Collabstr setup (~1 hour):**
1. Apply at collabstr.com → brand-onboarding (~2-day review)
2. Use Collabstr's creator-discovery-database for 10-30 micro-creators (1k-50k followers) for paid-flat-fee-trial
3. $50-$500/creator/post trial-payout-structure

**Instagram-hashtag-scrape (~2 hours):**
1. Scrape top-50 Instagram-creators in brand-vertical via Apify or similar (free-$50/mo)
2. Manual-DM outreach with creator-brief + product-seeding offer
3. Convert 5-10 Instagram-creators to TikTok-Shop-creator-affiliates

**First 20-50 creator-affiliate targets:**
- 10-15 from TikTok-Shop-Creator-Marketplace (auto-acquired)
- 5-10 from Aspire (auto-acquired)
- 5-10 from Collabstr (auto-acquired)
- 5-15 from Instagram-hashtag-scrape (manual outreach)

**Per-creator-onboarding deliverables:** creator-brief (asset 19) + product-seeding-pack (1-hero-SKU + 1-secondary-SKU) + payout-structure + 4-week-trial-period + FTC-disclosure-language per 16-CFR-Part-255.

numberedSections.heading: 1.5 TikTok-Shop-product-feed live with 10-50 SKUs + per-SKU-optimization
numberedSections.body:
Per research/11 Pillar 1 product-feed-optimization + Pitfall #4 creator-affiliate-cohort-LTV.

```
TIKTOK-SHOP-PRODUCT-FEED-OPTIMIZATION (per-SKU)

| Field | Optimization | Reason |
|-------|--------------|--------|
| TikTok-Shop-product-title | ≤100-chars + benefit-led + ingredient-led + use-case-led | SEO + algorithm-distribution |
| Product-image-1 | 1:1-square-≥800px + product-on-white-background + hero-shot | First-impression CVR |
| Product-image-2-5 | Lifestyle-in-use + creator-style-demo + case-pack-shot + label-shot | Trust + transparency |
| Product-description | Keywords + benefit-led + ingredient-led + use-case-led + 200-500-words | SEO + algorithm-distribution |
| Price-tier | $15-$45 impulse-price for hero-SKU; $50-$200 considered-price for secondary-SKU | TikTok-Shop-impulse-pattern |
| Shipping-subsidy | 5%-15%-of-AOV | Competitive-with-Amazon |
| TikTok-Shop-product-card-preview | Embedded-video-or-GIF | Algorithm-reward |
| Inventory-level | ≥30-days-of-stock at expected-GMV | Avoid-stock-out-penalty |

Optimized-product-feeds achieve 2-4× higher conversion-rate vs unoptimized-feeds (Shop-Score's algorithmic-distribution-bonus rewards quality-listings per eMarketer-2024 + Jungle-Scout-2024).
```

numberedSections.heading: 1.6 Klaviyo-TikTok-channel-integration wired
numberedSections.body:
Per research/11 Pillar 5 attribution + Move #1 + Move #4 cross-pollination.

**Klaviyo-TikTok-channel-integration setup (~1 hour):**
1. Klaviyo admin → Integrations → TikTok → connect (free with Klaviyo-Standard; $45/mo with Klaviyo-Email-and-SMS for SMS)
2. Wire 4 canonical TikTok-Shop-flows:
   - **TikTok-Shop-cart-abandon** (15-min + 24-hour + 72-hour cadence; trigger: TikTok-Shop-cart-event)
   - **TikTok-Shop-welcome-flow** (Day 0 + Day 7 + Day 30 cadence; trigger: TikTok-Shop-first-purchase)
   - **TikTok-Shop-post-purchase** (Day 1 + Day 14 + Day 30 cadence; trigger: TikTok-Shop-order-shipped)
   - **TikTok-Shop-subscriber-cohort-LTV-overlay** (weekly cohort-LTV email to operator; trigger: TikTok-Shop-cohort-LTV-computed)

numberedSections.heading: 1.7 Triple-Whale-TikTok-attribution-setup wired
numberedSections.body:
Per research/11 Pillar 5 attribution-measurement + Move #6 Triple-Whale.

**Triple-Whale-TikTok-attribution setup (~1 hour):**
1. Triple-Whale-app install ($179/mo Starter OR $1,290/mo Pro)
2. Triple-Whale admin → Integrations → TikTok-Ads + TikTok-Shop → connect
3. Wire TikTok-cohort-overlay [TikTok-Shop-driven-cohort vs organic-DTC-cohort vs paid-Meta-cohort at 30/60/90-day windows per Triple-Whale-TikTok-attribution-2024]
4. Configure post-purchase-survey with TikTok-source-tracking ("How did you hear about us?" + TikTok-Shop-specific-options)

numberedSections.heading: 1.8 Verification — Gate A (Phase 1 readiness, end of Week 2)
numberedSections.body:
Per research/11 §Verification gates Gate A; the brand MUST satisfy ALL 10 prereqs:

- [ ] **Prereq 1:** DTC baseline steady-state 90+ days (Move #1 + Move #4 + Move #6 + Move #8 + Move #11 actively live for ≥90 days).
- [ ] **Prereq 2:** Move #1 cart-abandon CTR ≥5% per Klaviyo 2024 benchmarks.
- [ ] **Prereq 3:** Move #4 welcome-series open-rate ≥35% + click-rate ≥4% + CVR ≥0.8%.
- [ ] **Prereq 4:** Move #6 Triple Whale attribution ≥95% match-rate (all 7 gates passing per `scripts/triple_whale_attribution_check.py`).
- [ ] **Prereq 5:** Move #8 loyalty ≥30% member-share of total-revenue per Smile.io benchmarks.
- [ ] **Prereq 6:** Move #11 subscription OR Move #15 affiliate-program live (creator-cohort-LTV substrate).
- [ ] **Prereq 7:** ≥10 SKUs with ≥25% TikTok-Shop-margin-headroom (5 hero at $15-$45 + 5 secondary at $50-$200).
- [ ] **Prereq 8:** 8-prereq TikTok-Shop-onboarding-pack compiled (TikTok-Business-Account + category-approval + Shop-Score-baseline-audit + creator-affiliate-pool-baseline + LIVE-shopping-studio-build + TikTok-Shop-product-feed-optimization + Klaviyo-TikTok-channel-integration + Triple-Whale-TikTok-attribution-setup).
- [ ] **Prereq 9:** TikTok-Shop-Seller-Center-onboarded + category-approval-approved.
- [ ] **Prereq 10:** First 20-50 creator-affiliates onboarded + Klaviyo-TikTok-channel-integration live + Triple-Whale-TikTok-attribution wired.

**Gate-pass criterion:** All 10 prereqs pass → proceed to Phase 2.

---

numberedSections.heading: 2.1 TikTok-Ads-Manager account setup + Spark-Ads-boost configured
numberedSections.body:
Per research/11 Pillar 3 shoppable-video-ads + Pitfall #8 attribution-measurement.

**TikTok-Ads-Manager setup (~1 hour):**
1. Apply at ads.tiktok.com → brand-onboarding (~3-day review)
2. Brand-info + billing + payment-method
3. Connect TikTok-Pixel to Shopify via Shopify-TikTok-Channel
4. Set $50-$500/day Spark-Ads-budget per audience-segment

**Spark-Ads-boost setup (~2 hours):**
1. TikTok-Ads-Manager → Smart-Ads → Spark-Ads → connect-creator-content
2. Boost top-5-performing organic-creator-content from Phase 1 (highest view-count + highest engagement-rate)
3. Set $50-$500/day Spark-Ads-budget per audience-segment
4. Allocate 50-70% of total TikTok-Ads-budget to Spark-Ads per TikTok-Ads-Manager-2024-benchmarks
5. Set audience-targeting: age 18-34 + US + interest-categories-matching-brand-vertical
6. Set bid-strategy: highest-value OR conversions

numberedSections.heading: 2.2 In-Feed-Ads with Product-Module + Top-View-Ads configured
numberedSections.body:
Per research/11 Pillar 3.

**In-Feed-Ads with Product-Module (~2 hours):**
1. TikTok-Ads-Manager → In-Feed-Ads → create-campaign
2. Choose 3-5 hero-SKUs as Product-Module-targets (TikTok-Shop-product-card-in-feed)
3. Set $50-$300/day budget per SKU
4. Set audience-targeting: age 18-34 + US + interest-categories-matching-brand-vertical
5. Set creative-format: 9-15-second vertical-video + Product-Module-overlay
6. CVR 2-4× vs ads-without-Product-Module per eMarketer-2024-benchmarks

**Top-View-Ads (~1 hour):**
1. TikTok-Ads-Manager → Top-View-Ads → create-campaign
2. Set $20,000-$50,000/day budget per TopView-campaign (Top-View is premium-pricing)
3. Set full-screen-takeover with TikTok-Shop-product-module
4. Run 1-2 TopView-campaigns per month for hero-SKU-awareness

numberedSections.heading: 2.3 Triple-Whale-cohort-LTV-overlay-iteration weekly-cadence
numberedSections.body:
Per research/11 Pillar 5 cohort-LTV-iteration + Pitfall #13 attribution-measurement.

**Triple-Whale-cohort-LTV-iteration cadence (~2 hours/week):**
1. Weekly-review of TikTok-Shop-driven-cohort-LTV vs organic-DTC-cohort-LTV vs paid-Meta-cohort-LTV
2. Bin cohort-LTV by 30/60/90-day windows per Triple-Whale-TikTok-attribution-2024
3. Compare TikTok-Shop-cohort-LTV-multiplier vs organic-DTC-cohort-LTV-multiplier
4. Adjust Spark-Ads-budget-allocation by cohort-LTV-multiplier (boost top-decile-cohort-creators)
5. Iterate creator-affiliate-payout-structure per the canonical 5-payout-structures based on cohort-LTV-multiplier

numberedSections.heading: 2.4 First creator-content-pieces live + Shop-Score-baseline-monitored
numberedSections.body:
Per research/11 Pillar 1 + Pillar 2.

**First creator-content-pieces (~4 hours):**
1. 20-50 creator-affiliates ship first 1-3 content-pieces each (Reels / TikToks / LIVE-clips)
2. Per-piece deliverables: 15-60-second video + Product-Module-link + FTC-disclosure (#ad / #sponsored / #partner per 16-CFR-Part-255)
3. Monitor first-piece performance: views + engagement-rate + click-rate + CVR + TikTok-Shop-driven-GMV
4. Identify top-10-performing pieces by TikTok-Shop-driven-GMV per piece
5. Boost top-10 pieces with Spark-Ads ($50-$500/day per piece)

**Shop-Score-baseline-monitored daily:**
1. Daily-check: positive-review-rate + ship-on-time-rate + return-rate + chat-response-rate + chat-response-time
2. Daily-TikTok-Shop-Seller-Center-dashboard-check
3. Weekly-Shop-Score-update (target 4.5+ by end of Phase 2)

numberedSections.heading: 2.5 First TikTok-Shop-driven-GMV realized + Spark-Ads-iteration
numberedSections.body:
Per research/11 Pillar 3 + §Cost & ROI steady-state-benchmarks.

**First TikTok-Shop-driven-GMV realized:**
- Target: $25k-$100k TikTok-Shop-driven-GMV by end of Phase 2 (Weeks 3-6)
- Path B default: $50k-$250k TikTok-Shop-driven-GMV by end of Phase 2

**Spark-Ads-iteration:**
1. Weekly-Spark-Ads-performance-review: ROAS + click-rate + CVR + GMV
2. Identify top-decile-Spark-Ads-creators by ROAS
3. Boost top-decile-creators with $100-$500/day Spark-Ads-budget
4. Pause bottom-decile-creators (ROAS <1.5×)

numberedSections.heading: 2.6 Verification — Gate B (Phase 2 readiness, end of Week 6)
numberedSections.body:
Per research/11 §Verification gates Gate B; the brand MUST satisfy ALL 10 prereqs:

- [ ] **Prereq 1:** Gate A passed (Phase 1 verified).
- [ ] **Prereq 2:** TikTok-Ads-Manager-account live + Spark-Ads-boost-configured + $50-$500/day-budget-set.
- [ ] **Prereq 3:** In-Feed-Ads with Product-Module live + Top-View-Ads-configured.
- [ ] **Prereq 4:** Triple-Whale-cohort-LTV-overlay-iteration weekly-cadence-running.
- [ ] **Prereq 5:** 20-50 creator-affiliates ship first 1-3 content-pieces each.
- [ ] **Prereq 6:** First TikTok-Shop-driven-GMV realized ≥$25k (Path A target) OR ≥$50k (Path B target).
- [ ] **Prereq 7:** Spark-Ads-iteration weekly-cadence-running + top-decile-creators-boosted + bottom-decile-paused.
- [ ] **Prereq 8:** Shop-Score-baseline ≥4.0 (post-Phase-2-target ≥4.5).
- [ ] **Prereq 9:** LIVE-shopping-studio-build-in-progress (Ring-light + iPhone-15-Pro + tripod + lavalier-mic + 1080p-webcam + backdrop + teleprompter-app ordered).
- [ ] **Prereq 10:** TikTok-Shop-affiliate-program-commission-structure-documented (20-30%-of-GMV commission + 30-day-cookie-window).

**Gate-pass criterion:** All 10 prereqs pass → proceed to Phase 3.

---

numberedSections.heading: 3.1 LIVE-shopping-studio-built + tested
numberedSections.body:
Per research/11 Pillar 4 LIVE-shopping-launch + Pitfall #10 LIVE-shopping.

```
LIVE-SHOPPING-STUDIO-BUILD (paste-ready checklist)

[ ] 1. Ring-light ($30-$100; Neewer or Aputure)
[ ] 2. iPhone-15-Pro OR equivalent ($800-$1,200)

Total cost: $1,060-$2,010 one-time + $30-$80/mo backup-internet
Tested: 2 test-LIVE-sessions-with-internal-team before public-launch
```

numberedSections.heading: 3.2 4-hour-week-LIVE-cadence-schedule
numberedSections.body:
Per research/11 Pillar 4 + Pitfall #10 LIVE-shopping.

**4-hour-week-LIVE-cadence-schedule:**
- **1 LIVE-session per week** (60-90 minutes per session per TikTok-LIVE-2024-benchmarks)
- **Optimal time-slot:** 7-9 PM ET (Tue / Wed / Thu) per TikTok-LIVE-2024-benchmarks
- **Operator time-commitment:** 4-6 hr/wk (1 hr prep + 1-1.5 hr LIVE + 1-2 hr post-production + 1 hr analytics)
- **First 4-week-cadence:** 4 LIVE-sessions in Weeks 7-10 (1 per week)
- **Steady-state-cadence:** 4-8 LIVE-sessions per month in Week 11+

numberedSections.heading: 3.3 5-segment-LIVE-show-runner-script-template tested
numberedSections.body:
Per research/11 Pillar 4 + Pitfall #11 LIVE-shopping.

```
5-SEGMENT-LIVE-SHOW-RUNNER-SCRIPT-TEMPLATE (paste-ready, 60-90 min total)

Segment 1 (0-10 min): Product-intro with hero-SKU
- Hook: "Hey everyone, I'm [BRAND_NAME] and tonight we're LIVE with [HERO_SKU_NAME]..."
- Show product-on-table + zoom-into-label + read 3-key-benefits
- Mention TikTok-Shop-flash-sale (15%-off for LIVE-viewers-only, valid 60-min)

Segment 2 (10-25 min): Demo
- Apply / use / cook / wear / assemble / display hero-SKU
- Show real-world-use-case with lifestyle-context
- Mention creator-endorsement: "Our creator [CREATOR_NAME] did this exact demo..."

Segment 3 (25-40 min): Q&A with chat-responder
- Read 5-10 live-chat questions
- Answer each in 1-2 sentences with product-positioning
- Chat-responder (separate operator) handles order-questions + product-specs + shipping-questions

Segment 4 (40-55 min): Creator-guest-takeover
- Pre-recorded-video OR live-call-in from 1-creator-guest
- Creator-guest does 5-10-min product-endorsement + 5-10-min LIVE-product-demo
- Operator facilitates handoff: "Thanks [CREATOR_NAME]! Now let's hear from you..."

Segment 5 (55-65 min): Closing-limited-time-offer with TikTok-Shop-flash-sale
- Re-state TikTok-Shop-flash-sale: 15%-off for LIVE-viewers-only, valid 60-min
- Mention bonus-bundle: "Order in the next 10 min and get [BONUS_SKU] free..."
- End-LIVE: "Thanks for watching! We'll be back next [DAY] at [TIME]..."
```

numberedSections.heading: 3.4 First LIVE-session-launched + Shop-Score-monitored
numberedSections.body:
Per research/11 Pillar 4 + Pitfall #12 LIVE-shopping.

**First LIVE-session-launched (Week 7):**

2. Track LIVE-session-metrics: viewers + chat-messages + click-throughs + TikTok-Shop-GMV-during-LIVE
3. Path B target for first LIVE-session: 500-2,000 viewers + 100-500 chat-messages + 50-200 click-throughs + $5k-$25k TikTok-Shop-GMV-during-LIVE

**Shop-Score-monitored daily:**
1. Daily-check: positive-review-rate + ship-on-time-rate + return-rate + chat-response-rate + chat-response-time
2. Daily-TikTok-Shop-Seller-Center-dashboard-check
3. Target: Shop-Score 4.5+ by end of Phase 3

numberedSections.heading: 3.5 TikTok-Shop-affiliate-program-launched + commission-structure-set
numberedSections.body:
Per Move #15-affiliate-program playbook-16 + research/11 Pillar 2.

**TikTok-Shop-affiliate-program-launch (~2 hours):**
1. TikTok-Shop-Seller-Center → Affiliate → Program → create-program

numberedSections.heading: 3.6 Triple-Whale-LIVE-cohort-LTV-overlay running
numberedSections.body:
Per research/11 Pillar 5 cohort-LTV-iteration.

**Triple-Whale-LIVE-cohort-LTV-overlay (~1 hour setup + 2 hours/week iteration):**
1. Triple-Whale admin → Cohorts → LIVE-driven-cohort (visitors-during-LIVE-window)
2. Wire LIVE-cohort-LTV-overlay vs organic-DTC-cohort-LTV vs paid-Meta-cohort-LTV at 30/60/90-day windows
3. Weekly-iteration: identify top-decile-LIVE-cohorts + boost them with Spark-Ads + creator-affiliate-reinvestment
4. Path B target: LIVE-cohort-LTV 1.2-1.5× organic-DTC-cohort-LTV per TikTok-LIVE-2024-benchmarks

playbooks.title: Goal
meta: Aspire-or-Collabstr-creator-discovery-platform-onboarded + 8-prereq-creator-economy-onboarding-pack complete + first-50-micro-creator onboarded — per the canonical creator-discovery-platform-selection from research/12 Pillar 1; Aspire SaaS $0-$2k/mo OR agency $500-$2k/mo OR Collabstr 10%-of-creator-payment for SMB-mid-market ($500k-$5M GMV); brands at $5M+ GMV should consider GRIN ($2.5k+/mo) or CreatorIQ ($2.5k+/mo) for enterprise-creator-relationship-management. Wire Triple-Whale creator-cohort-LTV-overlay for per-creator + per-content-piece + per-platform measurement (a brand without creator-aware-attribution undercounts creator-driven-DTC-attribution by 30-50% per Triple-Whale-2024-benchmarks; this is the same 30-50% undercount as TikTok-Shop-cohort-overlay per Move #15.x Pillar 5). Onboard 50-100 micro-creators (1k-10k-followers per Move-#15-affiliate-program-benchmarks) via product-seeding-only $0 + free-product. Build the canonical 5-payout-creator-economy-structures [product-seeding-only $0 / micro-CPS 15-30%-of-GMV / mid-tier-CPS 20-30%-of-GMV + $100-base-fee / macro-flat-fee $500-$5k/creator/campaign / enterprise-hybrid 5%-of-GMV + $1k-base-fee + content-licensing + whitelisting-rights]. Gate on Move #6 Triple-Whale-attribution so creator-driven-cohort-LTV is measurable + Move #15 affiliate-program Playbook 16 live for affiliate-program-overlap-coordination. Expected outcome: 50-100 active micro-creators + $50k-$250k first-quarter creator-driven-revenue.

Mid-tier-creator-onboarded + content-licensing-template-executed + whitelisting-ads-template-executed + Triple-Whale creator-content-cohort-LTV-measurement wired — per research/12 Pillar 3 content-licensing + whitelisting-ads architecture; canonical 3-clause content-licensing-template [perpetual-organic-usage + 90-day-paid-amplification + creator-attribution-required per Awin 2024 + Impact 2024 benchmarks] + canonical whitelisting-ads-template [creator-grants-brand-permission-to-run-creator-content-as-brand-paid-ads per Move #15.x Pillar 3 Spark-Ads-boost pattern + Meta-Brand-Collabs-Manager 2024 + TikTok-Creator-Marketplace-2024 + YouTube-Shorts-Paid-Discovery-2024] + canonical 5-payout-creator-economy-structures contract-template [product-seeding-only + micro-CPS + mid-tier-CPS + macro-flat-fee + enterprise-hybrid]. Build the canonical creator-content-brief-templates [per-SKU per-voice creator-content-brief-template with 5 voice profiles × 6 SKU archetypes = 30 voice-variant creator-briefs per Move #15.x Asset 19 pattern]. Per Awin 2024 + Impact 2024 benchmarks: content-licensing + whitelisting unlocks 2-4× creator-content-ROI vs no-licensing-no-whitelisting (the creator-content can be re-promoted across brand's paid channels indefinitely).

Macro-creator-flagship-campaign-launched + creator-affiliate-program-bridge-live + GRIN-or-CreatorIQ-enterprise-CRM wired — per research/12 Pillar 4 creator-tier-promotion + content-licensing-renewal + creator-churn-management framework; canonical 4-trigger-SOP [volume + cohort-LTV + content-quality + tenure for promoting micro-to-mid-tier + mid-tier-to-macro per Move-#15-affiliate-program-tier-promotion-pattern] + canonical creator-affiliate-program-bridge [each macro-creator gets unique-affiliate-program-code + Triple-Whale-cohort-overlay so creator-driven-affiliate-attribution is measurable per Move #15 Pillar 4] + canonical GRIN-or-CreatorIQ-enterprise-CRM [CRM + creator-content-approval-workflow + creator-payout-orchestration + brand-safety-verification + creator-content-licensing-tracking per FTC 2024 16-CFR-Part-255] + canonical 90-day-content-licensing-renewal-or-sunset-decision per content-piece-level-ROI-data from Triple-Whale-creator-cohort-overlay. Per Tubular Labs 2024 + Awin 2024 benchmarks: enterprise-creator-CRM unlocks 1.5-2× creator-program-ROI vs spreadsheet-based-management for brands with 100+ active creators.

Steady-state creator-economy-program live + creator-tier-promotion-SOP running + Triple-Whale creator-economy-cohort-LTV-iteration-cycle weekly + content-licensing-renewal-cadence 90-day — per research/12 Pillar 5 Triple-Whale-creator-cohort-LTV-overlay + 5-way-comparison + creator-economy-program-ROI framework; canonical 5-way-cohort-comparison [creator-economy-driven-cohort-LTV vs organic-DTC-cohort-LTV vs paid-Meta-cohort-LTV vs affiliate-program-driven-cohort-LTV (Move #15) vs TikTok-Shop-driven-cohort-LTV (Move #15.x) at 30/60/90-day windows] + canonical creator-economy-program-ROI [total-creator-driven-revenue / total-creator-economy-cost-stack at 30/60/90-day windows; brands with creator-economy-program-ROI ≥5:1 are in the canonical "great" band per Tubular Labs 2024 + Aspire 2024 benchmarks] + canonical creator-churn-management [30-50%-annual micro-creator-churn + 15-25%-annual mid-tier-creator-churn + 5-10%-annual macro-creator-churn per Awin 2024 + Impact 2024 + Aspire 2024 benchmarks]. Per Tubular Labs 2024 + Aspire 2024 benchmarks: brands with steady-state creator-economy-program + Triple-Whale-creator-cohort-LTV-overlay achieve 2-4× LTV-multiplier vs no-creator-economy-program brands.

Steady-state creator-economy-program live + 8:1 default Year-1 ROI Path B validated + 2-4× LTV-multiplier vs no-creator-economy-program validated — research/12 §Cost & ROI steady-state benchmarks; $200k-$1M Path B Year-1 incremental creator-economy-revenue at $500k-$5M US DTC base per Aspire 2024 + Tubular Labs 2024 benchmarks; 8:1 default Year-1 ROI Path B at $2M US DTC base ($500k Path B median incremental creator-economy-revenue / $30k median annual cost = 16.7:1 gross; conservative with creator-economy-build-cycle + creator-churn-rate = 8:1 conservative nominal; 2-4× LTV-multiplier per Tubular Labs 2024 + Aspire 2024 benchmarks); 10-30% incremental creator-economy-revenue at $500k+ GMV base per Aspire 2024 + Collabstr 2024 + Tubular Labs 2024 benchmarks.

numberedSections.heading: 1.1 Creator-discovery-platform-account-selected + admin-access-verified
numberedSections.body:
Per research/12 Pillar 1 + Pitfall #1 creator-discovery-platform-selection.

```
CREATOR-DISCOVERY-PLATFORM-SELECTION (decision tree)

For $100k-$500k GMV brands (Path A):
  → Collabstr 10%-of-creator-payment OR Aspire SaaS free tier
  → Best for cash-constrained first-time creator-economy-test

For $500k-$5M GMV brands (Path B DEFAULT):
  → Aspire SaaS $0-$2k/mo (self-serve) OR Aspire agency $500-$2k/mo (full-service)
  → Best for mid-market creator-economy-program with 50-200 active creators

For $5M+ GMV brands (Path C):
  → Aspire + GRIN $2.5k+/mo OR CreatorIQ $2.5k+/mo
  → Best for enterprise creator-relationship-management with 200+ active creators + dedicated-manager

For luxury-DTC-brands with MAP-policy-guardrails (Path D):
  → Single-macro-creator-flagship-campaign-only
  → Best for quarterly-flagship-campaign-rhythm with content-licensing-with-MAP-policy-guardrails

For pre-revenue / pre-launch / defer (Path E):
  → No platform; defer creator-economy until DTC + creator-substrate is steady-state
```

```
CREATOR-DISCOVERY-PLATFORM-ONBOARDING

[ ] 1. Select platform per decision-tree above (Path A/B/C/D)
[ ] 2. Sign-up at platform website (Aspire: aspire.io / Collabstr: collabstr.com / GRIN: grin.co / CreatorIQ: creatoriq.com / Tagger: tagger.io)
[ ] 3. Brand-info: legal-entity-name + DBA + EIN + brand-website + brand-registration-certificate + product-insurance $1M+ general-liability + $1M product-liability
[ ] 4. Connect payment-method (credit-card or ACH for monthly-platform-fee + creator-payouts)
[ ] 5. Verify admin-access (full read/write on creator-portfolio + creator-discovery + creator-payouts + creator-analytics)
[ ] 6. Set creator-tier-mix-baseline (60% micro + 30% mid-tier + 10% macro per Move-#15-affiliate-program-benchmarks)
[ ] 7. Set creator-tier-targets (micro-creator-pool-baseline ≥50 for Path B / ≥100 for Path C)
[ ] 8. Approval-timeline 1-7 days for SaaS-platforms (Aspire / Collabstr / Tagger); 14-30 days for enterprise-platforms (GRIN / CreatorIQ)
[ ] 9. Rejection-rate <5% for SaaS-platforms per Aspire 2024 + Collabstr 2024 benchmarks; 10-20% for enterprise-platforms per GRIN 2024 + CreatorIQ 2024 benchmarks
```

**Decision criterion:** All 5 creator-discovery-platforms have specific onboarding-requirements. Brands with missing documentation should defer Phase 1 by 2-4 weeks while assembling.

numberedSections.heading: 1.2 Creator-tier-mix-baseline-audit + creator-content-budget-baseline
numberedSections.body:
Per research/12 Pillar 1 + Pitfall #2 creator-payout-structure.

```
CREATOR-TIER-MIX-BASELINE-AUDIT (paste-ready checklist)

Run on existing-brand-portfolio 30 days before Phase 1:

[ ] 1. Current-micro-creator-count (creators with 1k-10k-followers)
[ ] 2. Current-mid-tier-creator-count (creators with 10k-100k-followers)
[ ] 3. Current-macro-creator-count (creators with 100k+-followers)
[ ] 4. Per-platform-distribution (TikTok + Instagram + YouTube + Substack + podcast + UGC-creators)
[ ] 5. Per-creator-tier-engagement-rate (average-engagement-rate-per-post per tier)
[ ] 6. Per-creator-tier-conversion-rate (creator-driven-attributed-CVR per tier)

Computed-baseline creator-tier-mix:
- micro ≥30 + mid-tier ≥10 + macro ≥5 → Path B-ready (proceed to Phase 1)
- micro ≥10 + mid-tier ≥3 + macro 0 → Path A-ready (start with micro-creator-UGC only)
- micro <10 → defer creator-economy until micro-pool is built per Aspire 2024 benchmarks
```

```
CREATOR-CONTENT-BUDGET-BASELINE (paste-ready checklist)

[ ] 1. Content-seeding-cost ≥$500/mo (product-gifting + shipping-subsidy for 10-100 micro-creators/mo)
[ ] 2. Macro-creator-flagship-campaign-cost $5k-$25k/quarter (for 1-5 macro-creator-flagship-campaigns per quarter)
[ ] 3. Content-licensing-template-legal-fees $0-$5k one-time (3-clause-content-licensing-agreement drafted with legal-counsel)
[ ] 4. Whitelisting-ads-template-legal-fees $0-$5k one-time (whitelisting-ads-agreement drafted with legal-counsel)
[ ] 5. Platform-fee $0-$2k/mo (Aspire SaaS) OR $500-$2k/mo (Aspire agency) OR $2.5k+/mo (GRIN/CreatorIQ)
[ ] 6. Triple-Whale-Starter-or-Pro $179-$1,290/mo (creator-cohort-overlay-wire)
[ ] 7. Klaviyo-Standard-or-Email-and-SMS $0-$45/mo (creator-content-flows)
[ ] 8. Total Year-1 creator-economy-budget-baseline: $24,000-$58,000 Path B at $500k-$5M GMV per research/12 §Cost & ROI estimate
```

numberedSections.heading: 1.3 8-prereq creator-economy-onboarding-pack compiled
numberedSections.body:
Per research/12 §Verification gates Gate A prerequisite 8; canonical 8-prereq onboarding-pack.

```
8-PREREQ CREATOR-ECONOMY-ONBOARDING-PACK (paste-ready checklist)

[ ] 1. Creator-discovery-platform-account-live (Aspire SaaS OR agency OR Collabstr OR GRIN OR CreatorIQ OR Tagger) with admin-access + payment-method-verified
[ ] 2. Creator-tier-mix-baseline-audit-completed (current-micro-count + mid-tier-count + macro-count + per-platform-distribution)
[ ] 3. Creator-content-budget-baseline-verified ($500/mo for content-seeding + product-gifting + shipping-subsidy + $5k-$25k/quarter for macro-creator-flagship-campaigns)
[ ] 4. Content-licensing-template-drafted-with-legal-counsel (3-clause: perpetual-organic-usage + 90-day-paid-amplification + creator-attribution-required per Awin 2024 + Impact 2024 benchmarks)
[ ] 5. Whitelisting-ads-template-drafted-with-legal-counsel (creator-grants-brand-permission-to-run-creator-content-as-brand-paid-ads per Move #15.x Pillar 3 Spark-Ads-boost pattern)
[ ] 6. FTC-compliance-disclosure-language-SOP-drafted (16-CFR-Part-255 + #ad + #sponsored + #partner + #gifted per FTC-2024-enforcement)
[ ] 7. Triple-Whale-creator-cohort-overlay-Wire-live with creator-cohort-overlay + post-purchase-survey with creator-source-tracking + creator-driven-affiliate-code-attribution per Move #15 Pillar 4 cohort-LTV-measurement pattern
[ ] 8. Creator-economy-attribution-platform-setup (Move #6 Triple-Whale attribution-7-gates-pass-verified + creator-cohort-overlay-wire + Move #15 affiliate-program-live for cross-pollination + Move #15.x TikTok-Shop-creator-affiliate-pool-live for cross-platform-coordinator per Awin 2024 + Impact 2024 benchmarks)

Compiled PDFs / certs / templates in /shared-drive/creator-economy-onboarding-pack/ with 14-day-onboarding-lead-time before first-creator-outreach.
```

numberedSections.heading: 1.4 First-50-micro-creator-UGC-outreach-via-Collabstr-or-Aspire
numberedSections.body:
Per research/12 Pillar 2 + Pitfall #3 content-licensing + whitelisting.

```
FIRST-50-MICRO-CREATOR-UGC-OUTREACH-VIA-COLLABSTR-OR-ASPIRE (paste-ready checklist)

[ ] 1. Open Collabstr dashboard (app.collabstr.com) OR Aspire dashboard (app.aspire.io)
[ ] 2. Filter creator-discovery by platform (TikTok / Instagram / YouTube / Substack) + niche (your-product-category) + audience-size (1k-10k-followers = micro-tier)
[ ] 3. Sort by engagement-rate (≥3% per Collabstr 2024 / Aspire 2024 benchmarks)
[ ] 4. For each candidate creator:
     a. Review creator-portfolio (recent-content-quality + audience-demographics + brand-safety)
     b. Verify creator-FTC-compliance-track-record (no past-violations per #ad-disclosure-monitoring-process)
     c. Review creator-audience-overlap-with-brand-target-demo (TikTok-18-34-audience-skew ≥40% per Move #15.x benchmarks)
     d. Save creator to "outreach-list" with creator-handle + creator-platform + creator-tier
[ ] 5. Send first-outreach-email per creator-discovery-outreach-template (5-component: introduction + product-seeding-offer + creator-content-brief-link + FTC-disclosure-requirement + reply-by-date)
[ ] 6. Track first-outreach-response-rate (target ≥20% per Collabstr 2024 benchmarks; ≥30% per Aspire 2024 benchmarks for SMB-mid-market)
[ ] 7. Send follow-up-email to non-responders after 5-business-days (target ≥10% additional-response-rate)
[ ] 8. For responders: schedule creator-discovery-call (15-min-call to walk-through-product + creator-content-brief + FTC-compliance + product-seeding-fulfillment)
[ ] 9. For committed-creators: send product-seeding (free-product + shipping-label-paid-by-brand + tracking-number-uploaded-within-24-hours-of-creator-request per Tubular Labs 2024 creator-product-seeding-SLA)
[ ] 10. Expected-outcome: 50-100 micro-creators-onboarded by end of Week-4 (with product-seeding-only-payout-structure $0 + free-product)
```

**Decision criterion:** Brands with <10-micro-creator-pool-baseline OR no-creator-discovery-platform-account should defer Phase 1 by 2-4 weeks while assembling. Brands with >100-active-micro-creators should consider Path C enterprise-CRM upgrade.

numberedSections.heading: 1.5 Triple-Whale-creator-cohort-LTV-Wire live
numberedSections.body:
Per research/12 Pillar 5 + Pitfall #11 attribution-measurement.

```
TRIPLE-WHALE-CREATOR-COHORT-LTV-WIRE (paste-ready checklist)

[ ] 1. Open Triple Whale dashboard (app.triplewhale.com)
[ ] 2. Settings → Cohorts → Create Cohort → name: "creator_economy_micro" → filter: UTM-source contains "creator_" OR creator-handle-property matches outreach-list
[ ] 3. Settings → Cohorts → Create Cohort → name: "creator_economy_content" → filter: landing-page-utm-content contains "creator-content" OR post-purchase-survey-creator-source matches outreach-list
[ ] 4. Settings → Cohorts → Create Cohort → name: "creator_economy_affiliate_bridge" → filter: UTM-source contains "creator_affiliate_" OR affiliate-code matches creator-handle
[ ] 5. Settings → Post-Purchase-Survey → Add Question "How did you discover us?" with options [TikTok / Instagram / YouTube / Substack / podcast / search / other] + add creator-handle field for free-text
[ ] 6. Settings → Integrations → Klaviyo (post-purchase-survey-creator-source → Klaviyo-creator-source-property)
[ ] 7. Settings → Integrations → Shopify (creator-driven-affiliate-code → Shopify-discount-code-attribution)
[ ] 8. Verify Triple-Whale-creator-cohort-overlay-Wire firing per creator-content-post (test with 1-internal-creator-content-post + verify cohort-population)
[ ] 9. Generate weekly-creator-content-cohort-LTV-report (creator-content-driven-cohort vs organic-DTC-cohort vs paid-Meta-cohort at 30/60/90-day windows)
[ ] 10. Expected-outcome: Triple-Whale-creator-cohort-overlay-Wire-live with 50-100-micro-creator-cohort-attribution validated
```

**Decision criterion:** Brands without Triple-Whale-creator-cohort-overlay-Wire cannot measure creator-economy-driven-DTC-attribution-overlap; undercount creator-economy-driven-attribution by 30-50% per Triple-Whale-2024-benchmarks. Brands with Triple-Whale-Pro-Wire should add creator-cohort-overlay-Standard to creator-cohort-overlay-Pro for full 5-way-comparison.

numberedSections.heading: 1.6 Klaviyo-creator-content-flows live (creator-content-welcome + creator-driven-cart-abandon + creator-driven-post-purchase)
numberedSections.body:
Per research/12 Pillar 2 + Pitfall #3 content-licensing + whitelisting + Klaviyo-creator-content-flow-extensions.

```
KLAVIYO-CREATOR-CONTENT-FLOWS (paste-ready checklist)

[ ] 1. Open Klaviyo dashboard (app.klaviyo.com)
[ ] 2. Flows → Create Flow → name: "creator-content-welcome-flow"
     Trigger: "Placed Order" with property "creator-source" is set
     Email 1: "Welcome from [Creator-Handle]" with creator-content-hero-image + creator-endorsement + 10%-off-creator-code (valid 7 days)
     Email 2 (Day 3): "More from [Creator-Handle]" with creator-content-secondary-product + creator-storytelling
     SMS 1 (Day 5): "Check out [Creator-Handle]'s other favorites" with creator-content-link
[ ] 3. Flows → Create Flow → name: "creator-driven-cart-abandon"
     Trigger: "Started Checkout" with property "creator-source" is set
     Email 1 (1-hr): "[Creator-Handle] noticed you left [Product] in your cart" with creator-content-cart-abandon-aware
     Email 2 (24-hr): "Last chance: [Creator-Handle]'s favorite is going fast" with creator-content-urgency
[ ] 4. Flows → Create Flow → name: "creator-driven-post-purchase"
     Trigger: "Placed Order" with property "creator-source" is set
     Email 1 (Day 7): "[Creator-Handle] wants to know how you like [Product]" with creator-content-review-prompt
     Email 2 (Day 30): "More from [Creator-Handle]" with creator-content-cross-sell
[ ] 5. Verify all 3 flows firing per creator-driven-purchase (test with 1-internal-creator-driven-purchase)
[ ] 6. Expected-outcome: Klaviyo-creator-content-flows-live with creator-driven-cart-abandon + creator-driven-post-purchase + creator-content-welcome-flow all firing
```

**Decision criterion:** Brands with Klaviyo-Standard-only should use email-only flows (skip SMS); brands with Klaviyo-Email-and-SMS $45/mo should use full email+SMS flows per Move #11 subscription-program + Move #15 affiliate-program + Move #15.x TikTok-Shop benchmarks.

numberedSections.heading: 2.1 First-20-mid-tier-creator-onboarding-via-Aspire
numberedSections.body:
Per research/12 Pillar 2 + Pitfall #2 creator-payout-structure.

```
FIRST-20-MID-TIER-CREATOR-ONBOARDING-VIA-ASPIRE (paste-ready checklist)

[ ] 1. Open Aspire dashboard (app.aspire.io)
[ ] 2. Filter creator-discovery by platform + niche + audience-size (10k-100k-followers = mid-tier)
[ ] 3. Sort by engagement-rate (≥2.5% per Aspire 2024 benchmarks)
[ ] 4. For each candidate creator:
     a. Review creator-portfolio (recent-content-quality + audience-demographics + brand-safety)
     b. Verify creator-FTC-compliance-track-record
     c. Review creator-audience-overlap-with-brand-target-demo (40%+ Gen-Z-or-Millennial-audience-skew)
     d. Save creator to "mid-tier-outreach-list"
[ ] 5. Send mid-tier-outreach-email per creator-discovery-outreach-template (5-component: introduction + product-seeding-offer + mid-tier-CPS 20-30%-of-GMV + $100-base-fee + content-licensing-rights + FTC-disclosure-requirement + reply-by-date)
[ ] 6. Track mid-tier-outreach-response-rate (target ≥15% per Aspire 2024 benchmarks)
[ ] 7. Send follow-up-email to non-responders after 5-business-days
[ ] 8. For responders: schedule creator-discovery-call + send creator-payout-contract-template with mid-tier-CPS-terms
[ ] 9. For committed-creators: sign creator-content-licensing-agreement + creator-payout-contract + send product-seeding
[ ] 10. Expected-outcome: 20-50 mid-tier-creators-onboarded by end of Week-10 (with mid-tier-CPS 20-30%-of-GMV + $100-base-fee + content-licensing-rights)
```

numberedSections.heading: 2.2 Content-licensing-template-execution + whitelisting-ads-template-execution
numberedSections.body:
Per research/12 Pillar 3 + Pitfall #3 content-licensing + whitelisting.

```
CONTENT-LICENSING-TEMPLATE-EXECUTION (paste-ready checklist)

For each creator-committed in Phase 2:

[ ] 1. Open creator-payout-contract-template (5-clause: payout-terms + content-licensing + whitelisting + termination + indemnity)
[ ] 2. Walk-through with creator (15-min-call to explain 3-clause-content-licensing-agreement):
     Clause 1: "Creator grants Brand perpetual-organic-usage-rights to creator-content on Brand-owned channels (Brand-website + Brand-social + Brand-email)"
     Clause 2: "Creator grants Brand 90-day-paid-amplification-rights to creator-content on Brand-paid-channels (Meta-Ads + TikTok-Ads + YouTube-Ads)"
     Clause 3: "Creator requires attribution (creator-handle + creator-platform-link) on all Brand-republished-creator-content"
[ ] 3. Walk-through with creator (15-min-call to explain whitelisting-ads-agreement):
     Clause 1: "Creator grants Brand permission to run creator-content-as-brand-paid-ads via Meta-Brand-Collabs-Manager + TikTok-Creator-Marketplace + YouTube-Shorts-Paid-Discovery"
     Clause 2: "Creator approves Brand-ad-copy using creator-content (Brand may edit creator-content for ad-format-fit; creator reviews-edits within 48-hours)"
     Clause 3: "Whitelisting-ads-budget $0-$500/creator/campaign per quarter (Brand-paid; creator-receives-fixed-fee-instead-of-discount-driven-commission)"
[ ] 4. E-signature via DocuSign or HelloSign
[ ] 5. Store signed-content-licensing-agreement + signed-whitelisting-ads-agreement in /shared-drive/creator-content-licensing/
[ ] 6. Send welcome-email to creator with creator-content-brief-template + creator-content-publishing-calendar
[ ] 7. Expected-outcome: 20-50 content-licensing-agreements + 20-50 whitelisting-ads-agreements executed by end of Week-10
```

**Decision criterion:** Brands with luxury-MAP-policy-protected-SKUs should use creator-content-licensing-with-MAP-policy-guardrails (no-public-discount-codes + creator-receives-fixed-fee-instead-of-discount-driven-commission) per Faire 2024 + Ankorstore 2024 cross-reference.

numberedSections.heading: 2.3 Triple-Whale-creator-content-cohort-LTV-measurement wired
numberedSections.body:
Per research/12 Pillar 5 + Pitfall #11 attribution-measurement.

```
TRIPLE-WHALE-CREATOR-CONTENT-COHORT-LTV-MEASUREMENT (paste-ready checklist)

[ ] 1. Open Triple Whale dashboard (app.triplewhale.com)
[ ] 2. Settings → Cohorts → Create Cohort → name: "creator_economy_mid_tier_content"
     Filter: landing-page-utm-content contains "creator-content" AND cohort-overlap-with "creator_economy_micro" within last 30-days
[ ] 3. Settings → Cohorts → Create Cohort → name: "creator_economy_mid_tier_licensing"
     Filter: UTM-source contains "creator_licensing_" AND content-piece-id-matches-licensing-tracker
[ ] 4. Settings → Reports → Create Report → "weekly-creator-content-cohort-LTV-report"
     Cohorts: "creator_economy_micro" + "creator_economy_mid_tier_content" + "organic_DTC" + "paid_meta"
     Time-windows: 30-day + 60-day + 90-day
     Metrics: LTV + CAC + LTV:CAC + repeat-purchase-rate
[ ] 5. Schedule weekly-report-email (every Monday 9am) to operator-team@brand.com
[ ] 6. Verify report firing per creator-content-post (test with 1-internal-mid-tier-creator-content-post)
[ ] 7. Expected-outcome: Triple-Whale-creator-content-cohort-LTV-report generating weekly-creator-content-driven-cohort-LTV vs organic-DTC-cohort-LTV vs paid-Meta-cohort-LTV comparison
```

numberedSections.heading: 2.4 First-100-creator-content-posts-live + FTC-compliance-disclosure-language-verified
numberedSections.body:
Per research/12 §Verification gates Gate B prerequisite 5 + Pitfall #12 FTC-compliance-disclosure-language.

```
FIRST-100-CREATOR-CONTENT-POSTS-LIVE (paste-ready checklist)

[ ] 1. Each of the 50-100 micro-creators + 20-50 mid-tier-creators publishes ≥1 creator-content-post
[ ] 2. FTC-compliance-disclosure-language-verified on 100% of posts per creator-economy-FTC-compliance-SOP:
     a. TikTok-creator-content: includes "#ad" or "#sponsored" or "#partner" or "#gifted" in first 3 lines of caption
     b. Instagram-creator-content: includes "#ad" or "#sponsored" or "#partner" or "#gifted" + "Paid partnership with [Brand-Name]" tag
     c. YouTube-creator-content: includes "#ad" or "#sponsored" in description + "Includes paid promotion" checkbox
     d. Substack-creator-content: includes "Affiliate disclosure: [Brand-Name] compensated me for this review"
[ ] 3. Verify FTC-compliance via manual-review of 10%-of-creator-content-posts per week
[ ] 4. Auto-monitor via Triple-Whale-creator-cohort-overlay (creator-content-with-disclaimer = cohort-A; creator-content-without-disclaimer = cohort-B; alert operator-team if cohort-B-cohort-attribution-rate-spikes)
[ ] 5. First $50k-$250k creator-economy-driven-revenue verified via Triple-Whale-creator-cohort-overlay + creator-discovery-platform-analytics
[ ] 6. Expected-outcome: 100-creator-content-posts-live with FTC-compliance-disclosure-language-verified + $50k-$250k first-quarter-creator-driven-revenue
```

numberedSections.heading: 2.5 Klaviyo-creator-content-flows-extended (creator-content-newsletter + creator-driven-replenishment + creator-driven-subscription-bridge)
numberedSections.body:
Per research/12 §Verification gates Gate B prerequisite 7 + Pitfall #9 creator-content-flow-extensions.

```
KLAVIYO-CREATOR-CONTENT-FLOWS-EXTENDED (paste-ready checklist)

[ ] 1. Open Klaviyo dashboard (app.klaviyo.com)
[ ] 2. Flows → Create Flow → name: "creator-content-newsletter"
     Trigger: "Placed Order" with property "creator-source" is set
     Cadence: monthly-newsletter with creator-content-roundup + creator-handle-highlights
[ ] 3. Flows → Create Flow → name: "creator-driven-replenishment"
     Trigger: "Placed Order" with property "creator-source" is set AND product is replenishable (food / pet / vitamins / supplements / personal care / household / beauty / baby / beverage / cosmetics / skincare / oral care)
     Cadence: per-product-replenishment-cadence (30-day / 60-day / 90-day / 120-day)
[ ] 4. Flows → Create Flow → name: "creator-driven-subscription-bridge"
     Trigger: "Placed Order" with property "creator-source" is set AND customer has not subscribed yet
     Email 1 (Day 14): "[Creator-Handle] loves our subscription program" with subscription-discount-offer
     Email 2 (Day 30): "Subscribe + get [Creator-Handle]'s favorite free"
[ ] 5. Verify all 3 extended flows firing
[ ] 6. Expected-outcome: Klaviyo-creator-content-flows-extended with creator-content-newsletter + creator-driven-replenishment + creator-driven-subscription-bridge all firing
```

numberedSections.heading: 3.1 First-5-15-macro-creator-flagship-campaign-onboarding-via-Aspire-+-GRIN/CreatorIQ
numberedSections.body:
Per research/12 Pillar 2 + Pitfall #2 creator-payout-structure.

```
FIRST-5-15-MACRO-CREATOR-FLAGSHIP-CAMPAIGN-ONBOARDING (paste-ready checklist)

[ ] 1. Open Aspire + GRIN/CreatorIQ dashboard (for brands at $5M+ GMV considering Path C enterprise-CRM)
[ ] 2. Filter creator-discovery by platform + niche + audience-size (100k+-followers = macro-tier)
[ ] 3. Sort by engagement-rate (≥2% per Aspire 2024 + GRIN 2024 + CreatorIQ 2024 benchmarks)
[ ] 4. For each candidate creator:
     a. Review creator-portfolio (recent-flagship-campaigns + audience-demographics + brand-safety)
     b. Verify creator-FTC-compliance-track-record (no past-violations)
     c. Review creator-audience-overlap-with-brand-target-demo (40%+ Gen-Z-or-Millennial-audience-skew OR creator-led-brand-voice-fit)
     d. Verify creator-cross-platform-presence (TikTok + Instagram + YouTube + Substack for cross-platform-post)
     e. Save creator to "macro-flagship-outreach-list"
[ ] 5. Send macro-flagship-outreach-email per creator-discovery-outreach-template (5-component: introduction + macro-flat-fee $500-$5k/creator/campaign + content-licensing + whitelisting + cross-platform-post + FTC-disclosure + reply-by-date)
[ ] 6. Track macro-flagship-outreach-response-rate (target ≥30% per Aspire 2024 + GRIN 2024 + CreatorIQ 2024 benchmarks for enterprise-creator-pool)
[ ] 7. For responders: schedule creator-discovery-call (60-min-call to walk-through-flagship-campaign + content-licensing + whitelisting + cross-platform-post)
[ ] 8. For committed-creators: sign creator-content-licensing-agreement + creator-whitelisting-ads-agreement + creator-flagship-campaign-contract-template + send product-seeding
[ ] 9. Expected-outcome: 5-15 macro-creators-onboarded by end of Week-18 (with macro-flat-fee $500-$5k/creator/campaign + content-licensing + whitelisting-rights + cross-platform-post)
```

numberedSections.heading: 3.2 Creator-affiliate-program-bridge-live

Per research/12 §Verification gates Gate C prerequisite 2 + Pitfall #13 creator-economy-vs-affiliate-program-distinction.

```
[ ] 2. Generate unique-affiliate-code per macro-creator (format: "creator_[handle]_v1")
[ ] 3. Wire Triple-Whale-creator-cohort-overlay per creator-affiliate-code (creator-driven-affiliate-attribution-measurable)
[ ] 4. Add creator-affiliate-onboarding to Move #15 affiliate-program Playbook 16:
     - Each macro-creator gets unique-affiliate-code + creator-cohort-overlay
     - Each macro-creator receives creator-affiliate-payout (10-30%-of-GMV per Move #15 5-voice-commission-tier-matrix)
     - Each macro-creator publishes creator-content with affiliate-code-link
[ ] 5. Verify creator-affiliate-program-bridge firing per macro-creator-content-post
[ ] 6. Expected-outcome: creator-affiliate-program-bridge-live with each macro-creator-attribution-measurable-via-Triple-Whale-cohort-overlay
```
