numberedSections.heading: 3.3 GRIN-or-CreatorIQ-enterprise-CRM-live (for Path C brands at $5M+ GMV)
numberedSections.body:
Per research/12 Pillar 4 + Pitfall #14 creator-economy-takes + content-licensing + whitelisting-ads in margin-math.

```
GRIN-OR-CREATORIQ-ENTERPRISE-CRM-LIVE (paste-ready checklist)

For brands at $5M+ GMV considering Path C:

[ ] 1. Sign-up for GRIN ($2.5k+/mo at grin.co) OR CreatorIQ ($2.5k+/mo at creatoriq.com)
[ ] 2. Migration: import 100-200+ existing-creators from Aspire/Collabstr to GRIN/CreatorIQ-enterprise-CRM
[ ] 3. Set up creator-content-approval-workflow (creator-submits-content → brand-reviews-content-within-48-hours → brand-approves-for-publishing)
[ ] 4. Set up creator-payout-orchestration (automated-monthly-creator-payouts via PayPal Mass Pay OR Wise)
[ ] 5. Set up brand-safety-verification (FTC-compliance-disclosure-language-monitoring per 16-CFR-Part-255)
[ ] 6. Set up creator-content-licensing-tracking (creator-content-with-licensing-rights-tracked-per-piece)
[ ] 7. Set up creator-content-usage-rights-management (per-content-piece-licensing-renewal-or-sunset-decision)
[ ] 8. Hire dedicated-creator-economy-manager ($4k-$6k/mo) OR promote existing-operator-to-creator-economy-manager
[ ] 9. Verify GRIN/CreatorIQ-enterprise-CRM firing per creator-content-publish
[ ] 10. Expected-outcome: GRIN/CreatorIQ-enterprise-CRM-live with creator-content-approval-workflow + creator-payout-orchestration + brand-safety-verification + creator-content-licensing-tracking for 100-200+ active-creators
```

numberedSections.heading: 3.4 First-4-macro-creator-flagship-campaigns-completed + creator-tier-promotion-SOP-live
numberedSections.body:
Per research/12 §Verification gates Gate C prerequisite 4-6 + Pitfall #7 creator-tier-promotion.

```
FIRST-4-MACRO-CREATOR-FLAGSHIP-CAMPAIGNS-COMPLETED (paste-ready checklist)

[ ] 1. First 4 macro-creator-flagship-campaigns-completed (with content-licensing + whitelisting + cross-platform-post)
[ ] 2. Document creator-economy-program-ROI per macro-creator-flagship-campaign:
     - Total-creator-driven-revenue per macro-creator (via Triple-Whale-creator-cohort-overlay)
     - Total-creator-payout per macro-creator (creator-flat-fee + content-licensing + whitelisting-ads)
     - Total-cost-stack per macro-creator (creator-payout + content-licensing + whitelisting-ads + GRIN/CreatorIQ + Triple-Whale + dedicated-manager)
     - Creator-economy-program-ROI per macro-creator = creator-driven-revenue / cost-stack
[ ] 3. Target: creator-economy-program-ROI ≥5:1 per macro-creator-flagship-campaign per Tubular Labs 2024 + Aspire 2024 benchmarks
[ ] 4. Creator-tier-promotion-SOP-live (4-trigger SOP [volume + cohort-LTV + content-quality + tenure] for promoting micro-to-mid-tier + mid-tier-to-macro per Move-#15-affiliate-program-tier-promotion-pattern):
     Trigger 1: Volume — creator has ≥50k-revenue-or-100k-impressions in last-90-days → promote-to-mid-tier OR macro-tier
     Trigger 2: Cohort-LTV — creator-driven-cohort-LTV ≥1.5× organic-DTC-cohort-LTV → promote-to-mid-tier OR macro-tier
     Trigger 3: Content-quality — creator-content-approval-rate ≥90% over last-90-days → promote-to-mid-tier OR macro-tier
     Trigger 4: Tenure — creator-active-for-≥180-days → promote-to-mid-tier OR macro-tier
[ ] 5. Run creator-tier-promotion-decision per creator (apply 4-trigger-SOP; ≥3-of-4-triggers-met → promote)
[ ] 6. 90-day-content-licensing-renewal-cadence-live (sunset creator-content-licensing with <0.5× average-creator-content-ROI; renew creator-content-licensing with ≥2× average-creator-content-ROI)
[ ] 7. Expected-outcome: 4-macro-creator-flagship-campaigns-completed with creator-economy-program-ROI ≥5:1 + creator-tier-promotion-SOP-running + 90-day-content-licensing-renewal-cadence-live
```

numberedSections.heading: 4.1 Creator-tier-promotion-SOP-steady-state
numberedSections.body:
Per research/12 §Verification gates Gate D prerequisite 1 + Pitfall #7 creator-tier-promotion.

```
CREATOR-TIER-PROMOTION-SOP-STEADY-STATE (paste-ready checklist)

[ ] 1. Run creator-tier-promotion-SOP every 90-days (apply 4-trigger-SOP [volume + cohort-LTV + content-quality + tenure] to all-active-creators)
[ ] 2. Promote micro-to-mid-tier-creators where ≥3-of-4-triggers-met (≥30-promotions-per-quarter expected)
[ ] 3. Promote mid-tier-to-macro-creators where ≥3-of-4-triggers-met (≥5-promotions-per-quarter expected)
[ ] 4. Document creator-tier-promotion-decisions in /shared-drive/creator-economy-tier-promotion-log/
[ ] 5. Send creator-tier-promotion-email to promoted-creator (welcome-to-new-tier + new-payout-terms + new-content-licensing-terms)
[ ] 6. Update creator-payout-contract with new-tier-terms
[ ] 7. Expected-outcome: Creator-tier-promotion-SOP-steady-state with 90-day-promotion-cadence + ≥30-micro-to-mid-tier-promotions + ≥5-mid-tier-to-macro-promotions per quarter
```

numberedSections.heading: 4.2 Content-licensing-renewal-cadence-steady-state
numberedSections.body:
Per research/12 §Verification gates Gate D prerequisite 2 + Pitfall #4 content-licensing + whitelisting.

```
CONTENT-LICENSING-RENEWAL-CADENCE-STEADY-STATE (paste-ready checklist)

[ ] 1. Run content-licensing-renewal-cadence every 90-days (review all active-content-licensing-agreements)
[ ] 2. For each content-piece-with-licensing-terms, compute creator-content-ROI-per-piece:
     - Creator-content-driven-revenue (per content-piece-id via Triple-Whale-creator-cohort-overlay)
     - Total-content-licensing-cost (paid to creator for this content-piece)
     - Total-whitelisting-ads-cost (paid to creator for this content-piece)
     - Creator-content-ROI-per-piece = creator-content-driven-revenue / (content-licensing-cost + whitelisting-ads-cost)
[ ] 3. Sunset-decision: creator-content-ROI-per-piece <0.5× average-creator-content-ROI → sunset-licensing (do not renew)
[ ] 4. Renew-decision: creator-content-ROI-per-piece ≥2× average-creator-content-ROI → renew-licensing for another 90-days
[ ] 5. Neutral-decision: creator-content-ROI-per-piece 0.5-2× average-creator-content-ROI → review-manually + decide
[ ] 6. Send content-licensing-renewal-or-sunset-email to creator (renew-thank-you OR sunset-with-thank-you)
[ ] 7. Expected-outcome: Content-licensing-renewal-cadence-steady-state with 90-day-renewal-or-sunset-decision (sunset <0.5× + renew ≥2×)
```

numberedSections.heading: 4.3 Triple-Whale-creator-economy-cohort-LTV-iteration-cycle-weekly
numberedSections.body:
Per research/12 §Verification gates Gate D prerequisite 3 + Pitfall #11 attribution + measurement.

```
TRIPLE-WHALE-CREATOR-ECONOMY-COHORT-LTV-ITERATION-CYCLE-WEEKLY (paste-ready checklist)

[ ] 1. Open Triple Whale dashboard (app.triplewhale.com) every Monday morning
[ ] 2. Run weekly-creator-economy-cohort-LTV-5-way-comparison:
     - creator_economy_micro (50-100 active micro-creators)
     - creator_economy_mid_tier_content (20-50 active mid-tier-creators)
     - organic_DTC (organic-DTC-cohort baseline)
     - paid_meta (paid-Meta-cohort baseline)
     - affiliate_program (Move #15 affiliate-program-cohort)
     - tiktok_shop (Move #15.x TikTok-Shop-cohort)
[ ] 3. Compute per-cohort-LTV at 30/60/90-day windows + LTV:CAC ratio + repeat-purchase-rate
[ ] 4. Identify creator-economy-cohort-LTV-improvement-vs-baseline (target: creator-economy-cohort-LTV ≥1.5× organic-DTC-cohort-LTV)
[ ] 5. Iterate creator-discovery-platform + creator-tier-mix + 5-payout-creator-economy-structures + content-licensing-terms + whitelisting-ads-budget-allocation based on 5-way-comparison-data:
     - If creator_economy_micro has highest LTV → expand micro-creator-onboarding-budget
     - If creator_economy_mid_tier_content has highest LTV → expand mid-tier-creator-onboarding-budget
     - If creator_economy_micro has lowest LTV → sunset low-LTV-micro-creators + reallocate-budget-to-higher-LTV-tiers
     - If paid_meta has higher LTV than creator_economy → reduce creator-economy-budget + scale-paid-meta-budget
     - If tiktok_shop has higher LTV than creator_economy → cross-pollinate-creator-economy-creators-into-TikTok-Shop
[ ] 6. Document 5-way-comparison-decisions in /shared-drive/creator-economy-5-way-comparison-log/
[ ] 7. Expected-outcome: Triple-Whale-creator-economy-cohort-LTV-iteration-cycle-weekly-active with 5-way-comparison-driven-creator-discovery-platform + creator-tier-mix + 5-payout-structures + content-licensing-terms + whitelisting-ads-budget-iteration
```

numberedSections.heading: 4.4 Year-1-creator-economy-revenue + 8:1-default-Year-1-ROI-Path-B-verified
numberedSections.body:
Per research/12 §Verification gates Gate D prerequisite 8-9 + research/12 §Cost & ROI estimate.

```
YEAR-1-CREATOR-ECONOMY-REVENUE-VERIFICATION (paste-ready checklist)

[ ] 1. Compute Year-1 incremental creator-economy-revenue via Triple-Whale-creator-economy-cohort-overlay:
     - Sum of all creator-driven-attributed-revenue (across all active creators) for Year-1
     - Target: $200k-$1M Path B at $500k-$5M US DTC base per research/12 §Cost & ROI
[ ] 2. Compute Year-1 total creator-economy-cost-stack:
     - Platform-fees (Aspire + GRIN/CreatorIQ + Triple-Whale + Klaviyo + content-licensing-template-legal-fees + whitelisting-ads-template-legal-fees)
     - Creator-payouts (product-seeding + creator-payouts + content-licensing + whitelisting-ads + macro-flagship-campaigns)
     - Dedicated-creator-economy-manager-cost (0.25-0.5 FTE Year-2+ if Path B → Path C upgrade)
[ ] 3. Compute Year-1 ROI: creator-economy-revenue / creator-economy-cost-stack
[ ] 4. Target: 8:1 default Year-1 ROI Path B at $2M US DTC base ($500k Path B median incremental creator-economy-revenue / $30k median annual cost = 16.7:1 gross; conservative-muted = 8:1 conservative nominal)
[ ] 5. Compute 2-4× LTV-multiplier vs no-creator-economy-program:
     - Compare creator-economy-cohort-LTV at 90-day windows vs organic-DTC-cohort-LTV at 90-day windows
     - Target: creator-economy-cohort-LTV ≥2× organic-DTC-cohort-LTV per Tubular Labs 2024 + Aspire 2024 benchmarks
[ ] 6. Document Year-1-creator-economy-revenue + ROI + LTV-multiplier in /shared-drive/creator-economy-year-1-summary/
[ ] 7. Expected-outcome: Year-1 incremental creator-economy-revenue $200k-$1M Path B + 8:1 default Year-1 ROI + 2-4× LTV-multiplier vs no-creator-economy-program verified
```

playbooks.title: Goal
meta: Pinterest-Business-Account-onboarded + Catalogs-feed-upload-live + Shopify-SEO-baseline-audit-complete + first-SEO-content-cluster + first-20-Pinterest-Idea-Pins — per the canonical platform-foundation from research/13 Pillar 1; Pinterest-Business-Account $0 with Pinterest-Catalogs-feed-upload + Pinterest-Idea-Pin-creation + Pinterest-Analytics + Pinterest-Catalog-ads-as-paid-amplifier + Pinterest-SEO-Insights. Wire Shopify-SEO $0 (Shopify-SEO-built-in) OR Avada-SEO $30-$99/mo OR Plug-In-SEO $20-$50/mo for canonical-SEO-baseline [meta-titles + meta-descriptions + heading-structure + image-alt-text + schema-markup + sitemap-generation + canonical-tags + 404-redirects + page-speed-baseline-50+ on PageSpeed-Insights]. Build first-SEO-content-cluster [Pillar-page + 8-cluster-articles around long-tail-keyword-set like "sustainable-resort-wear for women" + 4-trigger-cross-link-architecture] using Surfer-SEO-content-optimization $89/mo [content-score ≥70 + NLP-keywords-coverage + heading-density + meta-data + image-alt-text + content-length-2000+-words + readability-Flesch-60-70]. Pin first-20-Idea-Pins [10-pins-per-week cadence per Pinterest 2024 + Ahrefs-2024-case-studies] with 100%-product-tagging + Idea-Pin-format-vertical-9:16 + 10-second-product-demo + 1-CTA + Pin-description-500-char-with-keywords + destination-link-to-product-page. Per Pinterest 2024 + SEMrush 2024 benchmarks: SEO-Pillar-page-takes-3-6-months-to-rank-on-Google-page-1 vs Pinterest-Idea-Pin-takes-2-4-weeks-to-go-viral; combined-SEO+Pinterest-captures-15-25% incremental-traffic-vs-SEO-only within-6-months. Expected outcome: SEO-baseline-audit + 1-cluster-30-articles + 20-Idea-Pins + 100-organic-traffic/mo baseline.

SEO-5-cluster-topical-authority-built + Pinterest-vertical-pillar-set-deployed + Triple-Whale-organic-LTV-overlay-wired + Klaviyo-organic-source-segment-live — per research/13 Pillar 2+3 content-architecture + vertical-pillar-set; SEO-5-cluster-topical-authority (5 Pillar-pages + 40-cluster-articles per Pillar = 200-articles across 5 topical-clusters covering the brand's full keyword-space [root-keyword + 50-derived-long-tail-keywords-per-cluster + 20-question-keywords-per-cluster + semantic-LSI-keyword-universe]) using MarketMuse-topical-authority-methodology [topical-authority-score-target-≥80 + content-quality-score-target-≥70 + content-density-target-≥5-keywords-per-cluster + internal-link-density-target-3-internal-links-per-article] + Surfer-SEO-content-optimization-with-content-pruning-quarterly [remove-or-improve-underperforming-pages-3-months-traffic<10-visitors] + Ahrefs-Content-Gap-competitive-analysis [identify-keyword-gaps-vs-3-competitors + 30-content-gap-keywords-per-quarter]. Build Pinterest-vertical-pillar-set [10-vertical-pillars × 10-product-Idea-Pins-per-pillar × 5-content-Idea-Pins-per-pillar = 150-Idea-Pins total covering brand's vertical-keyword-space + 30-boards-organized-by-vertical-pillar] using Pinterest-2024-Predict-the-Year-benchmarks [vertical-keyword-spike-30-50% YoY in Beauty + Wellness + Travel + Fashion + Home-Decor + Food + Parenting]. Wire Triple-Whale-organic-LTV-overlay [Pinterest-organic-driven-cohort-LTV + SEO-organic-driven-cohort-LTV vs paid-Meta-cohort-LTV vs paid-Google-cohort-LTV at 30/60/90/180-day windows; iterate SEO-content-cluster + Pinterest-vertical-pillar based on canonical-organic-LTV-ranking] + Klaviyo-organic-source-segment [Pinterest-organic-segment + SEO-organic-segment with 30-day-LTV-by-segment]. Per SEMrush 2024 + Ahrefs 2024 + Backlinko 2024 benchmarks: 200-article-topical-authority-build typically achieves 5-15× organic-traffic increase within-12-months vs 50-article-minimal-content-set; Pinterest-vertical-pillar-set achieves 3-5× Pinterest-click-rate vs single-board-dumping-strategy.

Triple-Whale-organic-LTV-iteration-cycle-weekly + AI-content-detection-validation + Pinterest-Catalog-ads-paid-amplifier-5%-of-budget + helpful-content-update-compliance-audit + SEO-link-building-machine — per research/13 Pillar 4+5 measurement + amplification + steady-state; Triple-Whale-organic-LTV-iteration-flow [weekly-review-of-Pinterest-organic-driven-cohort-LTV + SEO-organic-driven-cohort-LTV vs paid-Meta-cohort-LTV + paid-Google-cohort-LTV + paid-TikTok-cohort-LTV at 30/60/90/180-day windows; iterate SEO-content-cluster + Pinterest-vertical-pillar + Idea-Pin-cadence based on canonical-5-way-comparison-cycle]. Validate content with Originality.ai-AI-content-detection [AI-content-score-target-<50%-per-page to comply with Google's Helpful Content Update 2024 + March-2024-core-update-enforcement + June-2024-spam-brain-update; canonical-AI-content-thresholds [>50%-AI-content = risk-of-deindexing per Google's March-2024-core-update, <30%-AI-content = safe, 100%-human-written = safest]] + helpful-content-update-compliance-audit [semantic-relevance + people-first-content + E-E-A-T-signals [experience + expertise + authoritativeness + trustworthiness] + ad-revenue-not-primary-goal + factually-accurate + satisfying-user-search-intent]. Launch Pinterest-Catalog-ads-as-paid-amplifier-of-organic-best-performer [5%-of-budget to Pinterest-Catalog-ads-promoting-top-20-Pinterest-organic-best-performer-products per Pinterest-2024-Catalog-ads-benchmarks; achieves 2-3× ROAS vs in-feed-ads-without-product-catalog + 1.5× ROAS vs non-organic-amplifier-Catalog-ads per Pinterest-for-Business-2024 + Triple-Whale-2024-benchmarks]. Build the SEO-link-building-machine with Backlinko 2024-methodology [broken-link-building-30-outreach-per-month + resource-page-link-building + guest-posting-on-DR-40+-sites 5-per-month + skyscraper-technique-on-top-competitors + digital-PR-pitches-3-per-month + content-pruning-canonical-process-quarterly].

Steady-state Pinterest-organic-discovery + SEO-content-engine live + Topical-Authority-≥80 + Pinterest-Catalog-ads-paid-amplifier-steady-state-5%-of-budget + Triple-Whale-organic-LTV-iteration-cycle-quarterly + 12-24-month compounding-traffic-curve — per research/13 Pillar 5 compounding-amplification + steady-state; canonical 12-24-month compounding-traffic-curve [Year-1 6:1 ROI / Year-2 12-25:1 / Year-3 25-50:1 per Ahrefs 2024 + Pinterest 2024 + SEMrush 2024 benchmarks] + canonical Pinterest-Catalog-ads-steady-state-5%-of-budget-allocation [30-50%-incremental-organic-conversion-rate vs SEO-only-per-brand-without-Catalog-ads-amplification] + canonical Triple-Whale-organic-LTV-iteration-cycle-quarterly [iterate SEO-content-cluster + Pinterest-vertical-pillar + Idea-Pin-cadence based on canonical-5-way-comparison-cycle quarterly] + canonical 5-pillar Pinterest-vertical-content-pillar-set [Beauty + Skincare + Haircare + Cosmetics + Fashion-Accessories + Wellness + Travel + Home-Decor + Food-and-Beverage + Parenting per Pinterest 2024 + Ahrefs 2024 vertical-keyword-spike-benchmarks]. Per Ahrefs 2024 + Pinterest 2024 + SEMrush 2024 benchmarks: brands with 200-article-topical-authority + 200-Idea-Pin-Pinterest-vertical-pillar-set + Triple-Whale-organic-LTV-iteration-cadence + Pinterest-Catalog-ads-amplifier achieve 5-10× lower-CAC-Year-2+ vs paid-social per the canonical-organic-traffic-compounding-curve-vs-paid-social-saturation-curve.

Steady-state Pinterest-organic-discovery + SEO-content-engine live + 6:1 default Year-1 ROI Path B validated + 5-15% incremental-traffic-contribution + 0.6-0.85× CAC vs paid-social validated — research/13 §Cost & ROI steady-state benchmarks; $200k-$1M Path B Year-1 incremental Pinterest-SEO-traffic-revenue at $500k-$5M US DTC base per Ahrefs 2024 + Pinterest 2024 + SEMrush 2024 + Surfer-SEO-2024 + Triple-Whale-2024 benchmarks; 6:1 default Year-1 ROI Path B at $2M US DTC base ($200k-$1M Path B Year-1 incremental Pinterest-SEO-traffic / $3,600-$12,000 annual cost = 17:1 to 417:1 best-case / 6:1 conservative-nominal); Year-2+ ramp to 12-50:1 steady-state compounding-traffic-curve; 5-15% Year-1 incremental-traffic-contribution + 0.6-0.85× CAC vs paid-social per the canonical-organic-traffic-compounding-curve-vs-paid-social-saturation-curve.

numberedSections.heading: 1.1 Pinterest-Business-Account-onboarded + Catalogs-feed-upload-live + Idea-Pin-creation-enabled + Pinterest-Analytics-wired
numberedSections.body:
Per research/13 Pillar 1 + Pitfall #1 platform-onboarding.

```
PINTEREST-BUSINESS-ACCOUNT-SETUP (decision tree)

For all paths (Path A / B / C):
  → Create Pinterest-Business-Account at business.pinterest.com (free)
  → Required: business-email + business-registration-document + brand-verification
  → Connect Shopify-Channel (Settings → Sales Channels → Pinterest) OR upload Pinterest-Catalog-feed (CSV-formatted)
  → Per-SKU Pinterest-Catalog-feed requirements: product-name + product-image-1:1-square-1000px+ + product-image-1.91:1-1000px+ + product-link + product-price + product-availability + product-category + product-keywords + product-description-with-keywords-500-char + 100%-product-tagging
  → Enable Pinterest-Idea-Pin-creation (Pinterest mobile app + Pinterest desktop)
  → Enable Pinterest-Catalog-ads (5%-of-budget-amplifier for Phase 3)
  → Enable Pinterest-SEO-Insights (free with Pinterest-Business-Account)
  → Enable Pinterest-Analytics (free with Pinterest-Business-Account)
  → Best for all paths regardless of GMV-tier; per Pinterest 2024 benchmarks the canonical-platform-foundation-layer
```

```bash
# Pinterest-Catalog-feed-upload (CSV format for non-Shopify or Shopify-Pinterest-channel for Shopify)
# Via Shopify admin: Settings → Sales Channels → Pinterest → Connect Account → Sync Products
# Per-SKU Pinterest-Catalog-feed-fields:
#   id,title,description,link,image_link,price,availability,condition,brand,google_product_category
# Example: SKU-001,"Product Name with keywords","500-char description with keywords","https://shop.example.com/products/product","https://cdn.example.com/product-1x1.jpg","29.99","in stock","new","Brand Name","Apparel & Accessories > Clothing > Dresses"
```

numberedSections.heading: 1.2 Shopify-SEO-baseline-audit-complete + Shopify-SEO-app-installed
numberedSections.body:
Per research/13 Pillar 2 + Pitfall #2 content-architecture.

```
SHOPIFY-SEO-BASELINE-AUDIT (decision tree)

For all paths (Path A / B / C):
  → Run Shopify-SEO-baseline-audit: meta-titles + meta-descriptions + heading-structure + image-alt-text + schema-markup + sitemap-generation + canonical-tags + 404-redirects + page-speed-baseline-50+ on PageSpeed-Insights
  → Install Shopify-SEO app:
    - Path A: Shopify-SEO-built-in-free (Shopify admin → Online Store → Preferences → Search engine listing)
    - Path B: Shopify-SEO-built-in-free OR Avada-SEO $30-$99/mo OR Plug-In-SEO $20-$50/mo
    - Path C: Avada-SEO $30-$99/mo OR Plug-In-SEO $20-$50/mo + dedicated-SEO-content-operator
  → Verify all 9 SEO-baseline-fields per brand's 50-100 top-products:
    - meta-titles (50-60 char with primary-keyword)
    - meta-descriptions (150-160 char with primary-keyword + benefit + CTA)
    - heading-structure (H1 per page with primary-keyword + 3-5 H2 with secondary-keywords)
    - image-alt-text (100%-coverage with descriptive-keywords)
    - schema-markup (Product + Offer + AggregateRating + BreadcrumbList per Google-2024-spec)
    - sitemap-generation (auto-generated + submitted-to-Google-Search-Console)
    - canonical-tags (self-referencing-canonical-on-every-page)
    - 404-redirects (no-404-errors-per-Google-Search-Console)
    - page-speed-baseline-50+ on PageSpeed-Insights (mobile + desktop)
  → Best for all paths regardless of GMV-tier; brands with <4.0-SEO-baseline-score need to fix SEO-foundations before Pinterest-SEO-launch
```

numberedSections.heading: 1.3 First-SEO-content-cluster-built (1 Pillar-page + 8 cluster-articles + 4-trigger-cross-link-architecture)
numberedSections.body:
Per research/13 Pillar 2 + Pitfall #3 content-architecture + Pitfall #4 topical-authority.

```
FIRST-SEO-CONTENT-CLUSTER-BUILD (decision tree)

For Path A (Pinterest-only + SEO-baseline-shopify-free):
  → 1 SEO-content-cluster with 1 Pillar-page + 8 cluster-articles = 9 articles total
  → Per-article: 2000+ words + content-score-≥70 + readability-Flesch-60-70 + 4-images-with-alt-text + 3-internal-links + 1-external-link
  → Tools: Shopify-SEO-built-in-free + Ahrefs-Content-Gap-Starter $99/mo + Surfer-SEO-Lite-free
  → Best for: $100k-$500k GMV brands

For Path B (Pinterest + SEO-content-cluster + Triple-Whale-organic-LTV-iteration DEFAULT):
  → 1 SEO-content-cluster with 1 Pillar-page + 8 cluster-articles + 4-trigger-cross-link-architecture = 9 articles + 4 cross-links per article
  → Per-article: 2000+ words + content-score-≥70 + readability-Flesch-60-70 + NLP-keywords-coverage-≥80% + heading-density-target-1-H1-3-H2 + meta-data-target-50-char-150-char + image-alt-text-100%-coverage + keyword-density-2-3% + semantic-LSI-keyword-coverage + internal-link-density-3-links-per-article + external-link-density-1-link-per-article
  → Tools: Surfer-SEO-Pro $89/mo + Ahrefs-Content-Gap-Pro $199/mo + MarketMuse-Starter $300/mo (for-topical-authority-baseline-audit)
  → Best for: $500k-$5M GMV brands

For Path C (Full Pinterest-SEO-orchestration):
  → Path B + MarketMuse-Enterprise $3k/mo (for-topical-authority-methodology) + dedicated-organic-content-team
  → Best for: $5M+ GMV brands with dedicated-organic-content-team
```

numberedSections.heading: 1.4 First-20-Pinterest-Idea-Pins-pinned + Pinterest-vertical-pillar-set-baseline-audit
numberedSections.body:
Per research/13 Pillar 1+3 + Pitfall #5 vertical-pillar.

```
FIRST-20-PINTEREST-IDEA-PINS-BUILD (decision tree)

For all paths (Path A / B / C):
  → Pin first-20-Idea-Pins at 10-pins-per-week cadence for 2 weeks
  → Per-Idea-Pin: vertical-9:16-format + 10-second-product-demo + 1-CTA + destination-link-to-product-page + Pin-description-500-char-with-keywords + 100%-product-tagging + Pin-title-100-char-with-keywords
  → Required: 5-second-vertical-9:16-photos + 10-second-product-demo + 1-CTA + destination-link-to-product-page + Pin-description-500-char-with-keywords
  → Run Pinterest-vertical-pillar-set-baseline-audit: current-Pinterest-vertical-keyword-spike-30-50% YoY + brand-vertical-Pinterest-keyword-rank + competitor-Pinterest-vertical-presence
  → Pinterest 2024 + Ahrefs 2024 benchmarks: brands with optimized-Pinterest-Catalog-feeds achieve 2-4× higher Pinterest-CVR vs unoptimized-feeds (Pinterest-SEO-Insights rewards quality-Pinterest-content + quality-Pinterest-products)
  → Best for all paths regardless of GMV-tier; brands without Pinterest-vertical-presence need to seed-Pinterest-presence with first-20-Idea-Pins-on-brand-vertical-keywords
```

---

numberedSections.heading: 2.1 SEO-5-cluster-topical-authority-built (5 Pillar-pages + 200 cluster-articles)
numberedSections.body:
Per research/13 Pillar 2 + Pitfall #4 topical-authority + Pitfall #6 content-pruning.

```
SEO-5-CLUSTER-TOPICAL-AUTHORITY-BUILD (decision tree)

For Path A (Pinterest-only + SEO-baseline-shopify-free):
  → 1 SEO-content-cluster with 1 Pillar-page + 8 cluster-articles = 9 articles total (Phase 1 baseline)
  → Best for: $100k-$500k GMV brands

For Path B (Pinterest + SEO-content-cluster + Triple-Whale-organic-LTV-iteration DEFAULT):
  → 5 SEO-content-clusters with 5 Pillar-pages + 40 cluster-articles per Pillar = 200 articles total
  → Per-cluster: root-keyword + 50-derived-long-tail-keywords-per-cluster + 20-question-keywords-per-cluster + semantic-LSI-keyword-universe
  → Per-article: 2000+ words + content-score-≥70 + readability-Flesch-60-70 + NLP-keywords-coverage-≥80% + heading-density-target-1-H1-3-H2 + meta-data-target-50-char-150-char + image-alt-text-100%-coverage + keyword-density-2-3% + semantic-LSI-keyword-coverage + internal-link-density-3-links-per-article + external-link-density-1-link-per-article
  → Tools: Surfer-SEO-Pro $89/mo + Ahrefs-Content-Gap-Pro $199/mo + MarketMuse-Starter $300/mo (topical-authority-score-target-≥80 + content-quality-score-target-≥70)
  → Best for: $500k-$5M GMV brands

For Path C (Full Pinterest-SEO-orchestration):
  → Path B + MarketMuse-Enterprise $3k/mo (topical-authority-methodology) + dedicated-organic-content-team (4-8 hr/wk content-operator-capacity)
  → Best for: $5M+ GMV brands with dedicated-organic-content-team

PERFORMANCE EXPECTATIONS (per Ahrefs 2024 + Backlinko 2024 + MarketMuse-2024 benchmarks):
  → 50-article-minimal-content-set: 1-2× organic-traffic vs no-content
  → 200-article-topical-authority-build: 5-15× organic-traffic increase within-12-months vs 50-article-minimal-content-set
  → 500-article-enterprise-content-set: 15-30× organic-traffic increase within-24-months vs 200-article-content-set

CONTENT-PRUNING-CANONICAL-PROCESS (per Ahrefs 2024 content-pruning-case-studies):
  → Quarterly-content-pruning-canonical-process
  → Per-page-traffic-classification:
    - >500-clicks-monthly = keep-and-expand (add-1000-words + 5-internal-links + update-keywords)
    - 100-500-clicks-monthly = optimize-with-content-pruning (refresh-content + improve-content-score-≥70 + add-3-internal-links)
    - <100-clicks-monthly = remove-and-301-to-pillar-page (consolidate-content + redirect-traffic)
  → The canonical-content-pruning-cadence reduces-content-bloat-by-30-50% over 12-months without-traffic-loss per Ahrefs-2024-content-pruning-case-studies
```

numberedSections.heading: 2.2 Pinterest-vertical-pillar-set-built (10-vertical-pillars × 15-Idea-Pins-per-pillar = 150-Idea-Pins)
numberedSections.body:
Per research/13 Pillar 3 + Pitfall #5 vertical-pillar.

```
PINTEREST-VERTICAL-PILLAR-SET-BUILD (decision tree)

For Path A (Pinterest-only + SEO-baseline-shopify-free):
  → 1 vertical-pillar with 5-10 Idea-Pins = 5-10 Idea-Pins total
  → Best for: $100k-$500k GMV brands

For Path B (Pinterest + SEO-content-cluster + Triple-Whale-organic-LTV-iteration DEFAULT):
  → 10-vertical-pillars with 10-product-Idea-Pins-per-pillar + 5-content-Idea-Pins-per-pillar = 150-Idea-Pins total
  → Per-vertical-pillar: 3-boards-organized-by-vertical-pillar [product-board + content-board + lifestyle-board] = 30-boards-organized-by-vertical-pillar
  → Per-board: descriptive-board-title-with-keywords + board-description-500-char-with-keywords + 100%-product-tagging-per-board
  → Per-Idea-Pin: vertical-9:16-format + 10-second-product-demo + 1-CTA + destination-link-to-product-page + Pin-description-500-char-with-keywords + 100%-product-tagging
  → 10-Idea-Pins-per-week cadence for 12-24-months per Pinterest 2024 + Ahrefs-2024-vertical-pillar-build-benchmarks; brands with <10-pins-per-week typically see 3-5× lower Pinterest-engagement-rate vs brands with ≥10-pins-per-week
  → Tools: Pinterest-Business-Account-free + Pinterest-Catalog-ads-5%-of-budget (Phase 3)
  → Best for: $500k-$5M GMV brands

For Path C (Full Pinterest-SEO-orchestration):
  → Path B + dedicated-organic-content-team (4-8 hr/wk content-operator-capacity) + Pinterest-Catalog-ads-steady-state-build
  → Best for: $5M+ GMV brands with dedicated-organic-content-team

PINTEREST-VERTICAL-PILLARS (per Pinterest 2024 + Ahrefs 2024 vertical-keyword-spike-benchmarks):
  → Beauty (vertical-keyword-spike +30% YoY)
  → Skincare (vertical-keyword-spike +25% YoY)
  → Haircare (vertical-keyword-spike +20% YoY)
  → Cosmetics (vertical-keyword-spike +18% YoY)
  → Fashion-Accessories (vertical-keyword-spike +35% YoY)
  → Wellness (vertical-keyword-spike +40% YoY)
  → Travel (vertical-keyword-spike +50% YoY)
  → Home-Decor (vertical-keyword-spike +28% YoY)
  → Food-and-Beverage (vertical-keyword-spike +22% YoY)
  → Parenting (vertical-keyword-spike +15% YoY)
  → Sustainability (vertical-keyword-spike +35% YoY per Sustainable-Brands-2024)

PERFORMANCE EXPECTATIONS (per Pinterest 2024 + Ahrefs 2024 benchmarks):
  → 50-Idea-Pin-minimal-content-set: 1-2× Pinterest-click-rate vs no-pins
  → 150-Idea-Pin-vertical-pillar-set: 3-5× Pinterest-click-rate vs single-board-dumping-strategy
  → 500-Idea-Pin-enterprise-content-set: 5-10× Pinterest-click-rate vs minimal-content-set
```

numberedSections.heading: 2.3 Triple-Whale-organic-LTV-overlay-wired + Klaviyo-organic-source-segment-live
numberedSections.body:
Per research/13 Pillar 4 + Pitfall #5 attribution-measurement + Pitfall #7 cohort-LTV-iteration.

```
TRIPLE-WHALE-ORGANIC-LTV-OVERLAY-WIRE (decision tree)

For Path A (Pinterest-only + SEO-baseline-shopify-free):
  → Triple-Whale-organic-source-tracking-only (no organic-LTV-overlay)
  → Best for: $100k-$500k GMV brands

For Path B (Pinterest + SEO-content-cluster + Triple-Whale-organic-LTV-iteration DEFAULT):
  → Triple-Whale-organic-LTV-overlay-Wire:
    1. Install Triple-Whale-Starter $179/mo OR Triple-Whale-Pro $1,290/mo (Path C)
    2. Configure Pinterest-source-tracking + UTM-parameters per Pin (`?tw_source=pinterest_organic&tw_campaign=idea_pin_<id>`)
    3. Configure SEO-source-tracking + UTM-parameters per SEO-content-article (`?tw_source=seo_organic&tw_campaign=article_<slug>`)
    4. Wire Triple-Whale-organic-cohort-LTV-overlay: Pinterest-organic-driven-cohort-LTV + SEO-organic-driven-cohort-LTV vs paid-Meta-cohort-LTV + paid-Google-cohort-LTV + paid-TikTok-cohort-LTV at 30/60/90/180/365-day windows
    5. Configure weekly+quarterly-review-discipline (see Phase 3 Step 3.1)
  → Klaviyo-organic-source-segment-Wire:
    1. Create Pinterest-organic-segment (profile-property `signup_source = pinterest`)
    2. Create SEO-organic-segment (profile-property `signup_source = seo`)
    3. Configure Pinterest-driven-cart-abandon-flow (move from Move #1 to Pinterest-aware-attrition)
    4. Configure SEO-driven-cart-abandon-flow (move from Move #1 to SEO-aware-attrition)
    5. Configure Pinterest-content-welcome-flow (move from Move #4 to Pinterest-aware-welcome)
    6. Configure SEO-content-welcome-flow (move from Move #4 to SEO-aware-welcome)
    7. Configure Pinterest-source-cohort-LTV-tracking + SEO-source-cohort-LTV-tracking in Klaviyo-analytics
  → Best for: $500k-$5M GMV brands

For Path C (Full Pinterest-SEO-orchestration):
  → Path B + Triple-Whale-Pro $1,290/mo + dedicated-organic-content-team
  → Best for: $5M+ GMV brands with dedicated-organic-content-team

PERFORMANCE EXPECTATIONS (per Triple-Whale 2024 + Klaviyo 2024 organic-source-segment-LTV benchmarks):
  → Without Triple-Whale-organic-cohort-overlay: 30-50% undercount of organic-driven-DTC-attribution (a Pinterest-organic-customer who later buys from SEO-organic-search is mis-attributed to SEO-organic instead of Pinterest-organic-driven-discovery)
  → With Triple-Whale-organic-cohort-overlay: 30-50% attribution-correction + 5-15% incremental-cohort-LTV-vs-paid-social + 0.6-0.85× CAC vs paid-social
```

---

numberedSections.heading: 3.1 Triple-Whale-organic-LTV-iteration-cycle-weekly + 5-way-comparison-cycle
numberedSections.body:
Per research/13 Pillar 4 + Pitfall #7 cohort-LTV-iteration.

```
TRIPLE-WHALE-ORGANIC-LTV-ITERATION-CYCLE-WEEKLY (decision tree)

For all paths (Path A / B / C):
  → Run Triple-Whale-organic-LTV-iteration-flow weekly:
    1. Pull Pinterest-organic-driven-cohort-LTV at 30/60/90-day windows
    2. Pull SEO-organic-driven-cohort-LTV at 30/60/90-day windows
    3. Pull paid-Meta-cohort-LTV at 30/60/90-day windows (Move #4 paid-Meta)
    4. Pull paid-Google-cohort-LTV at 30/60/90-day windows (Move #6 paid-Google)
    5. Pull paid-TikTok-cohort-LTV at 30/60/90-day windows (Move #15.x paid-TikTok)
  → Run 5-way-comparison-cycle weekly:
    1. Compare Pinterest-organic vs SEO-organic vs paid-Meta vs paid-Google vs paid-TikTok
    2. Identify top-3-organic-LTV-performers (e.g., SEO-content-cluster-A vs Pinterest-vertical-pillar-3)
    3. Identify bottom-3-organic-LTV-underperformers (e.g., SEO-content-cluster-C vs Pinterest-vertical-pillar-7)
    4. Iterate SEO-content-cluster + Pinterest-vertical-pillar + Idea-Pin-cadence based on canonical-5-way-comparison-cycle
  → Run quarterly-iteration-cycle (per Quarter 1 / Q2 / Q3 / Q4):
    1. Quarterly-content-pruning-canonical-process (per Phase 2 Step 2.1)
    2. Quarterly-AI-content-detection-validation (per Step 3.2)
    3. Quarterly-helpful-content-update-compliance-audit (per Step 3.3)
    4. Quarterly-link-building-machine-iteration (per Step 3.5)
  → Per Triple-Whale 2024 + Klaviyo 2024 organic-source-segment-LTV benchmarks: brands with weekly+quarterly-iteration-cycles achieve 5-15% incremental-traffic-contribution + 0.6-0.85× CAC vs paid-social + 12-24-month compounding-traffic-curve-steady-state
```

numberedSections.heading: 3.2 Originality.ai-AI-content-detection-validation-cycle-30-day
numberedSections.body:
Per research/13 Pillar 4 + Pitfall #8 AI-content-deindexing-risk.

```
ORIGINALITY.AI-AI-CONTENT-DETECTION-VALIDATION (decision tree)

For Path A (Pinterest-only + SEO-baseline-shopify-free):
  → Manual-AI-content-validation (no Originality.ai-subscription)
  → Best for: $100k-$500k GMV brands

For Path B (Pinterest + SEO-content-cluster + Triple-Whale-organic-LTV-iteration DEFAULT):
  → Install Originality.ai-Pro $60/mo (or Originality.ai-Starter $30/mo for smaller catalogs)
  → Run 30-day-validation-cycle on all 200 articles:
    1. Per-article-AI-content-detection: AI-content-score-target-<50%-per-page
    2. Canonical-AI-content-thresholds (per Originality.ai 2024 + Google 2024):
       - >50%-AI-content = risk-of-deindexing per Google's March-2024-core-update-enforcement + June-2024-spam-brain-update-enforcement (canonical-pattern: brands see 30-70% organic-traffic-loss within-30-days-of-deindexing)
       - <30%-AI-content = safe (canonical-pattern: brands maintain-organic-traffic-rankings)
       - 100%-human-written = safest (canonical-pattern: brands maintain-organic-traffic-rankings + bonus-quality-boost)
    3. Iterate-content-creation-workflow-until-AI-content-score-<30% across all 200-articles
    4. Track-AI-content-trends-monthly: detect-any-article-trending-toward-AI-content-threshold
  → Best for: $500k-$5M GMV brands

For Path C (Full Pinterest-SEO-orchestration):
  → Path B + Originality.ai-Enterprise $500/mo (for-content-team-oversight + dedicated-organic-content-team-content-validation)
  → Best for: $5M+ GMV brands with dedicated-organic-content-team

PERFORMANCE EXPECTATIONS (per Originality.ai 2024 + Google 2024 benchmarks):
  → Without-Originality.ai-validation: 30-50% risk-of-deindexing-per-Google-2024-enforcement for brands with >50%-AI-content
  → With-Originality.ai-validation: <5% risk-of-deindexing for brands maintaining-AI-content-score-<30%
  → Brands with content-pruning-canonical-process-quarterly + Originality.ai-validation-30-day-cycle achieve 12-24-month-compounding-traffic-curve-steady-state vs brands without
```

numberedSections.heading: 3.3 helpful-content-update-compliance-audit-quarterly
numberedSections.body:
Per research/13 Pillar 4 + Pitfall #9 helpful-content-update.

```
HELPFUL-CONTENT-UPDATE-COMPLIANCE-AUDIT (decision tree)

For all paths (Path A / B / C):
  → Run helpful-content-update-compliance-audit quarterly:
    1. Semantic-relevance-audit: per-article-keyword-relevance-to-search-intent + per-article-answer-completeness
    2. People-first-content-audit: per-article-user-helpfulness-vs-SEO-optimization + per-article-originality + per-article-value-add-vs-existing-content
    3. E-E-A-T-signals-audit: experience-signals [first-hand-product-experience] + expertise-signals [credentialed-author + cited-sources] + authoritativeness-signals [brand-recognition + backlink-profile] + trustworthiness-signals [HTTPS + contact-info + return-policy + reviews]
    4. Ad-revenue-not-primary-goal-audit: per-article-monetization-vs-helpfulness-balance + per-article-affiliate-disclosure-compliance
    5. Factually-accurate-audit: per-article-fact-verification + per-article-citation-completeness + per-article-update-recency
    6. Satisfying-user-search-intent-audit: per-article-search-intent-match [informational + navigational + transactional + commercial-investigation]
  → Per Google 2024 + Search-Engine-Roundtable 2024 benchmarks: brands with quarterly-helpful-content-update-compliance-audit maintain-organic-traffic-rankings vs brands without which see 30-50%-organic-traffic-loss-per-Google-helpful-content-update-enforcement
```

numberedSections.heading: 3.4 Pinterest-Catalog-ads-paid-amplifier-5%-of-budget-launched
numberedSections.body:
Per research/13 Pillar 5 + Pitfall #10 amplification-steady-state.

```
PINTEREST-CATALOG-ADS-PAID-AMPLIFIER (decision tree)

For Path A (Pinterest-only + SEO-baseline-shopify-free):
  → No Pinterest-Catalog-ads-budget (organic-only Phase 1)
  → Best for: $100k-$500k GMV brands

For Path B (Pinterest + SEO-content-cluster + Triple-Whale-organic-LTV-iteration DEFAULT):
  → Launch Pinterest-Catalog-ads-as-paid-amplifier-of-organic-best-performer:
    1. Identify top-20-Pinterest-organic-best-performer-products (per Pinterest-Analytics-impressions + clicks + saves + destination-clicks)
    2. Allocate 5%-of-budget to Pinterest-Catalog-ads-promoting-top-20-Pinterest-organic-best-performer-products
    3. Per-Pinterest-2024-Catalog-ads-benchmarks: achieves 2-3× ROAS vs in-feed-ads-without-product-catalog + 1.5× ROAS vs non-organic-amplifier-Catalog-ads per Pinterest-for-Business-2024 + Triple-Whale-2024-benchmarks
    4. The 5%-of-budget-allocation achieves 30-50%-incremental-organic-conversion-rate vs SEO-only-per-brand-without-Catalog-ads-amplification
  → Best for: $500k-$5M GMV brands

For Path C (Full Pinterest-SEO-orchestration):
  → Path B + Pinterest-Catalog-ads-steady-state-build (5%-of-budget-allocation + dedicated-organic-content-team + Pinterest-Catalog-ads-Enterprise-features)
  → Best for: $5M+ GMV brands with dedicated-organic-content-team

PERFORMANCE EXPECTATIONS (per Pinterest-for-Business-2024 + Triple-Whale-2024 benchmarks):
  → Without-Pinterest-Catalog-ads-amplifier: 1.0× ROAS organic-only baseline
  → With-Pinterest-Catalog-ads-amplifier-5%-of-budget: 2-3× ROAS + 30-50%-incremental-organic-conversion-rate
  → With-Pinterest-Catalog-ads-amplifier-steady-state-build: 3-5× ROAS + 50-100%-incremental-organic-conversion-rate
```

numberedSections.heading: 3.5 SEO-link-building-machine-launched (Backlinko 2024-methodology)
numberedSections.body:
Per research/13 Pillar 5 + Pitfall #11 link-building-machine.

```
SEO-LINK-BUILDING-MACHINE (decision tree)

For Path A (Pinterest-only + SEO-baseline-shopify-free):
  → Manual-link-building-1-per-month (no dedicated-process)
  → Best for: $100k-$500k GMV brands

For Path B (Pinterest + SEO-content-cluster + Triple-Whale-organic-LTV-iteration DEFAULT):
  → Build SEO-link-building-machine with Backlinko 2024-methodology:
    1. Broken-link-building: 30-outreach-per-month to webmasters-with-broken-links-on-relevant-pages
    2. Resource-page-link-building: identify-50-resource-pages-per-month-in-vertical-keyword-niche + outreach-with-content-asset
    3. Guest-posting-on-DR-40+-sites: 5-per-month on industry-relevant-DR-40+-sites with editorial-content + contextual-backlink
    4. Skyscraper-technique-on-top-competitors: identify-top-3-competitors + create-10×-better-content + outreach-to-linkers
    5. Digital-PR-pitches: 3-per-month to journalists + bloggers + industry-publications
    6. Content-pruning-canonical-process-quarterly (per Phase 2 Step 2.1)
  → Tools: Ahrefs-Content-Gap-Pro $199/mo (for-link-gap-analysis) + Ahrefs-Advanced $399/mo (Path C)
  → Best for: $500k-$5M GMV brands

For Path C (Full Pinterest-SEO-orchestration):
  → Path B + dedicated-organic-content-team (4-8 hr/wk content-operator-capacity) + Digital-PR-agency-$3k-$10k/mo
  → Best for: $5M+ GMV brands with dedicated-organic-content-team

PERFORMANCE EXPECTATIONS (per Backlinko 2024 + Ahrefs 2024 link-building-case-studies):
  → Without-link-building-machine: 0-2 backlinks-per-month organic-acquisition
  → With-link-building-machine (Backlinko 2024-methodology): 5-15 backlinks-per-month organic-acquisition + 10-30%-domain-authority-improvement within-12-months + 2-5× organic-traffic-multiplier
  → With-link-building-machine-steady-state-build: 20-50 backlinks-per-month organic-acquisition + 30-50%-domain-authority-improvement within-12-months + 5-10× organic-traffic-multiplier
```

---

numberedSections.heading: 4.1 Topical-Authority-≥80-validated + content-pruning-canonical-process-quarterly
numberedSections.body:
Per research/13 Pillar 5 + Pitfall #4 topical-authority.

```
TOPICAL-AUTHORITY-VALIDATION (decision tree)

For all paths (Path A / B / C):
  → Run Topical-Authority-validation per MarketMuse-topical-authority-methodology:
    1. topical-authority-score-target-≥80 across all 5 topical-clusters
    2. content-quality-score-target-≥70 across all 200 articles
    3. content-density-target-≥5-keywords-per-cluster
    4. internal-link-density-target-3-internal-links-per-article

  → Per MarketMuse 2024 + Backlinko 2024 benchmarks: brands with Topical-Authority-≥80 + content-pruning-canonical-process-quarterly achieve 12-24-month-compounding-traffic-curve-steady-state vs brands without which see 50-70%-regression-of-traffic-contribution after-12-weeks

numberedSections.heading: 4.2 Pinterest-Catalog-ads-paid-amplifier-steady-state-5%-of-budget-maintained
numberedSections.body:
Per research/13 Pillar 5 + Pitfall #10 amplification-steady-state.

```
PINTEREST-CATALOG-ADS-STEADY-STATE (decision tree)

For all paths (Path B / C):
  → Maintain Pinterest-Catalog-ads-steady-state-5%-of-budget-allocation:
    1. Weekly-iteration-on-top-20-Pinterest-organic-best-performer-products
    2. Quarterly-rotation-of-top-20-products (refresh-list-based-on-current-Pinterest-Analytics-performance)
    3. Annual-renewal-of-Pinterest-Catalog-feed (refresh-product-titles + product-descriptions + product-keywords)
    4. Annual-renewal-of-Pinterest-vertical-pillar-set (refresh-vertical-pillars + boards + Idea-Pins)
  → Per Pinterest-for-Business-2024 + Triple-Whale-2024 benchmarks: brands maintaining-Pinterest-Catalog-ads-steady-state achieve 50-100%-incremental-organic-conversion-rate vs SEO-only-per-brand-without-Catalog-ads-amplification

numberedSections.heading: 4.3 Triple-Whale-organic-LTV-iteration-cycle-quarterly + 12-24-month compounding-traffic-curve-steady-state
numberedSections.body:
Per research/13 Pillar 5 + Pitfall #12 operational-cross-cutting.

```
TRIPLE-WHALE-ORGANIC-LTV-ITERATION-CYCLE-QUARTERLY (decision tree)

For all paths (Path A / B / C):
  → Run Triple-Whale-organic-LTV-iteration-cycle-quarterly:
    1. Pull Pinterest-organic-driven-cohort-LTV at 30/60/90/180/365-day windows (quarterly-window-expansion)
    2. Pull SEO-organic-driven-cohort-LTV at 30/60/90/180/365-day windows (quarterly-window-expansion)
    3. Pull paid-Meta-cohort-LTV + paid-Google-cohort-LTV + paid-TikTok-cohort-LTV at 30/60/90/180/365-day windows
    4. Run 5-way-comparison-cycle-quarterly: compare Pinterest-organic vs SEO-organic vs paid-Meta vs paid-Google vs paid-TikTok
    5. Iterate SEO-content-cluster + Pinterest-vertical-pillar + Idea-Pin-cadence based on canonical-5-way-comparison-cycle-quarterly
  → Maintain 12-24-month compounding-traffic-curve:
    1. Year-1: 6:1 ROI + 5-15% incremental-traffic-contribution + 0.6-0.85× CAC vs paid-social
    2. Year-2: 12-25:1 ROI + 15-25% incremental-traffic-contribution + 0.5-0.7× CAC vs paid-social
    3. Year-3: 25-50:1 ROI + 25-35% incremental-traffic-contribution + 0.4-0.6× CAC vs paid-social
  → Per Ahrefs 2024 + Pinterest 2024 + SEMrush 2024 benchmarks: brands with 12-24-month-compounding-traffic-curve-maintenance achieve 5-10× lower-CAC-Year-2+ vs paid-social per the canonical-organic-traffic-compounding-curve-vs-paid-social-saturation-curve
```

numberedSections.heading: 1.1 Amazon-Ads-Console-account-selected + Amazon-Seller-Central-account-active-verified
numberedSections.body:
Per research/14 Pillar 1 + Pitfall #1 DSP-onboarding.

```
AMAZON-DSP-ACCOUNT-SELECTION (decision tree)

For $500k-$5M DTC+Amazon GMV brands (Path A):
  → Sponsored-Products-and-Sponsored-Brands-only + Brand-Registry-defensive-levers-only
  → Best for cash-constrained first-time Amazon-DSP-test; defer Amazon-DSP-launch-until-Amazon-presence-matures

For $5M-$25M DTC+Amazon GMV brands (Path B DEFAULT):
  → Amazon-Ads-Console self-serve-with-Amazon-Ads-Console-minimum-spend-$35k/mo-or-$35k+ annual
  → OR managed-service-Tier-1-with-Tinuiti-or-Pacvue-or-Helium-10-or-Perpetua-Enterprise $2k-$10k/mo
  → Best for mid-market Amazon-DSP-launch with 5+ Amazon-listed hero SKUs + mature-Amazon-presence + DSP-budget $500+/mo + Halo-defense-creative-assets-baseline

For $25M+ DTC+Amazon GMV brands (Path C):
  → AMC-Enterprise-license + Amazon-Display-Amazon-Twitch + Amazon-Display-Amazon-Alexa + Amazon-Display-3rd-party-DSP-exchange + dedicated-Amazon-DSP-marketing-team + AMC-cohort-iteration-quarterly + Halo-defense-creative-iteration-monthly
  → Best for enterprise Amazon-DSP-orchestration with 50+ Amazon-listed hero SKUs + dedicated-Amazon-DSP-marketing-team

For luxury-DTC-brands with MAP-policy-guardrails (Path D):
  → Halo-defense-via-Brand-Registry-only — no DSP spend; relies on Brand-Registry-defensive-levers + Vine + Buy-Box-90%+
  → Best for luxury-MAP-policy-guardrails OR Amazon-DSP-launch-deferred-until-Amazon-presence-matures

For pre-revenue / pre-launch / defer (Path E):
  → No Amazon-DSP; defer until Amazon-presence-matures + Brand-Registry-trademark-registered + DSP-budget-wired
```

```
AMAZON-DSP-ACCOUNT-ONBOARDING

[ ] 1. Select DSP-launch-mode per decision-tree above (Path A/B/C/D/E)
[ ] 2. Verify Amazon-Seller-Central-account-active (Amazon-Seller-Central-account-active with 5+ listed-SKUs + Brand-Registry-trademark-registered + Buy-Box-ownership-on-hero-SKUs-≥90%)
[ ] 3. Verify Amazon-Brand-Registry-trademark-registered (Amazon-Brand-Registry-trademark-registered-with-USPTO-or-equivalent + Amazon-Brand-Analytics-access + Halo-defense-levers-enabled + Brand-Analytics-engaged-daily-visitors-lift-baseline)
[ ] 4. Verify Amazon-Attribution-Pro-or-advanced-tools-or-AMC-or-3rd-party-attribution-provider license (Beta-deprecation-August-2025; brands without this defer Amazon-DSP)
[ ] 5. Select DSP-management-mode (self-serve-Amazon-Ads-Console-minimum-spend-$35k/mo-or-$35k+ annual OR managed-service-Tier-1-with-Tinuiti-or-Pacvue-or-Helium-10-or-Perpetua-Enterprise $2k-$10k/mo)
[ ] 6. Onboard DSP-account with selected management-mode; wire credentials to Triple-Whale-Amazon-cohort-overlay + Klaviyo-Amazon-source-segment + Amazon-Audiences-Insights-engaged-shoppers
[ ] 7. Verify Brand-Analytics-engaged-daily-visitors-lift-baseline-90-day-baseline-active
[ ] 8. Approval-timeline 1-7 days for self-serve-Amazon-Ads-Console; 14-30 days for managed-service-onboarding-with-Tinuiti-or-Pacvue-or-Helium-10-or-Perpetua-Enterprise
[ ] 9. Rejection-rate <5% for self-serve-Amazon-Ads-Console per Amazon Ad Business 2024 benchmarks; 5-15% for managed-service-with-Tinuiti-or-Pacvue-or-Helium-10-or-Perpetua-Enterprise per Pacvue 2024 + Helium-10 2024 benchmarks
```

**Decision criterion:** All 5 DSP-launch-modes have specific onboarding-requirements. Brands with missing documentation (no-Amazon-Seller-Central-account, no-Brand-Registry-trademark, no-Amazon-Attribution-Pro-or-advanced-tools-or-AMC-license) should defer Phase 1 by 2-4 weeks while assembling.

numberedSections.heading: 1.2 Halo-defense-creative-assets-baseline-built + Brand-Analytics-baseline-audit
numberedSections.body:
Per research/14 Pillar 1 + Pitfall #5 Halo-defense-creative.

```
HALO-DEFENSE-CREATIVE-ASSETS-BASELINE (paste-ready checklist)

Build before Amazon-DSP-launch (5+-Halo-defense-creative-assets per Amazon-Creative-Assets-2024-canonical-5-specs):

[ ] 1. 5-second-static-banner-creative-assets (1:1-square + 16:9-landscape + 9:16-vertical × 3-pattern-categories [lifestyle-contextual + competitor-product-targeting + brand-defense] = 9-static-banner-variants)
[ ] 2. 5-second-video-creative-assets-9:16-vertical (3-pattern-categories × 3-product-angles = 9-video-vertical-variants)
[ ] 3. 5-second-video-creative-assets-1:1-square (3-pattern-categories × 3-product-angles = 9-video-square-variants)
[ ] 4. 5-second-video-creative-assets-16:9-landscape (3-pattern-categories × 3-product-angles = 9-video-landscape-variants)
[ ] 5. Halo-defense-creative-assets-pipeline-50+-assets-pipelined (steady-state-creative-asset-library; refreshed-quarterly per Amazon-Creative-Assets-2024-canonical-quarterly-refresh-cadence)
[ ] 6. Halo-defense-creative-assets-specs (per Amazon-Creative-Assets-2024-canonical-5-specs):
       - Static-banner: 1:1-square 1080x1080px or 16:9-landscape 1920x1080px or 9:16-vertical 1080x1920px
       - Static-banner: PNG or JPG, ≤500KB, RGB-color-space
       - Video: 5-second-min-length, MP4-format, ≤30MB, audio optional
       - Video: 9:16-vertical 1080x1920px for mobile, 1:1-square 1080x1080px for feed, 16:9-landscape 1920x1080px for desktop
       - Video: Amazon-DSP-programmatic-display-bid-strategy = fixed-CPM-with-$0.50-$5.00-CPM-band per Amazon-Ads-Console-2024

[ ] 7. Halo-defense-creative-assets-pattern-categories:
       - lifestyle-contextual (5-second-static-banner-or-video-of-product-in-lifestyle-context [kitchen / bathroom / outdoor / car / office] per Pacvue-2024-Halo-defense-creative-pattern-categories)
       - competitor-product-targeting (5-second-static-banner-or-video-of-product-vs-top-3-Amazon-competitors with comparator-features-highlighted per Amazon-Brand-Registry-2024-canonical-protective-mechanism)
       - brand-defense (5-second-static-banner-or-video-of-product-with-brand-mark + brand-trademark + brand-storytelling per Amazon-Brand-Registry-2024)

[ ] 8. Halo-defense-creative-assets-voice-fine-tuning per assets/02-brand-voice.md:
       - Default: 5-specs × 3-patterns × 1-voice = 15-creative-variants
       - Luxury: 5-specs × 3-patterns × 1-voice = 15-creative-variants (with MAP-policy-guardrail)
       - Sustainable: 5-specs × 3-patterns × 1-voice = 15-creative-variants (with mission-aligned-keyword-set)
       - Gen-Z: 5-specs × 3-patterns × 1-voice = 15-creative-variants (with Gen-Z-keyword-vertical + short-form-paid-amplification-rights)
       - B2B: 5-specs × 3-patterns × 1-voice = 15-creative-variants (with B2B-keyword-cluster + long-form-case-study-rights)
       - Total: 75-creative-variants across 5 voices × 5 specs × 3 patterns

[ ] 9. Halo-defense-creative-assets-quality-gate:
       - Brand-Registry-trademark-visible-per-asset
       - Amazon-Audiences-Insights-engaged-shoppers-keyword-set-applied-per-asset
       - Halo-defense-creative-voice-fine-tuning-applied-per-assets/02-brand-voice.md
       - 5-second-static-banner-or-video-specs-verified-per-Amazon-Creative-Assets-2024-canonical-5-specs
```

**Decision criterion:** All 5+ Halo-defense-creative-assets MUST be built BEFORE Amazon-DSP-launch. Brands that launch-Amazon-DSP-without-Halo-defense-creative-assets-baseline typically cap at 30-50% of Halo-defense-programmatic-display-effective-rate per Amazon-Brand-Registry 2024 + Pacvue 2024 case-studies.

numberedSections.heading: 1.3 First-Amazon-DSP-in-market-shoppers-campaign-launched
numberedSections.body:
Per research/14 Pillar 2 + Pitfall #2 Amazon-Audiences-Insights-engaged-shoppers.

```
FIRST-AMAZON-DSP-IN-MARKET-SHOPPERS-CAMPAIGN-LAUNCH

[ ] 1. Build 5-canonical-Amazon-DSP-audience-segments (per research/14 Pillar 2):
       - Amazon-Audiences-Insights-engaged-shoppers-recent-30-day (canonical-baseline-audience)
       - lifestyle-contextual-targeting-keywords-per-brand-vertical (5-10-keywords per brand-vertical)
       - competitor-product-targeting-top-3-Amazon-competitors (per Amazon-Brand-Registry-2024-canonical-protective-mechanism)
       - in-market-shoppers-audience-on-keyword-categories (Amazon-Audiences-Insights-engaged-shoppers)
       - lifestyle-contextual-audience-on-brand-vertical-keywords (per brand-vertical-keyword-set)
       - lookalike-audience-on-existing-Amazon-brands-customers (Triple-Whale-Amazon-cohort-overlay-Wire)
       - brand-defensive-audience-on-brand-keywords (per Amazon-Brand-Registry-2024-canonical-protective-mechanism)

[ ] 2. Wire-Amazon-Ads-Console-bid-strategy per-Audience-Insights-engaged-shoppers-per-brand-vertical-keyword-set:
       - bid-strategy = fixed-CPM-with-$0.50-$5.00-CPM-band (per Amazon-Ads-Console-2024 + Amazon-DSP-2024-bid-strategy-benchmarks)
       - OR dynamic-CPM-with-50th-percentile-bid-per-Audience-Insights-engaged-shoppers
       - OR goal-based-bid-with-$5-$50-CPM-target
       - OR PMP-deal-based-bid

[ ] 3. Launch-Amazon-DSP-programmatic-display-campaign with $1k-$5k/mo-programmatic-display-budget:
       - First-Amazon-DSP-in-market-shoppers-campaign-launched (1-of-5-audience-segments)
       - $1k-$5k/mo-programmatic-display-budget
       - bid-strategy = fixed-CPM-with-$0.50-$5.00-CPM-band
       - Halo-defense-creative-assets-baseline (5+-assets per Phase-1-Step-1.2)
       - Brand-Analytics-engaged-daily-visitors-lift-baseline-90-day-baseline-active

[ ] 4. Verify Amazon-Attribution-post-purchase-email-merge-instrumentation-wired (per Phase-1-Step-1.4)

[ ] 5. Verify Triple-Whale-Amazon-cohort-overlay-Wire (per Phase-1-Step-1.4)

[ ] 6. Verify Klaviyo-Amazon-source-segment-integration-wired (per Phase-1-Step-1.4)

[ ] 7. Monitor first-Amazon-DSP-in-market-shoppers-campaign for 14-days:
       - Brand-search-volume-lift (target 5-10× lift within 90-days per Amazon Ad Business 2024 + Tinuiti 2024 benchmarks)
       - Halo-defense-creative-assets-CTR (target 0.5-1.5% per Amazon-Creative-Assets-2024 benchmarks)
       - Brand-Analytics-engaged-daily-visitors-lift (target 10-30% lift within 90-days)
       - Amazon-DSP-programmatic-display-budget-pacing (target 80-100% of $1k-$5k/mo-budget)
```

**Decision criterion:** First-Amazon-DSP-in-market-shoppers-campaign should target 5-10× brand-search-volume-lift within 90-days per Amazon Ad Business 2024 + Tinuiti 2024 benchmarks. Brands that don't-achieve 5-10× brand-search-volume-lift within 90-days should iterate Halo-defense-creative-assets-baseline + audience-segment-keyword-set + bid-strategy.

numberedSections.heading: 1.4 Amazon-Attribution-post-purchase-email-merge-instrumentation-wired + Triple-Whale-Amazon-cohort-overlay-Wire + Klaviyo-Amazon-source-segment-integration-wired
numberedSections.body:
Per research/14 Pillar 3+4 measurement + attribution-merge.

```
AMAZON-ATTRIBUTION-POST-PURCHASE-EMAIL-MERGE-INSTRUMENTATION

[ ] 1. Amazon-Attribution-Pro-or-advanced-tools-or-AMC-or-3rd-party-attribution-provider-instrumentation:
       - Amazon-Attribution-Pro ($600/mo per Amazon-Attribution-2024-canonical-pricing-model)
       - OR Amazon-Marketing-Cloud (AMC) direct-query ($0 with Amazon-Attribution-Pro-or-advanced-tools or $1k+ direct-license per Amazon-Marketing-Cloud-2024-canonical-pricing-model)
       - OR 3rd-party-attribution-provider (Tinuiti-Enterprise or Pacvue-Enterprise or Helium-10-Enterprise or Perpetua-Enterprise per Amazon-Attribution-2024-Beta-to-GA-migration-guide)

[ ] 2. Triple-Whale-Amazon-cohort-overlay-Wire:
       - Triple-Whale-Starter $179/mo (Amazon-cohort-overlay + AMC-cohort-LTV-overlay)
       - OR Triple-Whale-Pro $1,290/mo (Amazon-cohort-overlay-Enterprise + AMC-cohort-LTV-overlay-Enterprise + paid-Meta-cohort-LTV vs Amazon-DSP-cohort-LTV vs paid-Google-cohort-LTV vs paid-TikTok-cohort-LTV at 30/60/90/180-day windows)

[ ] 3. Klaviyo-Amazon-source-segment-integration-Wire:
       - Klaviyo-Standard $0 with Amazon-source-cart-abandon + Amazon-source-welcome-flow
       - OR Klaviyo-Email-and-SMS $45/mo with Amazon-source-cart-abandon + Amazon-source-welcome-flow + Amazon-source-cohort-LTV
       - Per Klaviyo 2024 Amazon-source-segments benchmarks

[ ] 4. Post-purchase-survey-instrumentation (Triple-Whale-post-purchase-survey-with-Amazon-source-tracking OR Pacvue-post-purchase-survey-with-Amazon-source-tracking OR Helium-10-post-purchase-survey-with-Amazon-source-tracking)

[ ] 5. Verify all 4 instrumentation layers are wired and eventing into Triple-Whale-cohort-overlay

[ ] 6. Build the canonical 5-canonical-cohort-queries (per Amazon-Marketing-Cloud-2024 + Seller-Snap-2024):
       - Amazon-DSP-impression-cohort (impressions-but-no-click)
       - Amazon-DSP-click-cohort (clicks-but-no-purchase)
       - Amazon-DSP-engaged-shoppers-cohort (impressions + clicks + atc-but-no-purchase)
       - Halo-defense-impression-cohort (Halo-defense-impressions-but-no-click)
       - Halo-defense-click-cohort (Halo-defense-clicks-but-no-purchase)

[ ] 7. Verify AMC-cohort-overlay-instrumentation-wired-to-Triple-Whale-Amazon-cohort-LTV-overlay + paid-Meta-cohort-LTV vs Amazon-DSP-cohort-LTV vs paid-Google-cohort-LTV
```

**Decision criterion:** All 4 attribution-instrumentation layers (Amazon-Attribution + AMC + Triple-Whale + Klaviyo) MUST be wired BEFORE Phase 2 Amazon-DSP-omnichannel-campaigns-launch. Brands that launch-Amazon-DSP-without-attribution-instrumentation typically cap at 30-50% of Amazon-DSP's structural upside per Amazon-Attribution 2024 + Amazon-Marketing-Cloud 2024 benchmarks.

---

numberedSections.heading: 2.1 Amazon-DSP-omnichannel-campaigns-launch + 5-canonical-Amazon-DSP-audience-segments-deployed
numberedSections.body:
Per research/14 Pillar 2 + Pitfall #3 AMC-cohort-overlay.

```
AMAZON-DSP-OMNICHANNEL-CAMPAIGNS-LAUNCH

[ ] 1. Launch Amazon-DSP-omnichannel-campaigns (5 channels per Amazon-DSP-2024-canonical-launch-sequence):
       - Amazon-Display-Amazon-OWP (Amazon-owned-and-operated-properties [Amazon.com + IMDb + Twitch + Alexa + Whole Foods + Amazon-Fresh])
       - Amazon-Display-Amazon-Twitch (Twitch-streamer-content + Twitch-Prime-Ads)
       - Amazon-Display-Amazon-Alexa (Alexa-enabled-devices-display-ads)
       - Amazon-Display-3rd-party-DSP-exchange (3rd-party-publishers-exchange [Forbes + Hearst + CNN + BBC + NYTimes])
       - programmatic-display-display-network-publishers-exchange (Google-Display-Network + Open-Web-Exchanges)

[ ] 2. Deploy 5-canonical-Amazon-DSP-audience-segments with $2k-$10k/mo-programmatic-display-budget-per-audience-segment:
       - Amazon-Audiences-Insights-engaged-shoppers-recent-30-day ($2k-$10k/mo)
       - lifestyle-contextual-targeting-keywords-per-brand-vertical ($2k-$10k/mo)
       - competitor-product-targeting-top-3-Amazon-competitors ($2k-$10k/mo)
       - in-market-shoppers-audience-on-keyword-categories ($2k-$10k/mo)
       - lifestyle-contextual-audience-on-brand-vertical-keywords ($2k-$10k/mo)
       - lookalike-audience-on-existing-Amazon-brands-customers ($2k-$10k/mo)
       - brand-defensive-audience-on-brand-keywords ($2k-$10k/mo)

[ ] 3. Wire bid-strategy = dynamic-CPM-with-50th-percentile-bid-per-Audience-Insights-engaged-shoppers-per-brand-vertical-keyword-set (per Amazon-DSP-2024-bid-strategy-benchmarks)

[ ] 4. Amazon-DSP-bid-optimization-monthly (per Amazon-DSP-2024-canonical-bid-strategy + Pacvue 2024 + Helium-10 2024 + Tinuiti 2024 benchmarks):
       - bid-strategy-adjustment per audience-segment-LTV-lift
       - audience-segment-exclusion-rules (excluded-audiences-with-low-CTR)
       - Halo-defense-creative-assets-refresh-cadence (refresh-top-5-Halo-defense-creative-assets-every-90-days)

[ ] 5. Verify Amazon-Marketing-Cloud-cohort-overlay-instrumentation-wired + 5-canonical-cohort-queries-built-or-imported (per Phase-1-Step-1.4)
```

**Decision criterion:** Phase 2 Amazon-DSP-omnichannel-campaigns should target 5-30% Year-1-incremental-revenue vs Sponsored-Products-only-baseline per Amazon Ad Business 2024 + Pacvue 2024 benchmarks. Brands that don't-achieve 5-30% Year-1-incremental-revenue within 6-months should iterate Amazon-Audiences-Insights-engaged-shoppers-keyword-set + bid-strategy + Halo-defense-creative-assets-baseline.

numberedSections.heading: 2.2 AMC-cohort-overlay-iteration-cycle-monthly + Brand-Analytics-engaged-daily-visitors-lift-baseline-90-day-baseline-active
numberedSections.body:
Per research/14 Pillar 3 + Pitfall #6 Triple-Whale-Amazon-cohort-overlay.

```
AMC-COHORT-OVERLAY-ITERATION-CYCLE-MONTHLY

[ ] 1. AMC-cohort-overlay-iteration-cycle-monthly (per Amazon-Marketing-Cloud-2024-canonical-cohort-iteration-cadence):
       - Compare Amazon-DSP-impression-cohort-LTV vs control-cohort-of-no-DSP-impression-LTV
       - Compare Amazon-DSP-click-cohort-LTV vs control-cohort-LTV
       - Compare Amazon-DSP-engaged-shoppers-cohort-LTV vs control-cohort-LTV
       - Compare Halo-defense-impression-cohort-LTV vs control-cohort-LTV
       - Compare Halo-defense-click-cohort-LTV vs control-cohort-LTV

[ ] 2. Triple-Whale-Amazon-cohort-overlay-Wire + paid-Meta-cohort-LTV vs Amazon-DSP-cohort-LTV vs paid-Google-cohort-LTV:
       - 5-way-comparison-cycle (Amazon-DSP-cohort-LTV vs paid-Meta-cohort-LTV vs paid-Google-cohort-LTV vs paid-TikTok-cohort-LTV vs organic-DTC-cohort-LTV at 30/60/90/180-day windows per Triple-Whale 2024 + Seller-Snap 2024 + Amazon-Marketing-Cloud 2024 benchmarks)
       - Identify 20-40% Halo-vs-direct-cohort-LTV-difference per Tinuiti-2024-Halo-effect-cohort-study

[ ] 3. Brand-Analytics-engaged-daily-visitors-lift-baseline-90-day-baseline-active:
       - Brand-Analytics-engaged-daily-visitors (free with Brand-Registry-access)
       - 90-day-baseline-engaged-daily-visitors-lift-monitoring
       - Brand-search-volume-lift-tracking (compare-quarterly-brand-search-volume-from-Amazon-DSP-exposure vs control-set-of-no-DSP-exposure)

[ ] 4. Amazon-DSP-bid-optimization-monthly (per Phase-2-Step-2.1)

[ ] 5. Halo-defense-creative-asset-iteration-cadence (refresh-top-5-Halo-defense-creative-assets-every-90-days per Amazon-Creative-Assets-2024-canonical-quarterly-refresh-cadence + Pacvue 2024 + Helium-10 2024 + Tinuiti 2024 benchmarks)
```

**Decision criterion:** Phase 2 AMC-cohort-overlay-iteration-cycle should target 2-3× incremental-cohort-LTV-resolution vs AMC-direct-only-attribution for $5M+ brands with mature Amazon-presence per Amazon Ad Business 2024 + Amazon-Marketing-Cloud 2024 benchmarks. Brands that don't-achieve 2-3× incremental-cohort-LTV-resolution within 6-months should iterate AMC-cohort-queries-keyword-set + Triple-Whale-Amazon-cohort-overlay-Wire + Amazon-Attribution-post-purchase-email-merge-recipe.

---

[ ] 3. Klaviyo-Amazon-source-segment-integration-Wire-for-Amazon-source-cart-abandon + Amazon-source-welcome-flow + Amazon-source-cohort-LTV (per Phase-1-Step-1.4)

[ ] 4. Halo-vs-direct-incremental-ACoS-measurement-flow-built-or-imported-per-Amazon-Marketing-Cloud-2024-canonical-cohort-overlay-instrumentation:
       - Compare-cohort-LTV-of-Amazon-DSP-impression-cohort vs control-cohort-of-no-DSP-impression
       - Compare-cohort-LTV-of-Amazon-DSP-click-cohort vs control-cohort
       - Compare-cohort-LTV-of-Amazon-DSP-engaged-shoppers-cohort vs control-cohort
       - Compare-cohort-LTV-of-Halo-defense-impression-cohort vs control-cohort
       - Compare-cohort-LTV-of-Halo-defense-click-cohort vs control-cohort

[ ] 5. AMC-cohort-overlay-iteration-cycle-monthly-active-with-Bayesian-incremental-measurement:
       - Bayesian-incremental-measurement-iterates-monthly-or-quarterly
       - Halo-vs-direct-incremental-ACoS-measurement-typically-identifies-20-40% Halo-vs-direct-cohort-LTV-difference per Tinuiti-2024-Halo-effect-cohort-study

[ ] 6. Brand-search-volume-lift-tracking-via-Amazon-Marketing-Cloud-cohort-overlay + Brand-Analytics-engaged-daily-visitors + Helium-10-brand-search-volume-tracking

[ ] 7. Triple-Whale-Amazon-cohort-LTV-overlay-wired-and-iterating-Amazon-DSP-cohort-LTV-vs-paid-Meta-cohort-LTV-vs-paid-Google-cohort-LTV

[ ] 8. Amazon-Attribution-Beta-migration-to-Pro-or-advanced-tools-or-AMC-or-3rd-party-attribution-provider-BEFORE-August-2025 per Amazon-Attribution-2024-Beta-to-GA-migration-guide
```

**Decision criterion:** Phase 3 Amazon-Attribution-post-purchase-email-merge-recipe should target 2-4× incremental-attribution-resolution vs Amazon-Attribution-Beta-baseline for $5M+ brands per Amazon Ad Business 2024 + Amazon-Attribution 2024 + Amazon-Marketing-Cloud 2024 benchmarks. Brands that don't-achieve 2-4× incremental-attribution-resolution within 6-months should iterate Amazon-Attribution-Pro-or-advanced-tools-or-AMC-license + post-purchase-survey-instrumentation + Klaviyo-Amazon-source-segment-integration.

Brands that don't-identify-20-40% Halo-vs-direct-cohort-LTV-difference within 6-months should iterate AMC-cohort-queries-keyword-set + Triple-Whale-Amazon-cohort-overlay-Wire + Amazon-Attribution-post-purchase-email-merge-recipe.

Halo-defense-steady-state-creative-asset-library-built (50+-Halo-defense-creative-assets-pipelined-across-5-pillars-Halo-defense-creative-pattern-categories [lifestyle-contextual + competitor-product-targeting + brand-defense + sponsored-brands-video + sponsored-display-product + sponsored-brands-product]):

       - iterate-prompt-set-from-Halo-defense-creative-pattern-categories [lifestyle-contextual + competitor-product-targeting + brand-defense]

numberedSections.heading: 4.2 3rd-party-Amazon-DSP-manager-or-in-house-team-or-fully-managed-service-decision-recipe-evaluated
numberedSections.body:
Per research/14 Pillar 5 + Pitfall #8 DSP-marketing-team-capacity.

```
3RD-PARTY-AMAZON-DSP-MANAGER-OR-IN-HOUSE-TEAM-OR-FULLY-MANAGED-SERVICE-DECISION-RECIPE

[ ] 1. Tier 1 — managed-service-with-Tinuiti-or-Pacvue-or-Helium-10-or-Perpetua-Enterprise ($2k-$10k/mo):
       - For $5M+ brands with no-dedicated-Amazon-DSP-marketing-team OR <4-hr/wk-Amazon-DSP-marketing-team-capacity
       - Best for mid-market Amazon-DSP-launch with 5-50 Amazon-listed hero SKUs + mature-Amazon-presence
       - 50-70% better-performance-vs-self-serve-Amazon-Ads-Console per Tinuiti-2024 + Pacvue-2024 + Helium-10-2024-benchmarks

[ ] 2. Tier 2 — in-house-Amazon-DSP-marketing-team ($10k-$25k/mo for $25M+ brands):
       - For $25M+ brands with 8-16-hr/wk-Amazon-DSP-marketing-team-capacity + dedicated-Amazon-DSP-marketing-team
       - Best for enterprise Amazon-DSP-orchestration with 50+ Amazon-listed hero SKUs + AMC-Enterprise-license
       - 1.5-2× better-performance-vs-managed-service-Tier-1 per Pacvue-2024-Amazon-DSP-omnichannel-case-studies

[ ] 3. Tier 3 — fully-managed-service-with-Pacvue-Enterprise-or-Helium-10-Enterprise ($5k-$25k/mo for $25M+ brands):
       - For $25M+ brands with no-dedicated-Amazon-DSP-marketing-team OR with 50+ Amazon-listed hero SKUs + AMC-Enterprise-license
       - Best for enterprise Amazon-DSP-orchestration with 50+ Amazon-listed hero SKUs + dedicated-Amazon-DSP-marketing-team-on-vacation
       - 1.2-1.5× better-performance-vs-managed-service-Tier-1 per Pacvue-Enterprise-2024 + Helium-10-Enterprise-2024-benchmarks

[ ] 4. Evaluate per Amazon-DSP-2024-canonical-launch-staffing-requirement + Amazon-DSP-marketing-team-capacity (4-8 hr/wk minimum per research/14 Pillar 5)

[ ] 5. Brand-Analytics-engaged-daily-visitors-lift-monitoring-active-quarterly (per Phase-4-Step-4.1)

[ ] 6. Triple-Whale-Amazon-cohort-LTV-overlay-iterating-Amazon-DSP-cohort-LTV-vs-paid-Meta-cohort-LTV-vs-paid-Google-cohort-LTV (per Phase-4-Step-4.1)

[ ] 7. 12-24-month-Halo-defense-effective-rate-steady-state-typically-achieves-5-10× lower-CAC-year-2+ vs paid-social per Amazon-DSP-2024-canonical-3-way-comparison-cycle
```

**Decision criterion:** 3rd-party-Amazon-DSP-manager-or-in-house-team-or-fully-managed-service-decision-recipe should be evaluated per Amazon-DSP-marketing-team-capacity (4-8 hr/wk minimum). Brands that don't-have 4-8 hr/wk-Amazon-DSP-marketing-team-capacity should onboard managed-service-Tier-1-with-Tinuiti-or-Pacvue-or-Helium-10-or-Perpetua-Enterprise $2k-$10k/mo. Brands with 8-16 hr/wk-Amazon-DSP-marketing-team-capacity can use in-house-Amazon-DSP-marketing-team or fully-managed-service-Tier-3-with-Pacvue-Enterprise-or-Helium-10-Enterprise.

---

Steady-state SMSBump + Postscript channel orchestration live + 3.5:1 default Year-1 ROI Path B validated + $200k-$1.5M Path B incremental SMS-orchestration-revenue + 3-15% Year-1 incremental revenue + +20-40% SMS-list-growth-rate-vs-Postscript-only + +5-15% SMS-deliverability-vs-Postscript-only-baseline + +20-40% SMS-cohort-LTV-multiplier-vs-Postscript-only validated — research/15 §Cost & ROI steady-state benchmarks; $200k-$1.5M Path B Year-1 incremental SMS-orchestration-revenue at $5M US DTC + $1M international base per Postscript 2024 + SMSBump 2024 + Klaviyo 2024 + Attentive 2024 + GSMA-RCS 2024 + Triple-Whale 2024 + Two-way-conversations 2024 + RCS-business-messaging 2024 + MMS 2024 + Sailthru 2024 benchmarks; 3.5:1 default Year-1 ROI Path B at $5M US DTC + $1M international base ($200k-$1.5M Path B incremental SMS-orchestration-revenue / $14k-$85k cost = 2.4:1 to 107:1 Year-1 ROI = "great" band; conservative-nominal with 6-12-month-SMS-orchestration-build-cycle + 1%-rule-SMS-attrition-cohort-iteration-cycle = 3.5:1 conservative-nominal); Year-2+ ramp to 12-50:1 steady-state-compounding-SMS-orchestration-curve per Postscript 2024 + Sailthru 2024 canonical-2-4×-LTV-multiplier-year-2+ benchmarks; +20-40% SMS-list-growth-rate-vs-Postscript-only + +5-15% SMS-deliverability-vs-Postscript-only-baseline + +20-40% SMS-cohort-LTV-multiplier-vs-Postscript-only at $5M US DTC + $1M international base per the canonical 5-way-comparison-cycle [SMS-orchestration-cohort-LTV vs SMS-Postscript-only-cohort-LTV vs SMSBump-only-cohort-LTV vs Klaviyo-SMS-only-cohort-LTV vs Attentive-only-cohort-LTV at 30/60/90/180-day windows per Triple-Whale-2024 + Sailthru-2024 + Postscript-2024 + Attentive-2024 + SMSBump-2024 + Klaviyo-2024 + GSMA-RCS-2024 + Two-way-conversations-2024 + RCS-business-messaging-2024 + MMS-2024 benchmarks].

numberedSections.heading: 1.1 Postscript-tier-upgrade + DLR-monitoring-Wire-baseline + Klaviyo-SMS-segment-overlay-onboard
numberedSections.body:
Per research/15 Pillar 1 + Pitfall #2 DLR-monitoring-Wire-prereq.

```
SMSBUMP + POSTSCRIPT-CHANNEL-ORCHESTRATION-ONBOARDING-PACK (decision tree)

For $100k-$500k US-GMV brands (Path A):
  → Postscript-Starter-or-Growth-tier-active + DLR-monitoring-baseline-Wired
  → Best for cash-constrained first-time SMS-orchestration-test; defer SMSBump + Postscript-channel-orchestration-launch-until-SMS-substrate-matures

For $1M-$25M DTC+international GMV brands (Path B DEFAULT):
  → Postscript-Growth-or-Scale-tier-active + DLR-monitoring-Suite-Wire + Klaviyo-SMS-segment-overlay-onboard + Triple-Whale-SMS-merge-cohort-overlay-Wire
  → Best for mid-market SMS-orchestration-launch with mature-SMS-substrate + Move-#7-6+-months-post-launch + 50k+-opted-in-US-SMS-subscribers + Klaviyo-email-substrate-live + Triple-Whale-attribution-substrate-live

For $5M+ DTC+international GMV brands (Path C):
  → Attentive-Enterprise-onboard + SMSBump-Enterprise + Postscript-Enterprise + RCS-business-messaging-Enterprise + AI-orchestration-engine-license
  → Best for enterprise SMS-orchestration-orchestration with 100k+-opted-in-US-SMS-subscribers + dedicated-SMS-orchestration-team + 15%+-international-presence

For pre-revenue / pre-launch / defer (Path E):
  → No SMS-orchestration; defer until SMS-substrate-matures + Move-#7-6+-months-post-launch + 50k+-opted-in-US-SMS-subscribers + Shopify-Markets-active-locales + 20%+-SMS-orchestration-margin-headroom
```

```

Step 2: DLR-monitoring-Wire-baseline-with-Postscript-DLR-monitoring-Suite [Postscript-2024-DLR-monitoring-Suite-included-with-Postscript-Growth-or-Scale $0-with-Growth + $0-$200/mo-with-Scale] + Attentive-DLR-monitoring-Wire [Attentive-2024-DLR-monitoring-Wire-included-with-Attentive-Enterprise-$500-$5k/mo] + SMSBump-DLR-monitoring [SMSBump-2024-DLR-monitoring-included-with-SMSBump-Starter-or-Enterprise-tier] + Klaviyo-DLR-monitoring-Wire-baseline [Klaviyo-2024-DLR-monitoring-baseline-included-with-Klaviyo-Email-and-SMS] + Sailthru-2024-deliverability-reach-cohort-baseline + canonical-5-deliverability-cohort-queries-Wired [SMS-bounce-rate-cohort-Wired + SMS-opt-out-rate-cohort-Wired + SMS-spam-complaint-rate-cohort-Wired + SMS-deliverability-rate-cohort-Wired + SMS-cohort-LTV-vs-baseline-cohort-Wired]
Step 3: Klaviyo-SMS-segment-overlay-onboard per Klaviyo-2024-SMS-channel-vs-ESP-segmentation-baseline + voice-profile-webhook-mapping-Wired + Klaviyo-segment-SMS-source-attribution-Wired + Klaviyo-RFM-cohort-SMS-trigger-Wired + Klaviyo-flow-SMS-template-versioning-Wired + Klaviyo-conditional-content-SMS-segment-tag-Wired
Step 4: Triple-Whale-SMS-merge-cohort-overlay-Wire per Triple-Whale-2024-SMS-source-merge-baseline + SMS-bounce-rate-cohort-Wired + SMS-opt-out-rate-cohort-Wired + SMS-spam-complaint-rate-cohort-Wired + SMS-deliverability-rate-cohort-Wired + SMS-cohort-LTV-vs-baseline-cohort-Wired + international-multi-locale-SMS-cohort-LTV-iteration + 5-way-comparison-cycle-baseline + 1%-rule-SMS-attrition-cohort-baseline-Wired
Step 5: SMS-cohort-LTV-iteration-cycle-baseline-establish per Postscript-SMS-cohort-LTV-vs-baseline + Klaviyo-SMS-cohort-LTV-vs-baseline + Triple-Whale-SMS-cohort-LTV-vs-baseline + SMSBump-SMS-cohort-LTV-vs-baseline + Attentive-SMS-cohort-LTV-vs-baseline
Step 6: Voice-profile-webhook-mapping-Wired-for-Luxury+Gen-Z-cohort-routing-with-Klaviyo-2024-voice-profile-webhook-mapping + MMS-platform-Luxury-voice-content-template-Wired + RCS-platform-Gen-Z-voice-content-template-Wired per Klaviyo-2024-voice-profile-webhook-mapping-canonical-launch-prerequisite
Step 7: First-SMS-orchestration-flow-launch-international-SMS-cart-abandon-via-SMSBump + high-intent-US-SMS-cart-abandon-via-Postscript + DLR-segment-flagged-bounce-rate-recovery-via-Postscript with bid-strategy = fixed-cost-per-recovery-target + canonical-2-way-cohort-LTV-measurement-via-Triple-Whale

Expected outcome: Postscript-tier-upgraded + DLR-monitoring-Wired + Klaviyo-SMS-segment-overlay-onboarded + Triple-Whale-SMS-merge-cohort-overlay-Wired + SMS-cohort-LTV-iteration-cycle-baseline + first-SMS-orchestration-flow-launched.
